name: Crystal & Jason
subject: 🪶 7 Directions of Service Newsletter— Memorial Day Edition May 2025
body:
Don’t miss updates on the Memorial Day, YESA Farm fundraiser, new auction items, upcoming events, and how to take action for Rights of Nature and against harmful pipelines in NC. 🌿✊🏽 This is important. We're all in this together.
---
| |
---
#
### 🕯️ **Honoring Memorial Day: A Sacred Day of Remembrance**
---
|
---
Hi Friend, As we reflect this Memorial Day, we pause to honor the deep legacy of service, sacrifice, and love for community that runs through our people. Both Jason and Crystal's grandfathers served in World War II. Crystal's great-grandfather fought in World War I. Her family has proudly served across many branches of the U.S. military. As a former military spouse, Crystal knows that Memorial Day is not just a holiday--it is sacred. It is about honoring those who gave everything. Many Native people continue this tradition of service, enlisting at the highest per capita rates in the country. And when they come home, they keep serving--helping their communities heal, grow, and rise. We honor them not just in memory, but in action. This Memorial Day, we invite you to:
🌿 Light a candle or offer a prayer in remembrance
🪶 Acknowledge Native warriors and their families
❤️🔥 Support those who continue to serve in our communities Let us never forget: freedom is not free, and the spirit of service lives on in each of us.
---
|
---
### 🌱 YESA Farm Fundraiser - Growing Together
We are just a few weeks away from our **Cultivating the Future: YESA Farm Benefit Event** on **June 7th**! Join us for an unforgettable evening of community, culture, and purpose: 🥘 **Farm-to-table meal**
🎶 **Storytelling and music**
🎁 **Silent Auction pick-up and celebration** 📍 Location: YESA Farm, Alamance County, NC
🎟️ Tickets include dinner and drinks
🌾 Proceeds support Indigenous land stewardship, youth programs, and historic preservation
* * *
### 🎉 Online Silent Auction is LIVE -- Bid Now!
Bidding has begun and items are being added daily--don't let this opportunity slip away! Support YESA Farm and win one-of-a-kind treasures from our community. 🔗 **Auction Link** : https://givebutter.com/c/zPXwDE/auction
📅 **Bidding ends June 6, 2025**
📦 **Pick-up available at the June 7 event** **Featured Auction Items Include:**
_(Full list available in the auction portal)_
* Self-care experiences (massage, acupuncture, salt cave)
* Handmade and Indigenous artwork
* Beaded jewelry, soaps, literary sets
* Outdoor adventures, gift cards, and farm goods
* One-of-a-kind workshops and performances
* Even a vasectomy service (yes, really!)

Every bid supports our work to grow food sovereignty, cultural resilience, and environmental justice for generations to come. [Click here to read more!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxUDfkOJKjLt3RfEVrnWMbNsEo0zHDkj8fwAzx8n8Ytsn0_sGkw6PJFPA9c2FCCuvgkT2num6JN52jCGiNXKc5fvxJhgiyxELbRztZFZ8XXIBdC3Mk03WWQd9oUP3GZruTVwIOzG9Lt290ZJNCziPUmqCwBJMZXmabFTTp-BJ8geI3l_7RvMeIXuSF14gJB0hx-xWqJ-iMDHEjoNEtI_lsAxIydmf_yr9-4cFa-_IT7BHKD57sHAp_djkW_hcsv9JOezZ8Fy5z706ZCHLDkC0E7By2eXibBmm_dpogTl1OYPMs_2FIA5D9Nl59j4zY0nbjM1kuUC3Fm3hShVT8ilDzhZw_cgppawBql9RgSTkxmDN/4gu/RSUj9BydSEGe29HpIZ9zfA/h0/h001.-X3BQzo1qk2qMQwdf5aiJlDJhvcIxpM4sEUQdnZCa64)

###
### 🔍 **Spotlight on a Community Member**
---
We first met **Lib Hutchby** in 2018, and from the beginning, her passion for justice and the Earth was unmistakable. Lib is an active member of the **Women's International League for Peace and Freedom (Triangle Branch), the Raging Grannies, Frack Free UNC,** and the **North Carolina Environmental Justice Network**. She is a steadfast defender of water, land, and community. We love working with Lib--not only because of her tireless advocacy, but because she brings warmth, wisdom, and compassion to everything she does. She is a mother, a mentor, and a fierce friend. I often call her a **warrior woman** , and I'm honored to also call her my friend. Lib is one of those rare people who quietly carries so much for so many--and still shows up with grace and fire. We're lucky to be in this work alongside her. Crystal & Jason
---
##
### 📅 Upcoming Events -- Join Us!
---
**📍 Thursday, June 12 - Greensboro + Zoom**
**Rights of Nature Info Session**
Join us in Greensboro (or online) for a conversation on the growing **Rights of Nature movement**. We'll explore what's happening locally, what's next for our campaign, and how you can get involved. **📍 Thursday, July 17 - Raleigh + Zoom**
**Rights of Nature Info Session**
Couldn't make it in June? Join us in Raleigh or online for another opportunity to dive into Rights of Nature, learn about our ongoing efforts, and find your place in this powerful movement.
* * *
**🌎 June 20 -22 - Warren Wilson College, Asheville, NC**
**" Collaboration for Climate Action" Summit**
Members of the 7DS team will be presenting at this **free, multi-day summit** bringing together changemakers, students, and grassroots leaders. Join us for skill-sharing, strategy sessions, and connection to climate justice networks across the region.
* * *
**🎬 Wednesday, June 25 - YESA Farm, 7-9 PM**
**Summer Movie Night at the Farm**
Bring a blanket and a friend and enjoy a relaxed summer evening under the stars. We'll be screening a family-friendly film at the farm--free and open to all! Light snacks provided. **🎬 Wednesday, July 16 - YESA Farm, 7-9 PM**
**Summer Movie Night - Round Two!**
Missed the first one? Don't worry--we're back with another evening of community and cinema on the land. Come early, bring your lawn chair, and soak in the magic of summer at YESA.

---
### 🧭 Policy & Advocacy Update: Protecting What Sustains Us
As part of our mission, we continue to lead on the frontlines of environmental justice in North Carolina. 🛡️ **Rights of Nature**
We are advancing local and Tribal resolutions to recognize the inherent rights of rivers, forests, and ecosystems to thrive. These frameworks empower communities to protect what they love with legal tools grounded in Indigenous worldviews. 🛢️ **Pipeline Resistance**
We're actively tracking the Mountain Valley Pipeline Southgate Extension and the proposed Southeast Supply Enhancement Project (SSEP) from Williams Transco. These projects threaten our water, land, and communities. We remain committed to holding corporations and decision-makers accountable--and keeping you informed and empowered to act. 📬 **Stay tuned for upcoming community hearings, trainings, and calls to action.** Your voice is powerful.
* * *

---
#
### 📚 **What We 're Reading / Watching**
---
|
---
###
### 🎬 **Sugarcane** (2024)
---
Directed by Julian Brave NoiseCat and Emily Kassie, this powerful documentary investigates the atrocities committed at Canada's Indian residential schools, focusing on the St. Joseph's Mission near Williams Lake, British Columbia. The film delves into the intergenerational trauma experienced by survivors and their descendants, offering a poignant look at resilience and the quest for justice. "Sugarcane" premiered at the Sundance Film Festival, winning the Grand Jury Award for Directing, and is available on Disney+.

|
---
###
### 📖 **"mother" by m.s. RedCherries** (2024)
---
This debut poetry collection by m.s. RedCherries, a member of the Northern Cheyenne Nation, explores themes of identity, adoption, and reconnection with one's roots. The poems follow an Indigenous child adopted by a non-Indigenous family, tracing her journey back to her tribal heritage. The collection has been praised for its innovative structure and emotional resonance, earning a spot as a finalist for the 2024 National Book Award for Poetry

**📅 Tuesday, May 27, 2025 | ⏰ 9:00 AM**
**📍 Outside Mebane City Hall - 106 E Washington St, Mebane, NC 27302** Join **7 Directions of Service** and the **North Carolina Environmental Justice Network (NCEJN)** for the release of a **groundbreaking new report** : **🛢️ _Buc-ee 's Burden: How Mega Gas Stations Risk Community & Environmental Health + Destroy Local Economies_** This press conference will include statements from **advocates featured in the report** and other **frontline leaders** fighting back against the harmful impacts of mega gas station developments across North Carolina. These projects often threaten:
* Clean water and cultural sites
* Community health and traffic safety
* Local businesses and sustainable economies

clean_body: Don’t miss updates on the Memorial Day, YESA Farm fundraiser, new auction items, upcoming events, and how to take action for Rights of Nature and against harmful pipelines in NC. 🌿✊🏽 This is important. We're all in this together. | | 🕯️ Honoring Memorial Day: A Sacred Day of Remembrance | Hi Friend, As we reflect this Memorial Day, we pause to honor the deep legacy of service, sacrifice, and love for community that runs through our people. Both Jason and Crystal's grandfathers served in World War II. Crystal's great-grandfather fought in World War I. Her family has proudly served across many branches of the U.S. military. As a former military spouse, Crystal knows that Memorial Day is not just a holiday--it is sacred. It is about honoring those who gave everything. Many Native people continue this tradition of service, enlisting at the highest per capita rates in the country. And when they come home, they keep serving--helping their communities heal, grow, and rise. We honor them not just in memory, but in action. This Memorial Day, we invite you to: 🌿 Light a candle or offer a prayer in remembrance 🪶 Acknowledge Native warriors and their families ❤️🔥 Support those who continue to serve in our communities Let us never forget: freedom is not free, and the spirit of service lives on in each of us. | 🌱 YESA Farm Fundraiser - Growing Together We are just a few weeks away from our Cultivating the Future: YESA Farm Benefit Event on June 7th! Join us for an unforgettable evening of community, culture, and purpose: 🥘 Farm-to-table meal 🎶 Storytelling and music 🎁 Silent Auction pick-up and celebration 📍 Location: YESA Farm, Alamance County, NC 🎟️ Tickets include dinner and drinks 🌾 Proceeds support Indigenous land stewardship, youth programs, and historic preservation 🎉 Online Silent Auction is LIVE -- Bid Now! Bidding has begun and items are being added daily--don't let this opportunity slip away! Support YESA Farm and win one-of-a-kind treasures from our community. 🔗 Auction Link : 📅 Bidding ends June 6, 2025 📦 Pick-up available at the June 7 event Featured Auction Items Include: (Full list available in the auction portal) Self-care experiences (massage, acupuncture, salt cave) Handmade and Indigenous artwork Beaded jewelry, soaps, literary sets Outdoor adventures, gift cards, and farm goods One-of-a-kind workshops and performances Even a vasectomy service (yes, really!) Every bid supports our work to grow food sovereignty, cultural resilience, and environmental justice for generations to come. | | 🔍 Spotlight on a Community Member We first met Lib Hutchby in 2018, and from the beginning, her passion for justice and the Earth was unmistakable. Lib is an active member of the Women's International League for Peace and Freedom (Triangle Branch), the Raging Grannies, Frack Free UNC, and the North Carolina Environmental Justice Network. She is a steadfast defender of water, land, and community. We love working with Lib--not only because of her tireless advocacy, but because she brings warmth, wisdom, and compassion to everything she does. She is a mother, a mentor, and a fierce friend. I often call her a warrior woman , and I'm honored to also call her my friend. Lib is one of those rare people who quietly carries so much for so many--and still shows up with grace and fire. We're lucky to be in this work alongside her. Crystal & Jason 📅 Upcoming Events -- Join Us! 📍 Thursday, June 12 - Greensboro + Zoom Rights of Nature Info Session Join us in Greensboro (or online) for a conversation on the growing Rights of Nature movement. We'll explore what's happening locally, what's next for our campaign, and how you can get involved. 📍 Thursday, July 17 - Raleigh + Zoom Rights of Nature Info Session Couldn't make it in June? Join us in Raleigh or online for another opportunity to dive into Rights of Nature, learn about our ongoing efforts, and find your place in this powerful movement. 🌎 June 20 -22 - Warren Wilson College, Asheville, NC " Collaboration for Climate Action" Summit Members of the 7DS team will be presenting at this free, multi-day summit bringing together changemakers, students, and grassroots leaders. Join us for skill-sharing, strategy sessions, and connection to climate justice networks across the region. 🎬 Wednesday, June 25 - YESA Farm, 7-9 PM Summer Movie Night at the Farm Bring a blanket and a friend and enjoy a relaxed summer evening under the stars. We'll be screening a family-friendly film at the farm--free and open to all! Light snacks provided. 🎬 Wednesday, July 16 - YESA Farm, 7-9 PM Summer Movie Night - Round Two! Missed the first one? Don't worry--we're back with another evening of community and cinema on the land. Come early, bring your lawn chair, and soak in the magic of summer at YESA. | 💬 Words from the Circle | Return to Your Roots Initiative (April 12th) @ Yesa Farm "Working in the garden helps me feel like I'm reconnecting to my grandmother." -- Youth Program Participant ?linkid=3&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-7-directions-of-service-newsletter-memorial-day-edition-may-2025&emailreferrer=email2750248&emailsubject=-7-directions-of-service-newsletter-memorial-day-edition-may-2025&& From the Blog 🧭 Policy & Advocacy Update: Protecting What Sustains Us As part of our mission, we continue to lead on the frontlines of environmental justice in North Carolina. 🛡️ Rights of Nature We are advancing local and Tribal resolutions to recognize the inherent rights of rivers, forests, and ecosystems to thrive. | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=683525304e7033299c710d96&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fthe-permanent-short&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6835230db062e23def7591e0&l=en-US&s=c6xQXfm74Vh54f5OwYqQFinQVqY%3D)
---
#### This Memorial Day, while we honor the service and sacrifice of those who gave everything for our freedoms, we also reflect on what those freedoms are meant to protect—**honest government, fair opportunity, and a voice for the people**.
#### But in Juneau, the people are being forgotten.
#### The Legislature just closed its latest session—not with discipline, not with restraint, but with a **stampede of giveaways**. Millions of dollars in taxpayer funds handed over to the **National Education Association** and entrenched union bureaucracies—while schools close their doors, and more Alaskan families than ever turn to charter schools and homeschooling.
#### What was the dividend meant to do?
The **Permanent Fund Dividend** was designed as a promise—that all Alaskans would share in the wealth of our natural resources. It was never meant to become a **slush fund for lobbyists, consultants, and political machines controlled by out-of-state interests.**
#### This is not just bad budgeting.
It’s a betrayal of the people—and the purpose—of Alaska.
#### Our upcoming film, _The Permanent Short: Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal_ , will expose this corruption. We’ll follow the money and show how generations of Alaskans are being denied their share, their voice, and their future.
#### And the movement is already growing.
#### Our **Angel tickets were the first to sell out for “Frozen Odds”** —a powerful signal that Alaskans are ready to fight back. Angel supporters receive exclusive access to both _The Permanent Short_ and _Frozen Odds_ , the film that lit the fuse.
#### This is just the beginning.
#### The fight for Alaska’s future isn’t over.
It’s just getting started.
---
#### [**Click Here To Get Your Angel Ticket**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=683525304e7033299c710d96&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fthe-permanent-short&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6835230db062e23def7591e0&l=en-US&s=c6xQXfm74Vh54f5OwYqQFinQVqY%3D)
---
#### **In 2001, Enron collapsed under the weight of one of the largest corporate frauds in American history—over $25 billion evaporated overnight, leaving pensions gutted and lives destroyed. It was called the smartest disaster money could buy.**
#### But what if the next Enron wasn’t a corporation?
What if it was your own government?
#### This film asks the billion-dollar question:
**What happens when a state quietly reallocates tens of billions of dollars meant for its citizens—without a vote, without consent, and without accountability?**
#### We follow the money—through shadowy nonprofits, bloated bureaucracies, and politically connected networks like **Arabella Advisors** , **Alaska Venture Fund** , and the **1630 Fund**.
#### It’s a financial betrayal not buried in spreadsheets—but broadcast in silence.
**$25 billion gone** —not from shareholders this time, but from the people of Alaska.
#### This is _The Permanent Short_.
#### More announcements coming soon.
**Thank you for being part of this journey.**
---
[_ _ Click Here To Get Your Angel Ticket _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=683525304e7033299c710d96&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fthe-permanent-short&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6835230db062e23def7591e0&l=en-US&s=c6xQXfm74Vh54f5OwYqQFinQVqY%3D)

### **Now we have 108 supporters for “Frozen Odds”**
---
#### **Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process.**
#### **Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down?**

name: Kristi Rogers
subject: I survived an IED explosion in Baghdad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
For over a month now, you've been hearing from my husband Mike Rogers, his campaign team, and supporters across Michigan about **[why 2026 is a make-or-break election, why Mike is the right leader at the right time, and how flipping this seat is key to keeping the Senate red and advancing President Trump's agenda.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-3HXJavAzKo8IQ5CtlYxDQ~~/AAVLBhA~/fefmp8dLvef29p1fxwASgf2Y28tZarYLE8kUbLhcAZGTrVinCD06nD6Z-q1zParTRvQlf_VvUpOpA8g93Wqe94BIbGndNvecYzWVHh6WMjbLn2hXgQLCG1GYfw_hdm4OIXmuWzU0-INLTE-yd0z-u8Q9xX-woJLpSFARv3X2pjDz8cX3wYyH_knx9OzelYAuUMr2cMWqMuWEU-YydkwYDLyVvyqMb8gEC4lttecZWTRfNSjWAe-yX_i1zfdR3H8W6yRwYiIXHjMwaVE7DJ092X9zh2vU0XNRDaItRJr5PPFkdkg6E3o2mGV_UnZynx54AZZkS0aadurnQ69PuqgYfmdum8gb0fZkkEPtY4CWDnEdW-BF16pviaQOTzYdZm0KpdvfL6TOX1Eh5WqapCbn1A~~)**

All of that is true.

Today, I wanted to take a moment to share a bit of my story -- and why I know, beyond a doubt, that Mike Rogers is a man worthy of your trust and support.

I was deployed to Iraq in the height of the conflict in the Middle East while working for the Department of Defense.

Here's a picture of me from back then:
[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-3HXJavAzKo8IQ5CtlYxDQ~~/AAVLBhA~/fefmp8dLvef29p1fxwASgf2Y28tZarYLE8kUbLhcAZGTrVinCD06nD6Z-q1zParTRvQlf_VvUpOpA8g93Wqe94BIbGndNvecYzWVHh6WMjbLn2hXgQLCG1GYfw_hdm4OIXmuWzU0-INLTE-yd0z-u8Q9xX-woJLpSFARv3X2pjDz8cX3wYyH_knx9OzelYAuUMr2cMWqMuWEU-YydkwYDLyVvyqMb8gEC4lttecZWTRfNSjWAe-yX_i1zfdR3H8W6yRwYiIXHjMwaVE7DJ092X9zh2vU0XNRDaItRJr5PPFkdkg6E3o2mGV_UnZynx54AZZkS0aadurnQ69PuqgYfmdum8gb0fZkkEPtY4CWDnEdW-BF16pviaQOTzYdZm0KpdvfL6TOX1Eh5WqapCbn1A~~)
And on a fateful day, my team and I were traveling through the city of Baghdad. You have to understand that just getting around the region as Americans at this point was incredibly dangerous.

We were told to stay in the middle lane of the highway, to keep as much of a distance between us and the explosive devices that lined the roads as possible. The terrorists were always waiting for their opportunity to attack.

_**[Suddenly-- it happened.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-3HXJavAzKo8IQ5CtlYxDQ~~/AAVLBhA~/fefmp8dLvef29p1fxwASgf2Y28tZarYLE8kUbLhcAZGTrVinCD06nD6Z-q1zParTRvQlf_VvUpOpA8g93Wqe94BIbGndNvecYzWVHh6WMjbLn2hXgQLCG1GYfw_hdm4OIXmuWzU0-INLTE-yd0z-u8Q9xX-woJLpSFARv3X2pjDz8cX3wYyH_knx9OzelYAuUMr2cMWqMuWEU-YydkwYDLyVvyqMb8gEC4lttecZWTRfNSjWAe-yX_i1zfdR3H8W6yRwYiIXHjMwaVE7DJ092X9zh2vU0XNRDaItRJr5PPFkdkg6E3o2mGV_UnZynx54AZZkS0aadurnQ69PuqgYfmdum8gb0fZkkEPtY4CWDnEdW-BF16pviaQOTzYdZm0KpdvfL6TOX1Eh5WqapCbn1A~~)**_

I can still remember what it was like to have my head spinning, with my ears ringing and surrounded by smoke.

When I finally realized what happened, I was incredibly grateful to have made it out alive, as others in the car next to us were not as lucky.

After this incident, my husband often jokes that when there's a bump in the night at home, _he sends me to check things out and make sure we are safe._

**[But the truth is that my husband, Mike Rogers, is the strongest, most courageous, and honorable man I've ever known.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-3HXJavAzKo8IQ5CtlYxDQ~~/AAVLBhA~/fefmp8dLvef29p1fxwASgf2Y28tZarYLE8kUbLhcAZGTrVinCD06nD6Z-q1zParTRvQlf_VvUpOpA8g93Wqe94BIbGndNvecYzWVHh6WMjbLn2hXgQLCG1GYfw_hdm4OIXmuWzU0-INLTE-yd0z-u8Q9xX-woJLpSFARv3X2pjDz8cX3wYyH_knx9OzelYAuUMr2cMWqMuWEU-YydkwYDLyVvyqMb8gEC4lttecZWTRfNSjWAe-yX_i1zfdR3H8W6yRwYiIXHjMwaVE7DJ092X9zh2vU0XNRDaItRJr5PPFkdkg6E3o2mGV_UnZynx54AZZkS0aadurnQ69PuqgYfmdum8gb0fZkkEPtY4CWDnEdW-BF16pviaQOTzYdZm0KpdvfL6TOX1Eh5WqapCbn1A~~)**

It takes guts to get back into politics these days -- especially with the folks on the other side gearing up to spend tens of millions of dollars to lie about you and your family in the name of scoring cheap political points.

As a young man, Mike fought cancer and worked two jobs -- one on the floor of an automotive factory, and one in security -- just to put himself through college.

My husband is an Army veteran, former FBI agent, and even chaired the House Intelligence Committee in the tough days after 9/11.

He also has been taking the fight to Communist China -- going so far as to break from his fellow Republicans to blow the whistle on the threats that the CCP poses.

_It just doesn 't get any tougher than that._

Mike is the kind of man that does what is right, no matter the personal consequence.

**[And he is the kind of man that is deserving of your support. Because with Mike in the Senate, you can know that there is someone in your corner, fighting for you and preserving our great American values.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-3HXJavAzKo8IQ5CtlYxDQ~~/AAVLBhA~/fefmp8dLvef29p1fxwASgf2Y28tZarYLE8kUbLhcAZGTrVinCD06nD6Z-q1zParTRvQlf_VvUpOpA8g93Wqe94BIbGndNvecYzWVHh6WMjbLn2hXgQLCG1GYfw_hdm4OIXmuWzU0-INLTE-yd0z-u8Q9xX-woJLpSFARv3X2pjDz8cX3wYyH_knx9OzelYAuUMr2cMWqMuWEU-YydkwYDLyVvyqMb8gEC4lttecZWTRfNSjWAe-yX_i1zfdR3H8W6yRwYiIXHjMwaVE7DJ092X9zh2vU0XNRDaItRJr5PPFkdkg6E3o2mGV_UnZynx54AZZkS0aadurnQ69PuqgYfmdum8gb0fZkkEPtY4CWDnEdW-BF16pviaQOTzYdZm0KpdvfL6TOX1Eh5WqapCbn1A~~)**
******************************************************[SUPPORT MIKE ROGERS HERE](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-3HXJavAzKo8IQ5CtlYxDQ~~/AAVLBhA~/fefmp8dLvef29p1fxwASgf2Y28tZarYLE8kUbLhcAZGTrVinCD06nD6Z-q1zParTRvQlf_VvUpOpA8g93Wqe94BIbGndNvecYzWVHh6WMjbLn2hXgQLCG1GYfw_hdm4OIXmuWzU0-INLTE-yd0z-u8Q9xX-woJLpSFARv3X2pjDz8cX3wYyH_knx9OzelYAuUMr2cMWqMuWEU-YydkwYDLyVvyqMb8gEC4lttecZWTRfNSjWAe-yX_i1zfdR3H8W6yRwYiIXHjMwaVE7DJ092X9zh2vU0XNRDaItRJr5PPFkdkg6E3o2mGV_UnZynx54AZZkS0aadurnQ69PuqgYfmdum8gb0fZkkEPtY4CWDnEdW-BF16pviaQOTzYdZm0KpdvfL6TOX1Eh5WqapCbn1A~~)******************************************************
Thank you for your time, thank you for your support and thank you for not giving up on politics and our great American experiment,

Kristi Rogers

[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/o3IWkVGdClEzQZf03P5J1w~~/AAVLBhA~/1mERFfjXTLrMTY81xC6y5CczvFyN11QNd9rCpiSFWimzbkJvD_GULyIIF1bOv4o-4S1zJWs_S-GRYK_xiIysLb2W0VtKBvjNa5Q05N7Ll9L7lKWxz2Gbb8D3ss08tbOrYwTwVRfmsBqFc4tpmXIkcw~~)

| Paid for by the NRSC.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.NRSC.org](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/H2q51mXkEX6IO-RUL0kbIA~~/AAVLBhA~/HuM9EJRjhJwyQhOKLy5H_FKis_xNQrgi2bZYHcETEhWk1Mga7oxa5zPQVhShsgS4lasttFDGj-1Bi6yijfiW22WHp7BNdtiDh9kWmrqFI-Q~)

name: Matthew Frohlich, WAGOP Executive Director
subject: Rattle in Seattle: Hold Seattle Mayor Bruce Harrell Accountable for Anti-Christian Bigotry (05.26.25)
body:
Rattle in Seattle: Hold Seattle Mayor Bruce Harrell Accountable for Anti-Christian Bigotry (05.26.25) | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/please-support-wagops-election-integrity-efforts-2699020?e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| |
# **Rattle in Seattle: Hold Seattle Mayor Harrell Accountable for Bigotry**

**Bellevue** —Seattle Mayor Bruce Harrell’s [bigotry toward Christians](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3c23b50916&e=6a281f566d) in the aftermath of what was to be a peaceful gathering at Cal Anderson Park in Seattle’s Capitol Hill Neighborhood on Saturday cannot be denied. It is time to hold him accountable for siding with Antifa extremists and denying religious freedom to the faith community and for failing to protect them.

Please join hundreds of conservatives and evangelicals for [“Rattle in Seattle”](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d5b572b575&e=6a281f566d) on Tuesday, May 27th at 5pm on the front steps of [Seattle City Hall](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3755c7cb27&e=6a281f566d) to demand an apology and a retraction from Mayor Harrell—[who instead of showing humility is doubling down](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=060576e9ff&e=6a281f566d)—for his vile comments aimed against the faith community.

Please make every effort to attend in support of religious freedom. Thank you.

Sincerely,

Matthew Frohlich
WAGOP Executive Director

---
| | | | | | | [](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e9210777b4&e=6a281f566d)

| Update 24 May, 2025
---
| |
---
If you see something, say something--and take action. Thankfully, I serve on the House Armed Services Committee (HASC), where I can directly contribute to strengthening our national security. While I'm a strong advocate for limited government, my foremost priority in Congress is ensuring the safety and security of the American people--both at home and abroad.
Sadly, the previous administration made decisions that cost American lives and left us more vulnerable. Fortunately, President Trump has made law and order, as well as national security, a top priority. His "peace through strength" policies are making a significant impact both at home and abroad. However stay vigilant, we still have a long way to go to turn things around.
---
| |
---
| What can we do? We can live a life worthy of their sacrifice. On this Memorial Day, we pause to remember and honor the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. While spending time at cookouts or at the beach with family and friends this weekend, take time to honor and remember them with a prayer, a moment of silence, a flag raised high, or a quiet reflection. With much gratitude, we truly are the home of the free because of the brave.
---
| The One Big Beautiful Bill Act Passes the House!
---
| |
---
| America First! I had a busy day all over the Virginia 5th District that started Friday morning when I left my house 5am to wave good morning and engage with folks on their way to work in Albemarle County. My "YES" vote made the difference on the Big Beautiful Bill that passed by just one vote! Thank goodness my predecessor is no longer in DC because he said he would have voted "NO" with the democrats. This would have caused President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill that includes much of the America First agenda to have failed. After the vote, many of my fellow conservative colleagues expressed their gratitude for my congressional run and my support of the bill.
EVERY House Democrat united to vote against:

* Reducing the deficit by $1.6 trillion
* Funding Trump's Remain in Mexico Policy
* Lowering costs $13,000 more in take home pay for American families
* Saving the average American family $1,700
* No more $200 fee for suppressors
* Defunding planned parenthood
* No tax on tips
* No tax on overtime
* Terminating the Green New Scam "EV" chargers and Luxury "clean" vehicles
* Tax cuts on retired seniors' Social Security benefits
* Expanding the child tax credit
* Expanding 529 Education Saving Accounts
* Tax deductions on American-made vehicles
* Tax cuts for American workers
* $10 billion in tax cuts to farmers
* Preventing over 2 million family owned farms from being burdened by the death tax.
* Providing critical funding for rural schools
* Increasing mining of domestic critical minerals to decrease our reliance on foreign adversaries such as China.
* Replenishing the depleted Strategic Petroleum Reserve
* Completing the border wall
* Deporting one million illegal immigrants per year
* 10,000 new immigration officers
* Stopping the flow of fentanyl
* Removing 1.4 million illegal immigrants from Medicaid
* Adding work requirements for Medicaid
* A pay raise for service members
* Ending taxpayer funded gender transition surgeries
* Modernizing 40-year-old Air Traffic Control systems
* Investing in the Golden Dome Defense System
* Expansion of our naval fleet
* Restocking America's arsenal
* Increasing American energy production
* Lowering costs
* AND more!

I am honored to be the first Republican endorsed by President Trump for re-election in 2026 and proud to continue standing with him in support of the America First Agenda.
---
| RIP Sarah Milgrim and Yaron Lischinsky
---
| |
---
| I am heartbroken beyond words by the devastating loss of Sarah Milgrim and Yaron Lischinsky, whose lives were so cruelly and unjustly taken. Sarah and Yaron were two vibrant, beautiful souls--full of promise and love--on the brink of a new chapter together, just days away from their engagement.
This tragedy is unfathomable. Our hearts ache for their families, friends, and all who knew and loved them. May their memory be a blessing, and may those left behind find strength in the light Sarah and Yaron brought to the world.
We all must unite in the fight against the evil of antisemitism. The man accused of fatally shooting these two Israeli Embassy staff members outside a Jewish museum in Washington, D.C., reportedly told police after his arrest, 'I did it for Palestine, I did it for Gaza.' Federal authorities announced charges on Thursday, describing the killings as a targeted act of terrorism. The question remains: will he face the death penalty?

| Thank God we didn't get the shot. It should have been our choice, not the government's. We'll never forget how Fauci kept changing his stance--first, we needed masks, then we didn't, and then we were told to wear two. He promised the vaccine would work, but then we were told we needed a booster, and then another. They expected us to believe that if we didn't wear a mask, we'd get the virus--unless, of course, we were sitting down to eat. Do you remember how we couldn't go to church, but we could still go to a liquor store? Now, apparently, the incidence of myocarditis cases in young people is way up in young people who took the vaccine. This was medical tyranny, plain and simple.

It is an honor to be your representative.
Afterwards I drove to Washington D.C, to cast votes and work hard to help pass the One Big Beautiful Bill Act. President Donald J. Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to deliver on the promises Republicans have made to the American people. That's why advocacy groups and stakeholders across the country are rallying behind it -- urging Congress to act without delay. | It was all about supporting our local heroes at the 13th Annual Rice Volunteer Fire Department Fundraiser -- hosted for the second time at the beautiful Barn at Poor House Farm. Tracy and I had an incredible time connecting one-on-one with so many constituents. A heartfelt thank you to Andy Ellington and his amazing team for everything they do to keep our community safe. We're also grateful for the opportunity to join [Senator Luther Cifers](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fDncFjmEBBg6dVBAkO-CDDrGoHWzsSqTtX4TSOeYWUYH0VD4xP80KfyKmM_LTHD8KFm5LkEEhuvqtJseadWf6JXX6bIoRa3gnj9tR9W__SjhUxtX_r4fm54ms8Xgbs630_HGHoSCTcT9831PYg2VUKW_3lUeqUW1RQyHvPEUMkmnlQngUqBeQC5Zx-uis5RC7tedzHRjAPmtSsTApRq3bdTkg_nMcGESGWLKiPFFGeBEDZsmlTtE3tStVtjtsec7Q_zl2VowMVoFDdB17HaEHwjRZ7jgCp5CtGOvjrGymDyzfC5DiHHzZk4kADC1_DMVVRVpvJZnzeJX9cWjyWeSnfp51dvcMwqUOc7gyscGEXy29urD-XTplhCzipK8utyvn_bfyN6w0gJxhr1XL3tUforAWxKb3RvuASILhXajBfsaH5mDhLyVzEynPyHKqkdKAeh2RhTQoz2TaFgv3vygI-CTjuqXoreeGGqzjo3zuw2aOzLHBitOjuwd5pp-rm1EYWKVlW7hpf3WrLWeUl9ANQ==&c=BlzXlLKEja2EJLBegR44u6mGKixa_84FWr4yTGKVdtuYIPozxDhtjQ==&ch=73ZgnKxleudDW-Q90g-26it1ubNvMeLCS6zQnOgXHvkMgCaLdHj7RQ==) in addressing such a fantastic crowd -- the largest turnout to date! While the final fundraising total is still being calculated, the energy and support were truly inspiring. They raffled off 30 guns, a new record. If you'd like to contribute, please reach out to Andy Ellington at (434) 603-2016. You can follow them on Facebook here: [https://www.facebook.com/RiceVolunteerFireDepartment/](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fDncFjmEBBg6dVBAkO-CDDrGoHWzsSqTtX4TSOeYWUYH0VD4xP80KfyKmM_LTHD8jaJ4g46YZjcziFRhCMI7KRSYCY1yxEITZkie5YtE8QbP2WlPRLyP---f1yPNsSqx8yia3QIWl5eXV1FVsv6Fnj9yeRoxD0d1wGWYJ0kBrhgUuQAwkdekbHuf0Qap-hqp1NgZoHuOuaQLjPROUS4bSIMIdep9puU1WxAosCAzLitZc0GrBsTVGXPVxB7xPcVFh_UjPi6tjxyNj2v6joru08FcqJY6FZQBc3Tgb7NpRAYNvrctcWszyJmOwTmwLMC5-uwD9EV3QUl5aElO1i82MVMFE0rRBNR79A-4wms1foZRcNtb45RGlALjUAIaW3p3IJ_Iv5VSp5MnbkOMg8JHZdACFouArbNErmgVrj96PHvVFgtsQh6xOm1Nz243eckOyrHAJ5EBiIWXTZYJWlUtbscr76RQQQNCkgdAS8Bz608_wuJoeBTVMaOG02V3pmPjlmSJQQ0sMX78JVBFigp6Dg==&c=BlzXlLKEja2EJLBegR44u6mGKixa_84FWr4yTGKVdtuYIPozxDhtjQ==&ch=73ZgnKxleudDW-Q90g-26it1ubNvMeLCS6zQnOgXHvkMgCaLdHj7RQ==)

Senator Luther Cifers' Fundraiser W/ Del. Lee Ware

| We had a fantastic time in Cumberland County, joining Senator Luther Cifers, Delegate Lee Ware, and many other wonderfull folks for a "Fun-Filled Day of Picking, Grinnin', and Winning" at Strawberry Farm.
A heartfelt thank you to Senator Cifers--not only for your warm welcome and the opportunity to address the crowd, but also for your steadfast leadership and commitment to our conservative values in Richmond. Thank you Lee Ware as well for fighting for us in Richmond and thank you for your words of wisdom.
Luther and Lee are absolutely right: teamwork is essential. Together, we can and will push the Republican ticket across the finish line this November!

clean_body: | | | | == | == | Update 24 May, 2025 | | If you see something, say something--and take action. Thankfully, I serve on the House Armed Services Committee (HASC), where I can directly contribute to strengthening our national security. While I'm a strong advocate for limited government, my foremost priority in Congress is ensuring the safety and security of the American people--both at home and abroad. Sadly, the previous administration made decisions that cost American lives and left us more vulnerable. Fortunately, President Trump has made law and order, as well as national security, a top priority. His "peace through strength" policies are making a significant impact both at home and abroad. However stay vigilant, we still have a long way to go to turn things around. | | | What can we do? We can live a life worthy of their sacrifice. On this Memorial Day, we pause to remember and honor the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. While spending time at cookouts or at the beach with family and friends this weekend, take time to honor and remember them with a prayer, a moment of silence, a flag raised high, or a quiet reflection. With much gratitude, we truly are the home of the free because of the brave. | The One Big Beautiful Bill Act Passes the House! | | | America First! I had a busy day all over the Virginia 5th District that started Friday morning when I left my house 5am to wave good morning and engage with folks on their way to work in Albemarle County. My "YES" vote made the difference on the Big Beautiful Bill that passed by just one vote! Thank goodness my predecessor is no longer in DC because he said he would have voted "NO" with the democrats. This would have caused President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill that includes much of the America First agenda to have failed. After the vote, many of my fellow conservative colleagues expressed their gratitude for my congressional run and my support of the bill. EVERY House Democrat united to vote against: Reducing the deficit by $1.6 trillion Funding Trump's Remain in Mexico Policy Lowering costs $13,000 more in take home pay for American families Saving the average American family $1,700 No more $200 fee for suppressors Defunding planned parenthood No tax on tips No tax on overtime Terminating the Green New Scam "EV" chargers and Luxury "clean" vehicles Tax cuts on retired seniors' Social Security benefits Expanding the child tax credit Expanding 529 Education Saving Accounts Tax deductions on American-made vehicles Tax cuts for American workers $10 billion in tax cuts to farmers Preventing over 2 million family owned farms from being burdened by the death tax. Providing critical funding for rural schools Increasing mining of domestic critical minerals to decrease our reliance on foreign adversaries such as China. Replenishing the depleted Strategic Petroleum Reserve Completing the border wall Deporting one million illegal immigrants per year 10,000 new immigration officers Stopping the flow of fentanyl Removing 1.4 million illegal immigrants from Medicaid Adding work requirements for Medicaid A pay raise for service members Ending taxpayer funded gender transition surgeries Modernizing 40-year-old Air Traffic Control systems Investing in the Golden Dome Defense System Expansion of our naval fleet Restocking America's arsenal Increasing American energy production Lowering costs AND more! I am honored to be the first Republican endorsed by President Trump for re-election in 2026 and proud to continue standing with him in support of the America First Agenda. | RIP Sarah Milgrim and Yaron Lischinsky | | | I am heartbroken beyond words by the devastating loss of Sarah Milgrim and Yaron Lischinsky, whose lives were so cruelly and unjustly taken. Sarah and Yaron were two vibrant, beautiful souls--full of promise and love--on the brink of a new chapter together, just days away from their engagement. This tragedy is unfathomable. Our hearts ache for their families, friends, and all who knew and loved them. May their memory be a blessing, and may those left behind find strength in the light Sarah and Yaron brought to the world. We all must unite in the fight against the evil of antisemitism. The man accused of fatally shooting these two Israeli Embassy staff members outside a Jewish museum in Washington, D.C., reportedly told police after his arrest, 'I did it for Palestine, I did it for Gaza.' Federal authorities announced charges on Thursday, describing the killings as a targeted act of terrorism. The question remains: will he face the death penalty? | | | Virginia November Elections | | It's time to lock arms and support fellow veteran and US Marine Winsome Sears for Governor, our entire statewide ticket, and House of Delegates candidates to secure victory this November. ==] | MagAMAZING Week! | | == | MagAMAZING Week! 🏛️ U.S. House Passes One, Big, Beautiful Bill 📵 Trump Signs First Lady-Sponsored Take It Down Act 🍎 MAHA Report 🛡️ Golden Dome 🇿🇦 South Africa Visit ⚛️ Nuclear Renaissance 🎖️ Medals of Sacrifice 💰 Memorial Day Gas Prices-- 20-Year Low Watch Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt's MAGA Minute! == | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Textbook Medical Tyranny | | | Thank God we didn't get the shot. It should have been our choice, not the government's. We'll never forget how Fauci kept changing his stance--first, we needed masks, then we didn't, and then we were told to wear two. He promised the vaccine would work, but then we were told we needed a booster, and then another. They expected us to believe that if we didn't wear a mask, we'd get the virus--unless, of course, we were sitting down to eat. Do you remember how we couldn't go to church, but we could still go to a liquor store? Now, apparently, the incidence of myocarditis cases in young people is way up in young people who took the vaccine. This was medical tyranny, plain and simple. | | | | A Haircut with Jimmie and Vicki in Bedford County | | | Bedford County | | | We discussed Memorial Day, politics, The Big Beautiful Bill, and more over breakfast in Bedford County Friday at County Line & Mini Mall & Cafe. | | | Early Morning Start. | | | ==, Louisa County | | My Monday started right here in Virginia's 5th District -- with a great visit from my friend ==, who stopped by while I was out early in Louisa County waving "Good Morning" to commuters on their way to work. It is an honor to be your representative. Afterwards I drove to Washington D.C, to cast votes and work hard to help pass the One Big Beautiful Bill Act. President Donald J. Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to deliver on the promises Republicans have made to the American people. That's why advocacy groups and stakeholders across the country are rallying behind it -- urging Congress to act without delay. Take a look at what they're saying: == | 13th Annual Rice Volunteer Fire Department Fundraiser | | | | | | | | | | | | | It was all about supporting our local heroes at the 13th Annual Rice Volunteer Fire Department Fundraiser -- hosted for the second time at the beautiful Barn at Poor House Farm. Tracy and I had an incredible time connecting one-on-one with so many constituents. A heartfelt thank you to Andy Ellington and his amazing team for everything they do to keep our community safe. We're also grateful for the opportunity to join == in addressing such a fantastic crowd -- the largest turnout to date! While the final fundraising total is still being calculated, the energy and support were truly inspiring. They raffled off 30 guns, a new record. If you'd like to contribute, please reach out to Andy Ellington at (434) 603-2016. You can follow them on Facebook here: == Senator Luther Cifers' Fundraiser W/ Del. Lee Ware | | | | We had a fantastic time in Cumberland County, joining Senator Luther Cifers, Delegate Lee Ware, and many other wonderfull folks for a "Fun-Filled Day of Picking, Grinnin', and Winning" at Strawberry Farm. A heartfelt thank you to Senator Cifers--not only for your warm welcome and the opportunity to address the crowd, but also for your steadfast leadership and commitment to our conservative values in Richmond. Thank you Lee Ware as well for fighting for us in Richmond and thank you for your words of wisdom. Luther and Lee are absolutely right: teamwork is essential. Together, we can and will push the Republican ticket across the finish line this November! | John McGuire is the 1st Goochland, VA Congressman | Democrats Robbed the American People | == This is another democrat example of America Last, they robbed the American people. Democrats laundered an astounding amount of money before Donald Trump took office. During the 76-day period between Trump's victory and Biden's departure from office, $93 billion was funneled through the Department of Energy (DOE). This massive sum was distributed without oversight to entities with no financial accountability. == | I stand with Israel and the Jewish people. Newsmax, Navy SEAL Carl Higbee Message | == == 2A, Suppressor News | == | == It is our God-given right, enshrined in the Constitution, to protect ourselves and our families. We must remain steadfast in defending our Second Amendment rights, which are constantly under attack from the left. I am a proud co-sponsor of the Hearing Protection Act. ==. Auto Pen Crises | == It is an honor to serve on the == BOMBSHELL: Oversight Committee Chairman Comer is demanding testimony from Biden's doctor and former White House aides over the COVER-UP of President Biden's mental decline and potentially unauthorized autopen use for sweeping executive actions. ==: "The American people deserve to know when Biden's decline began, how far it progressed, and who was making critical decisions on his behalf. Any continued obstruction will be met with swift and decisive action. The American people demand transparency and accountability now." What questions would you ask? == Thank you for your continued support. Together, we'll take our country back. Take care, please tell a friend, and I look forward to seeing you around the district! == == == == | For God and Country, | Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. Anthony's List Endorsed -RJC Endorsed -Mark Levin Endorsed Pro-Life Pro-Gun Pro-Israel American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) America First The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | | | == | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | | | McGuire for Virginia | PO Box 242 | Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 US | | | | | | |

The Democrats are already circling this race. They’ll spend whatever it takes to stop bold, unapologetic America First candidates like Vivek

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._BGMwXLAvGvXjLHkamw)We're finalizing our next TV ad - but we can't afford to leave it sitting on the cutting room floor.
**[To air this ad immediately, we need to fill Team Vivek 's Advertising Fund with $25,000 before the end of the month.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)**
**[If every patriot reading this chipped in just a bit, we 'd hit that target in no time.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-3zCtytJWZcEf3h9pVXg)**[CHIP IN JUST A BIT
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-A)In a race this competitive, getting on TV early - and staying up - is everything. **Ohio is the battleground.**
Just look at the numbers:

* **In 2022,** Tim Ryan raised $55 million trying to beat JD Vance.

* **In 2024,** Sherrod Brown and Far-Left groups poured in over $232 MILLION for just one Senate seat.

We were only able to withstand these tidal waves of cash because of strong America First candidates like Bernie Moreno and JD Vance, who had the grit and early resources to fight back.
Now it's our turn. And the Democrats are already circling this race.
They know what's at stake. And they've shown, time and time again, that they'll spend whatever it takes to stop bold, unapologetic America First candidates like Vivek.
[That's why we're reaching out to patriots like you today, asking for your help to fill our Advertising Fund right now.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)[CHIP IN JUST A BIT
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._D_K-gJqA)If you believe in this mission... if you want to see a Governor who will slash taxes, cut red tape, support President Trump's America First Agenda, and put Ohio families first - this is the moment to act.

Thank you,
**Team Vivek**

# Tuesday, May 27, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1937, the Golden Gate Bridge opened to the public with a grand Pedestrian Day, drawing 200,000 walkers who paid 25 cents to cross what was then the world's longest suspension bridge. [See a historic photo here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFuhCAURb9Gdxp8gtoFi1nUtEmnadJFlwTlwdAgGHjOdP6-mf5C1_fmnOR8ndVZ--Cje9cbSrJJRbyVgESYFeVj20vQW9kP8pF09tYaDFoBA9Ew0cCojPbhrnhtpEUE7GuU3cinnjPeTfVFcm5Yh0wIAA4wLXbt2fjEAHrBLR9F7eWDxgSMHWODGFpYxgV7XMU0DRMsfcUZGk8pt9_JR7qgDfd0xdyuaauDvBDtpepPFcwVzDpT0dGsR6AjY-tScgEfz8dWClIFs0vBYGycJmyW7I3DZkeDhbLXsTH6XsH8fJvPLz8fr2-dsp-nOkuz33wIvgxjxZnbtA9_fvpXtKuE3wAAAP__Ls6BTQ). Forget five-star menus. [America's most beloved eats](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQAL_GdEZmbTApXLyGLq-9Ei14HXyyAdmboPz9KfcLV480I83Xfb5jTHF__MdMjsMx73TVRMxUZi7PfNaEuZ5PjjtjiSF4SjiDgl6qXoKdPcb0nk3jXSAC0g25zppRG2W6sdmcH5bFgLopummtrDVqhT7Yrr-h1taHJrqPTfVgO6WGfmhhsQtpWvtxHEZYtDCKfOSjtN9H3HmjkN7Hi0q7HrlJbmM-q9D_BEwCpuu62ox1I__BAqZuHMxoOwETZipxxSoXqiy3I5GMu-SN5IUpyUKV8Vlw5yrpReUtKyOTgKkpzp9XTCnWwQqjHhlj-q3zn5a9HPwEAAD__wfjgFM) are hiding in plain sight, from strip mall Thai to a burger joint so good that the town built a parking garage to keep it standing. Got a favorite hole-in-the-wall haunt we should know about? Let us know by replying to this email. Today's edition is shorter than usual so our team can spend Memorial Day with their families. Thanks for reading--full coverage returns tomorrow! ## Trump Slams Putin Over Ukraine Strikes
President Trump called [Vladimir Putin “absolutely CRAZY”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQxfGnMV2QGdvgW7i4DV223RLZZpxMNHwIJqC8_Yp9ha2P9JPO__s-3CMxzY-vOGGQsgwznjujCG6DbO9p3TlO-_oWmiVuVMqIHAfQ4G7a3aAbxkj8GWw1hoIIaCoMTWe9sdo2vnoGZ_M_naEdvbOp-FJcMjG3XYOlSbGBisKlaQddo3Xr2hpSl9Bgdt63HpJRVuNIsmz1a6FZnlj4sxy41XmZKg5PkXVX5r-CXkF_nmedUr42Bf11RkHPdKCCPh-P9aWNR_5ItYVxPYmZ9rZTVj-mSPwryp8yHAF-AgAA__9C_XGQ) after Russia launched its biggest drone and missile barrage on Ukraine since the war began. Over the weekend, Moscow fired 355 drones and nine missiles in a single night, killing at least 12 people. Ukraine claims to have intercepted most of the attack, but damage to infrastructure and rising civilian tolls are mounting. The Kremlin [called the response "emotional overload,"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQxfGnMR2RGX_gxsVt6HLbLZHB4zC7xkZmkihvv0peYesj_aXf-brO10CZyu1_2NFzqnPB55mRGdvM7b4fZw77edyZCodGKUXMYQYJppemh3GOgfJr1l30CRFQdeiHUTulpR5ct3llQCebzIqokos2LHIFHeRg1mGJFjvy75o0MA5SWmMvsIwLKlyNc9bBooSWGIlru3xXKrxhyq_6wHZZ695lvzEfp1D_BEwCJt5wo5zfm4DpqJnWl4CJCmMrgamWkAVMRg3OKN1_iP2H199_WqCC_TO0nrGcVIuAqWs-Hk_KmU47Ci1ve6BPvuM__fXw8BsAAP__8LmAmg) and thanked Trump for his role in kickstarting peace talks, though little progress has been made. German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said Western allies will now allow Ukraine to strike as deep into Russia as it can, removing a ban on weapon ranges. Zelensky again called for tougher sanctions and real consequences for Moscow.
## Duck Dynasty's Phil Robertson Dies
_Duck Dynasty_ star Phil Robertson [died this weekend at 79](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb_G3ogwYCADQ5ds6drRephHTIuNBS-J_PeV-wsdr650jnS-7tMdUk7b4xNWdBTLtOG7ZSTCOlF9rnvLsLb9SWkjqCnGgBkmwcXI-MiEmQKkfEyqDy4iCpQ9usEoKxVXg-0XBzJGK6zxXgcZpZklRG0U9362PGrbJ3fS-CjMwLke9UV441HiPFqrrfCyUxxDolIv3yVttGDMR3lhvcxl7bNbiPbWyY9O3Dpx27HsGc_rHEvKrBaPlVrZWEAILDznHxaODRodrBFU9obGzJUNg1GDVte-urC_U86padMp_lgh5T8X_SvQy4nfAAAA__9k9nqX), six months after the family announced he had been diagnosed with Alzheimer’s disease. Robertson was famous for founding the Duck Commander hunting company, which became the focus of the hugely popular _Duck Dynasty_ family reality show on the A&E cable network. The series ended in 2017 after 11 seasons, having spawned a variety of spinoffs. The show featured his wife, Kay, and their three sons as they ran their hunting business. A&E announced in January that the show would return to the network as _Duck Dynasty: The Revival_. clean_body: President Trump called after Russia launched its biggest drone and missile barrage on Ukraine since the war began. | | | | | | Tuesday, May 27, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1937, the Golden Gate Bridge opened to the public with a grand Pedestrian Day, drawing 200,000 walkers who paid 25 cents to cross what was then the world's longest suspension bridge. . Forget five-star menus. are hiding in plain sight, from strip mall Thai to a burger joint so good that the town built a parking garage to keep it standing. Got a favorite hole-in-the-wall haunt we should know about? Let us know by replying to this email. Today's edition is shorter than usual so our team can spend Memorial Day with their families. Thanks for reading--full coverage returns tomorrow! We're sponsored today by , offering an investment opportunity for all movie lovers. Don't feel like reading The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily--watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Trump Slams Putin Over Ukraine Strikes President Trump called after Russia launched its biggest drone and missile barrage on Ukraine since the war began. Over the weekend, Moscow fired 355 drones and nine missiles in a single night, killing at least 12 people. Ukraine claims to have intercepted most of the attack, but damage to infrastructure and rising civilian tolls are mounting. The Kremlin and thanked Trump for his role in kickstarting peace talks, though little progress has been made. German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said Western allies will now allow Ukraine to strike as deep into Russia as it can, removing a ban on weapon ranges. Zelensky again called for tougher sanctions and real consequences for Moscow. Duck Dynasty's Phil Robertson Dies Duck Dynasty star Phil Robertson , six months after the family announced he had been diagnosed with Alzheimer’s disease. Robertson was famous for founding the Duck Commander hunting company, which became the focus of the hugely popular Duck Dynasty family reality show on the A&E cable network. The series ended in 2017 after 11 seasons, having spawned a variety of spinoffs. The show featured his wife, Kay, and their three sons as they ran their hunting business. A&E announced in January that the show would return to the network as Duck Dynasty: The Revival. List: Best Hole-in-the-Wall in Each State From lobster rolls in a Maine shack to Thai curry in a Kansas strip mall and street tacos in Montana, every state has a . Missouri's pick is in North Kansas City, where the grass-fed burgers are simple, local, and loaded with love. Over in Iowa, in the Alley has been dishing out loose-meat sandwiches since 1936--so treasured, the city built a parking garage around it just to keep it standing. These unassuming spots may not look like much from the curb, but inside, they're serving up bold flavors, big portions, and decades of hometown pride. name: Troy Downing
subject: Honored to receive President Trump’s endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
President Trump has given me his complete and total endorsement. I'm honored and ready to keep fighting for America. Will you stand with us?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-TNp8oLWPrvjYb3oCCQ) Peter,
I’m honored to share that President Donald J. Trump has given me his complete and total endorsement for re-election: [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) **Together, we’re standing strong to:**
🇺🇸 _Defend the Second Amendment_ 🇺🇸 _Secure our Southern Border_ 🇺🇸 _Champion American Energy dominance_ 🇺🇸 _Support our farmers, ranchers, and veterans_ 🇺🇸 _Restore peace through strength_
_But our work is far from finished._
Now more than ever, we need conservative fighters to push back against the radical Left and keep our America First momentum going.
[If you’re still in this fight, I’m humbly asking you to join President Trump by endorsing my re-election campaign today:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-69E18OR3Tfb2v8F8Q) [ ENDORSE TROY DOWNING FOR RE-ELECTION
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) With your support, we’ll finish what we started and _Make America Great Again._
Thank you for your loyal support, [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) **Troy Downing** U.S. Congressman, Montana’s Second District Combat Veteran | America First Conservative | | |

My name is Denise Powell, and I’m the Democrat running to flip Nebraska’s 2nd Congressional District. This is a highly competitive race that my opponent Don Bacon won by less than 2 points in 2024. In fact, NE-02 is one of the few districts where both Kamala Harris and a Republican Congressman won. [The path to a Democratic majority in Congress runs through NE-02, but we have to start now. Want to be a part of this groundswell movement to flip this district from red to blue? Split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign now:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43fd011a-84be-4c98-9356-58cd8db8a1e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [CHIP IN](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c61067b-fd12-4156-ae6c-80bd75fa8e7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here’s what you should know about me: I’m a mom to two kids (and two dogs!), a small business owner, and an active community leader. That’s why, after Donald Trump was elected, I worked to organize our community around electing everyday, common sense candidates up and down the ballot through the organization I co-founded, Women Who Run. But our neighbors are struggling to make ends meet right now and there’s no relief in sight. Donald Trump and unelected billionaire Elon Musk are causing costs to skyrocket, and we’re all feeling the pain at the grocery store, gas station and everywhere else. They’re tearing apart the Department of Education, slashing critical federal programs, and threatening Social Security and Medicaid...all to create more tax loopholes for billionaires. And where is Congressman Don Bacon? He says one thing to the news cameras and then goes to D.C. and votes against our best interests time and time again. His time is up, and I’m running for Congress now because enough is enough! [Now is when it counts, so if you want to be one of my founding supporters, I’d be so grateful! Just $10, $20, or whatever you can give would help contribute to this powerful momentum to flip NE-02. Split a donation between myself and Blue Amp Action:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b6093f9-8954-4e4f-a9b2-9f8a9ec0b136/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I have a long track record of fighting tough fights. When Nebraska public schools were under threat I worked with parents, teachers, and organizers to protect and keep taxpayer money in our public schools. When extremists tried to pass a total abortion ban in my state, I organized physicians, patients, and community members to help successfully stop it. With your support, I’ll take your stories and perspectives to Congress and fight for you, just like I’ve been fighting for my neighbors for over fifteen years. My husband and I made up a Powell Family Pledge when our kids were little: “I promise to always be brave, tell the truth, never give up, and be kind to others.” Our country’s future is hanging in the balance and the world is an uncertain place for so many. Now is the time to step up and do something about it. Now is the time to be brave. [Will you donate any amount to Blue Amp Action and my campaign to help me flip NE-02 blue, fire Don Bacon, and get to work fighting for everyone as your next Congresswoman?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T09bb1b26-7f21-43a3-87e0-4c13d652dea5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1bef53a1-d82c-4ad8-b2c5-3c5b1a3c468b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

It was one of the most powerful tornadoes in Texas history, with wind speeds over 260 mph. Today's edition is slightly abbreviated so that our writers and editors could spend time with their families yesterday. We will return with a full edition tomorrow. ## Patrick Priorities Passed
The Texas Legislature recently approved several bills that Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick, who presides over the Senate, [designated as priority issues](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdIPssYGkoNiG7m67JXLwQEbr2MieCzdvv0qUN9jmVEfn5_vzNX95jpy23_5Bo_yseU501kgiVObdS-Hl7144FxamuvtaKXieUWMHugMc5uA5PmfXhPGmw9U0NJrBXayz_fXa3EdH_cVfcF0uNJi1W1aHHm-DNTerA3a24fEVpjscjNHG2jZg0IS97kzvrrp3ymkKLLm0ciehH1_X-MwHlXbJjyaOd5G9KvtL4aRwOs-zjbLlo31b2y0fCqdXhcJJW4WTeUkU2PIBwSf4vASfUv5OC1WotOQUoOTvFCCvIHkHp-HD4Qk3jrHCmgvIneDNItLGNXrhg6BSrZyTwqkpY9hPjpFrPyint4fn-J4t_wf7GPFfAAAA__8UEpQd) at the beginning of the session. Earlier this month, lawmakers approved a constitutional amendment that establishes the Dementia Prevention and Research Institute of Texas and [allocates $3 billion in funding](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb-OpDAMh58mdBkFQ2ApKK6h22uvRJ7EDNblD0rM7M7bn5hiX-Aa6yfr02db_vO5fiIHTo_fGGmW7y2vib5qIBEq64FS2P09CufCwlQPrJU88goGrDZWw7h65PBa-8bPd-OntqG5HfuPru-GaWr2Ge24jX5Dbz1uHshZ491g7TRs948OfMPzJTMWxrY1bdfdPHhDMBjbDv1khl71hjxLLjfZSegb6xZe-Unl5nJswryLHFV1vxQsChaXYzwTy4vjgU4uRsGCZxVOCpaaT9m1oyQFg_5pv7U60INrQDkLKViutRQs5l3gB9rzWUnH_KSqJWtXCIV0d9dVrlDOpD1FSsKoj0LPK-WkC1XC4nbNqQrLKdeIpsz--OIQuA6j6s0jIof3WfJ_z3jO8C8AAP__kkCitQ) for the effort. The measure will go before voters in November. Last Tuesday, the House signed off on a measure to [establish a state cryptocurrency reserve](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdEb-Ay6FizR0d9vdDjn23GQUg1nPJIS3X5FX2OqTZqRP55zf3_N3wIzr7VdYwPP7p8wr7JSBGeq8Ba4YH1vFUpERaAtEkALORplOqk6aYU4B8zG7JvmrSqNuwOvBfVln-3Fs7l5fY6eSc3q0NvUmKuOcM2DHaJP90qpBf8pUZwatlba2TSYpML3qdO9G1TvhFCTkUlu-A8M70E8-ygtqG8vSZH9n3kjYizCTMNO-7-1C6_kTZoJVPkmYaSkrHCdDfQCfl49IfgqRXCDQs4LkImOFwCCDJD4Z67FxkRUI6gtkIHlFjgVXyWUjqVX3EGYKVV4uekrvv3-a6tO2Y85I_SCcui0B8ycp_9--L2_-BQAA__8AIJBC). Senate Bill 21 doesn’t specify an initial deposit amount for the reserve, but that figure could be determined in the coming days as the state budget is finalized. And last Thursday, the House unanimously passed Senate Bill 20, which [bans AI-generated child pornography](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdI7swQZSuEhD97ZbbYmGeIDRMzayveHl71fkF7a70pWuzrl_vqYv5MBx_YU7ufqzpCnSWQLVSnk6sGZ-fh-ZU-bKVA4shTzyBAqsVFZCP3nk8J5M492s_F035HRvhta03f3ebK5fLAx2gKG3YNQCw6zVoK3WpvVzq4eG3TWmLPRaK922Nw9eEXTK6s7cVWeEUeS5pnyrG1X6wbKEd3pRvj3T3gS31XoU0T4EjALG8zxve4lXJ2CkKP8WAeMlJWD85BmjTFEiy5UiZazk5XPj4OWRckxrxmN7yz29qMiaTsxeLhwxyMseV5Ic5QdDwIhZPh56pO_-d5OdP04OgUvXC6PWHTl8EOv_Hfty8C8AAP__SJKNIA). "_As Texas enters the digital age, our state must be very careful about our approach to artificial intelligence_ ,_"_ Patrick said in a March statement.
## Charter School Adopts Gun Detection AI Program
Ki Charter is the [first charter school system in Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3O4yAQheGrsbuJAP_FBcU26b5tt7QmZjCjYGPBbEjufpXcwtZHenT0_vlZfpAjH9tv3MnKy6floFoiiVBeTpTM6-PMnDILUzmxFHLIi1FmADWAmRaHHN9L3zp7V27WLVk99deu78Z5boO99uo-e3VFP9y90uS10pO-0zx2OA2Tbtl-MDWYSWulu-7ijFNkRjXosZ_V2De9IseS8kUCCb2w-PhOT8qXNe1ttEHkLE33qzG3xtxqrZfHC4_P2JhbkXTCjqVACSkJH1tpzO2rwBowC2Uoa0gpgqMzpjcfGyBDSV4qZgIJKLDiAY6EVoHt71HgyQgr7pQRPJGDkCqwQE358eHbbN1ZOUYu49T0atuR4_et_F_jpzX_AgAA__9JcJRO) to use ZeroEyes, an AI-powered software designed to detect guns through existing surveillance cameras. The organization, which serves over 6,500 students across eight campuses, rolled out the technology last week. ZeroEyes uses an algorithm that alerts human monitors at a central 24/7 command center when it detects firearms. The monitors then determine whether the threat is legitimate and notify school officials and local law enforcement, [all within seconds](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAUhJ9GMyz-kYBgE7O76YYWF456anCwgB3Hffot5xVu1sFXXd3fn6_5y2PC5_rb7-Dae8nzE86aoDUo8-FbwfA4CuaCDaEevlaIHmdOuSJUEW7m6DFds-yj-6bRsh4cM3IUUmhr-81pzbg3fPkOwcQQjFTWC84Xa2EEoVmP7i6jihvGKBNiiDxS4JoqpqWlWnaSQsSWy9A2aPD2dUlXfkEZQt775LbWjtqJXx2fOj6d5zlUCH8LtgufSy47xBvs-HQ_6_j0D0qGCyrxSBqEjXxwqOSBJGy-NCgkZKJGZcjq78i0oNJaoQRZ_cCMNCM1Vqtha3vqi4vHiSlh1aaTdN09ps-09jOhL8f_BwAA__-1uIjv). The company was [founded by a group of Navy SEALs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz79uwyAQgPGnwVsiOLAdBoYu3tK1I7qYc3IqCRZc_rhPX6Wv0PmTftL3dYxH5My38ydeKchrKfFGz5ZJhGpcUSrP32vlUlmY2oqtUUKOoKHf6X4HY0zIeYuuS-GkkzcdBTO6g3V28L67BEvjgeaDQW2RaABvF9c7XAyBhwXmjsMb0z2Mxmhj7T5B0gSD7s3gvB6ccpoSS6l7uZDQC9uSt_Kgup_LtcvhIrI2ZT8UTAqmH6qFNmrvqGDCU7nL7t4UTF0NaX1yztyGUTl9viLnP0P-d_4I8BsAAP__k6ls1g) in response to the 2018 Parkland shooting. Last year, the technology alerted authorities to a potential threat from three individuals carrying AK-47s at a Texas elementary school. ZeroEyes charges between $20 and $60 per camera to deploy its software, and it has staff to help potential clients identify and apply for grants.

Charter School Adopts Gun Detection AI Program Ki Charter is the to use ZeroEyes, an AI-powered software designed to detect guns through existing surveillance cameras. The organization, which serves over 6,500 students across eight campuses, rolled out the technology last week. ZeroEyes uses an algorithm that alerts human monitors at a central 24/7 command center when it detects firearms. The monitors then determine whether the threat is legitimate and notify school officials and local law enforcement, . The company was in response to the 2018 Parkland shooting. Last year, the technology alerted authorities to a potential threat from three individuals carrying AK-47s at a Texas elementary school. name: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Citizen Cosponors needed ASAP
body:
The Protect Children’s Innocence Act is moving forward

| | | | |
---
Fellow patriot,
Since day one, I’ve been fighting tooth and nail to protect America’s children from the radical, dangerous transgender agenda that’s targeting their innocence.
My Protect Children’s Innocence Act is a bold stand to stop the barbaric practice of so-called “gender-affirming care” that mutilates and harms our kids with irreversible surgeries, puberty blockers, and hormone treatments. **This is child abuse, plain and simple, and** **_[with your help we’re going to put an end to it](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awmd/?__vbtrk=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
**_[I’m calling on YOU to join me as a Citizen Cosponsor of this critical legislation.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awmd/?__vbtrk=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
[COSPONSOR NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awmd/?__vbtrk=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Our children are under attack - taken from loving parents, pressured into life-altering decisions, and told to reject their God-given identity. We cannot sit idly by while the left pushes this evil on our kids.
The Protect Children’s Innocence Act will:
* **Make it a felony** to perform genital mutilation or chemical castration on minors.
* **Ban federal funds** , including Medicaid, from supporting these procedures.
* **Protect kids** from decisions they’re too young to make—decisions they’ll regret for the rest of their lives.

**_[I’ve got 45 cosponsors in Congress, but I need YOU to stand with me to show Washington the American people demand action](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awmd/?__vbtrk=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[COSPONSOR NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awmd/?__vbtrk=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_In Liberty,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awmd/?__vbtrk=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awmd/?__vbtrk=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awme/?__vbtrk=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMTg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=292188&trkid=704820309&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

| Friend
Last week, House Republicans passed their new spending bill that they are calling "One Big Beautiful Bill." And this bill is hideous.
There is no putting lipstick on this pig, this bill sucks. Stripping away healthcare from millions, snatching food from the mouths of the hungry, and cutting taxes for some of the wealthiest people in the history of humanity.

This isn't America. While the vast majority of Americans disagree with this bill, Trump moves ahead - confident that his fascist ambitions will prevail. With every major cut to the safety nets that Democrats once fought so hard for, our country devolves into chaos. Endless foreign wars, poor healthcare, and lawless billionaires.
We are fed up. From the shocking overperformance of Dems in the FL special elections to the New York state senate special election that saw a massive 91 point swing towards Democrats - working-class Americans are showing up at record breaking numbers to the polls to fight back.
And it's because of work like ours that there may be hope that the worst parts of this bill will never come to pass. To become law, the bill now needs to pass in the Senate - and several GOP Senators are holding their support for the budget, terrified of the backlash they will receive from their voters if they support it.
National Ground Game PAC is already making a difference - driving historic voter turnout in deep-red districts in the FL special elections and scaring Republicans shitless. With your help, we can make an impact in upcoming special elections and lay the groundwork for a massive blue wave in '26.

While the vast majority of Americans disagree with this bill, Trump moves ahead - confident that his fascist ambitions will prevail. With every major cut to the safety nets that Democrats once fought so hard for, our country devolves into chaos. Endless foreign wars, poor healthcare, and lawless billionaires. We are fed up. name: Lily Tang Williams for Congress
subject: Honor Our Fallen Heroes on Memorial Day
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/honor-our-fallen-heroes-on-memorial-day-18044392?e=c338950e03)
---
| |
---
| |
# Honor Our Fallen Heroes on Memorial Day
Our freedom is not free, so many had made ultimate sacrifice for it. Look at this heartbroken picture. We shall never forget our fallen heroes and their families.

We should not engage in endless foreign wars. War should be a last resort after exhausting all other options. Here is my foreign policy statement on my website: [Issues - Lily Tang Williams for Congress](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=300eea954a&e=c338950e03)

John and I paid our respect to his ancestors buried in Charlestown NH.
His mothers’ side family came to US on the Mayflower. Later at the start of the French and Indian War, one of his relatives, Susannah Willard Johnston was sheltering at Fort #4 in Charlestown New Hampshire when kidnapped by an Abenaki war party allied with the French. On a forced march to Quebec to be sold to the French, she delivered a baby, which she named Elizabeth Captive Johnson. Years later she wrote of her experience and published a book about her experience, [which you learn about here](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=d3d6270077&e=c338950e03).

Susannah's husband James Johnston and family fought in the revolutionary war. Each year before Memorial Day, Charlestown puts a flag and medallion on each soldier’s grave who fought in the revolutionary war to honor our heroes.
My mother-in-law is a member of Daughters of Revolution (DAR). What a family I married into!

[Honor the Heroes of the American Revolution](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=1b4f0b4997&e=c338950e03)

**Coming Up**

I will be traveling to FL from June 1 to 14, covering Jacksonville, Palm Beach, Ft. Lauderdale areas. Please reply to this email if you would like to meet up or have an event for me to attend.

[Please Donate Here](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=413e970bd2&e=c338950e03)

Thanks!

# Un-Silenced in D.C.
---
| |
---
| TFVC President Rebecca Hardy had a front row seat in D.C. last week for the **U.S. Senate hearing** on federal agency collusion to suppress information on COVID-19 side effects. The hearing was hosted by one of America’s most outspoken critics of the COVID response, [Sen. Ron Johnson](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU1NTU0MjY1NzMxOTU3OTQ2LFwiclwiOjE1NTU1NDMxNzIxMDc0ODA5OX0iLCJzIjoiZjQyNWU0NDMyMDA3NmJiOSJ9) (R-WI). Among the witnesses was Dr. Joel Wallskog, co-founder of React19, who captured the plight of the vaccine-injured in a **single devastating word** : [_abandonment_](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU1NTU0MjY1NzM3MjAwODI3LFwiclwiOjE1NTU1NDMxNzIxMDc0ODA5OX0iLCJzIjoiOGUzOTVmNzlkOGZiZGRjNCJ9). Other expert witnesses included [Dr. Peter McCullough](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU1NTU0MjY1NzQzNDkyMjg0LFwiclwiOjE1NTU1NDMxNzIxMDc0ODA5OX0iLCJzIjoiYzUzZjQ2NjhmMTU4NDM2NSJ9), [Dr. Jordan Vaughn](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU1NTU0MjY1NzQ3Njg2NTg5LFwiclwiOjE1NTU1NDMxNzIxMDc0ODA5OX0iLCJzIjoiYjFlNmZiNTIxMDQzYzlkNyJ9), [Dr. James Thorp](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU1NTU0MjY1NzUxODgwODk0LFwiclwiOjE1NTU1NDMxNzIxMDc0ODA5OX0iLCJzIjoiYzMyZTI0MWFiNTdhOWYwYyJ9), and attorney Aaron Siri, all of whom delivered compelling, data-driven testimonies revealing the widespread risks associated with COVID-19 mRNA vaccines and the government's failure to release critical safety signals.[__](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU1NTU0MjY1NzU2MDc1MTk5LFwiclwiOjE1NTU1NDMxNzIxMDc0ODA5OX0iLCJzIjoiMmI4YzMwMjIwZTkwMGRhYSJ9) The hearing also underscored a **stark political divide**. Sen. Richard Blumenthal (D-Conn.) doubled down on the narrative that COVID-19 vaccines have saved millions of lives, responding with visible hostility when confronted with evidence that vaccine risks may have been hidden. In a [striking exchange](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU1NTU0MjY1NzYxMzE4MDgwLFwiclwiOjE1NTU1NDMxNzIxMDc0ODA5OX0iLCJzIjoiNjE3YTkyMmY0NjIzODRkYiJ9), Siri directly challenged Blumenthal, pointing out that the so-called “study” the Senator cited to support his claims was, in fact, **merely a blog**. The hearing was followed by a **congressional screening** of the documentary _[Follow the Silenced](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU1NTU0MjY1NzY1NTEyMzg1LFwiclwiOjE1NTU1NDMxNzIxMDc0ODA5OX0iLCJzIjoiOTFhNDdlYzU5MGZiOWUwNyJ9)_. The film received a moving standing ovation from a room filled with high-level Executive, Congressional, and Senatorial staffers. There is both an urgency and growing momentum behind those seeking **truth and justice**. The voices of the vaccine-injured and silenced professionals must be honored, and **TFVC’s commitment to the mission of amplifying these voices is unwavering**.

# Full Passage
| Several medical liberty bills are heading to the Governor's desk and, with 7 days remaining in Session, more are on the threshold!
---
| |
---
| | |
---
## SJR 34
The constitutional amendment protecting the right of parents to control the upbringing of their children will now be on the November ballot for approval!
| |
---
## SB 269
SB 269 has passed with an overwhelming majority of members voting in favor of requiring Texas physicians to report vaccine side effects to VAERS.
|
---
| |
---
### HB 4076
HB 4076 has passed both chambers! Organ transplant patients will soon be protected from organ denial based on vaccination status.
| |
---
### HB 4535
HB 4535 would require doctors to provide truthful information about the COVID injections and how to report side effects to VAERS.
| |
---
### HB 1586
HB 1586 would allow Texans to print Reasons of Conscience vaccine exemptions from home, streamlining the process.
