clean_body: | | TFVC on Capitol Hill | | | | | | Un-Silenced in D.C. | | | TFVC President Rebecca Hardy had a front row seat in D.C. last week for the U.S. Senate hearing on federal agency collusion to suppress information on COVID-19 side effects. The hearing was hosted by one of America’s most outspoken critics of the COVID response, (R-WI). Among the witnesses was Dr. Joel Wallskog, co-founder of React19, who captured the plight of the vaccine-injured in a single devastating word : . Other expert witnesses included , , , and attorney Aaron Siri, all of whom delivered compelling, data-driven testimonies revealing the widespread risks associated with COVID-19 mRNA vaccines and the government's failure to release critical safety signals. The hearing also underscored a stark political divide. Sen. Richard Blumenthal (D-Conn.) doubled down on the narrative that COVID-19 vaccines have saved millions of lives, responding with visible hostility when confronted with evidence that vaccine risks may have been hidden. In a , Siri directly challenged Blumenthal, pointing out that the so-called “study” the Senator cited to support his claims was, in fact, merely a blog. The hearing was followed by a congressional screening of the documentary . The film received a moving standing ovation from a room filled with high-level Executive, Congressional, and Senatorial staffers. There is both an urgency and growing momentum behind those seeking truth and justice. The voices of the vaccine-injured and silenced professionals must be honored, and TFVC’s commitment to the mission of amplifying these voices is unwavering. | | | | | | News | | | | | | Action Alert: Blood Donation and DNA Bills | If you missed yesterday's Action Alert, it's not too late to make your voice heard on SB 125 and SB 315! This isn’t a conspiracy theory. It’s receipts. Organ transplant patients will soon be protected from organ denial based on vaccination status. | | HB 4535 HB 4535 would require doctors to provide truthful information about the COVID injections and how to report side effects to VAERS. | | HB 1586 HB 1586 would allow Texans to print Reasons of Conscience vaccine exemptions from home, streamlining the process. | Committee Hearings | TFVC Political Director Michelle Evans continued to push more good bills last week. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | TFVC In Action | | | | | | Bandera Watch Party | Team TFVC and medical liberty advocates packed the house at the Bandera watch party for the award-winning documentary Follow The Silenced last week. name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Here’s why Trump wants to shut down actBlue
body:
We thought it important to take a moment to explain what these messages mean to Democrats' success.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=626%2E2563979%2EDzN2yd)

We've sent a few fundraising emails in the lead-up to the Democratic National Committee's FEC fundraising deadline, so we thought it important to take a moment to explain what these messages mean to Democrats' success.
First, small-dollar, individual fundraising is much more important for Democrats than it is for Republicans. And if you needed any evidence of that, just look at Donald Trump's efforts to shut down ActBlue.
That is how we fund our campaigns and our work, and emails like this are the single greatest source of the donations we receive.
So why is this deadline important?
When this deadline ends, the DNC is legally required to report what they've raised. Republicans and the press will see what the DNC raised each day, and how many donations they received.
And what we need to show them is the overwhelming grassroots opposition to Trump's bill passed in the House. And we need to do it before the Senate votes, and before the House votes one last time for final passage.
So when you see Republicans potentially balk at the bill for fear of being held accountable -- or when you see Democrats defeat Republicans who do vote for the bill ... it's donations in response to emails like this that make it possible.
[**So if stopping Trump's bill and defeating Republicans who vote for it while electing Democrats across the country is important to you, Kamala Harris is asking you to donate $5, $50 or whatever you can afford today. The amount isn't as important as the number of donations.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250527-1B&refcode2=626_2563979_DzN2yd&akid=626%2E2563979%2EDzN2yd)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Michael Finch
subject: Radical Son
body:
If you’ve ever read or heard David Horowitz’s work, then you already know: He wasn’t afraid to tell the truth.

| | |
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zhpact8oe9hsvbjvat6dnlhpohinpcgcpj9od4v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,By now you may have heard that David Horowitz passed away recently. **If you’ve ever read or heard David Horowitz’s work, then you already know: He wasn’t afraid to tell the truth.** **[And today, I want to tell you how you can arm yourself with the truth—in David’s own words—and help us keep his legacy alive for generations to come.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zuk5v6r3qvotddjhe5nuae8eb5sq87uh92suf5j0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)** You see, David changed the trajectory of the conservative movement. As Charlie Kirk of Turning Point USA put it: **“David didn’t just write. He debated. He showed up. He walked into hostile auditoriums and faced down Marxist professors, Islamist apologists, and race hustlers – armed only with truth, moral clarity, and a sharp tongue.”** Now that David is gone, it’s up to all of us to carry on his fight. And _his_ Freedom Center is doing exactly that. To supercharge our efforts, to arm you with the truth, and most especially to honor his legacy, today [**I want to send you a copy of the book that changed everything:** **Radical Son: A Generational Odyssey.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8jh52225temoadk0kb16b5thfkkvjakq1jjvp38_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)
---
| | This is David’s story — from his Marxist upbringing...To his friendship with Huey Newton of the Black Panthers...To the brutal murder that shattered his illusions and opened his eyes to the radical Left’s true nature. Many conservatives call this book _monumental,_ _formative,_ and _one of the most important books a conservative American could ever read._ [**That’s why I want to give you a copy.****All I ask is that you help us keep David’s mission alive by making a tax-deductible donation of $60 or more.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ziulg8uuhh9q2alh3p7grp33jn7hdvc5d03ravq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgkcbe1qvnfn38ge0do1ir799aqcevd1i45pt528_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)
---
| | [ **CLAIM YOUR COPY** ](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3d20025qv4gkohmpcsqp8res7gq31oe1spf9cl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)
---
If you can give $100 or more, I’ll send you two copies — one for you, and one to give as a gift to someone who needs to hear David’s warning. Friend, my name is Daniel Greenfield and I am the new CEO of the David Horowitz Freedom Center.It was the honor of my life to work so closely with David for years, fighting for his most critical legacy, the David Horowitz Freedom Center. David used to say that his Freedom Center “isn’t a think tank; it’s a battle tank.” And with the help of patriots like you, over the decades this battle tank has become powerful weapon against the left.**But my friend, your support today is critical if we’re going to keep fighting David’s battle—because the radical Left isn’t backing down.** In fact, mere days after David’s passing, the liberal media took to disrespectful smears of his life’s work.A columnist at the _New York Times_ sneered that David “executed a dizzying transit from the extreme left to the extreme right.” And the _Los Angeles Times_ mocked him as a “raspy-voiced provocateur” who relied on “straw man arguments so much that I’m sure the Scarecrow from _The Wizard of Oz_ is wondering where his royalties are.”**Attacks like these are why the Freedom Center’s battle is far from over.** We must take up the torch of David Horowitz’s legacy and continue his fight because the radical Left is only growing more emboldened and more powerful.They encourage college students to violently protest on behalf of murderous Hamas terrorists...They defend criminals who have no respect for our nation’s laws and blame their illegal behavior on “racism”... They scream from the rooftops that we all must accept “transgender” predators and rapists for the sake of “inclusion”...**David saw it all coming. Decades ago.** **[You’ll get an insider look into his realization as you read _Radical Son._](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zid3qare6u7p8rli3qrdfof2rrqdmjrl7u5rlhc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)** As David understood, the radical Left is following the same march to Communism that the former Soviet Union did. And I truly believe it’s only because of David’s work that the modern-day conservative movement is finally fighting the right battle.This isn’t a misunderstanding. This isn’t a disagreement.**This is about stopping the radical Left from DESTROYING AMERICA.** Most conservatives are too scared or too weak to say it. But the Freedom Center isn’t:**Leftists are the extremists. They’re the traitors. They’re the insurrectionists.** The Freedom Center has been at the forefront of this battle — long before the rest of the conservative movement caught on to what the radical Left is doing to our country.And because of how effective we’ve been, we’ve paid the price:
---
* Vimeo and YouTube censored and blocked us from uploading our videos to their websites.
* Left-wing extremists at the Southern Poverty Law Center convinced MasterCard to shut off our credit card processing (thank goodness it’s back on now)...
* Long-time business partners and venues cut our contracts out of the blue.

---
**But we’ve survived because of brave patriotic Americans who stood with us.** People who _know_ what David stood for.
People who _believe_ in the mission.
People who are ready to keep fighting — even now. **[And if I’m describing YOU, then I hope you’ll stand with us today by making a tax-deductible donation of $60 or more.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z9f3g0b497dj39nrhuk5cihvoj2mec62cvjreq78_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)** And if you can send back an extra-generous renewal donation of $100 or more, I will send you _two_ copies of this book – one for you, and one for you to give as a gift.This book has changed the face of our conservative movement. So perhaps you have a child, grandchild, friend, or neighbor you could give your second copy to. I truly believe that David’s story is going to continue to change lives – and fuel the fire of our conservative movement for decades to come.That’s exactly what we’re focusing on at the Freedom Center.We have never been more determined to expose the radical Left...Untangle their dark web of money... Upend their propaganda and lies...**And smash their plot to destroy our country.** David’s legacy must be fought for. The Freedom Center is taking up his torch. **[But I need your help to keep his fight going.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjr845rtomvsr4maojemot0uhb9816nk4i6qrlng_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)** Thank you in advance for standing with us.
---
For freedom,
---
**Daniel Greenfield** CEO, David Horowitz Freedom Center
---
P.S. David’s fight is far from over. Everything he predicted over the past 40 years has come true – from the Left encouraging college students to protest on behalf of terrorists... to defending criminals who have no respect for our nation’s laws... to screaming that we must accept “transgender” predators for the sake of “inclusion”... _Radical Son_ explains how we got here... and what comes next. **[Please make a generous donation of $60 or more to support the Freedom Center — and I’ll send you a copy of this landmark book.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zs0ffc4u1qmhbjcmbkbeq5nn9dr9crsp4q69flv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)**
---
[ **CLAIM YOUR COPY** ](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zabtutkjppk46s9dm7sm2n3a7q44k21504chkbgo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zm2ccpmgqkd4uklkiesf21vdukq0uu200241esbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob0cth2bs)

name: Center for American Liberty
subject: Arrested for a sweatshirt
body:
What just happened outside a Massachusetts courthouse should concern every American.

| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8alihs75opkd2i8o16bdqla540t022mjo362vh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob4c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,What just happened outside a Massachusetts courthouse should concern every American. **One of our clients, Erica Walsh, was arrested — for peacefully wearing a sweatshirt while standing on a public sidewalk.** She wasn’t blocking doors. She wasn’t shouting. She wasn’t breaking the law. She stood silently near the Norfolk Superior Courthouse — where public attention is currently focused due to the ongoing Karen Read trial — on a sidewalk that a federal court has ruled protesters have a constitutional right to be. But Massachusetts State Police arrested her anyway. I’m Mark Trammell, CEO of the **Center for American Liberty** , and we’re stepping in to make sure the state doesn’t get away with it. Just days before Erica’s arrest, another one of our clients, Jason Grant, was blocked from the very same area simply for holding a sign with a Bible verse. This is not an isolated incident. This is a pattern. **State officials are targeting peaceful Americans for expressing viewpoints state officials don’t like — even after a federal appellate court said they have every right to be there.** We’ve already won a major court victory affirming the First Amendment in this case. But now, Massachusetts officials are ignoring the ruling — and doubling down on their crackdown. We’re taking them back to court. And we need your help. **[Will you make a tax-deductible donation to help us defend Erica, hold the state accountable, and protect the First Amendment for all Americans? ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlcprv03pn06g90fbm1rj4442agdddjj4pp6hu5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob4c1h2bs)**Your support will help us:
---
* Defend Erica and Jason in court
* Enforce the federal ruling protecting peaceful protest
* Send a message that constitutional rights don’t disappear when the government finds them inconvenient

---
| | At the Center for American Liberty, we fight every day to protect Americans from government overreach, ideological intimidation, and unlawful censorship. But we don’t take government money. We rely entirely on the support of people like you. **[If you believe in the Constitution — if you believe in standing up when others are silenced — please join us.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zicivupekdguj08cbev5ub5vp73k7v20gurequ3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob4c1h2bs)** **Because if we don’t hold the line here, the government will keep pushing further.** Thank you for standing with us. Sincerely,
---
| | **Mark Trammell ** CEO, Center for American Liberty

subject: See the Truth for Yourself: New Video Reveals All
body:
I want you to see for yourself what happened inside Project Veritas—the struggles over greed, power, and envy that took over.

| [****](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4ni8dgt7745bc6bbe21dgb98ldsce2vs52ehgfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)
Dear Patriot,

**I want you to see for yourself what happened inside Project Veritas --the struggles over greed, power, and envy that took over.**

[**I 'm sharing a brand new video**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4itmtbj1kc1bk16c0dqfpde3fn66mt75elsomp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs), part of my docuseries _The Truth Behind Veritas_ , that tells more than ever before.

[****](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6hiht6kg6s8ap067hjo5pridcco6h7jjabkue28_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)
It includes scenes from depositions, hidden camera footage, and all the evidence you need to understand this fight. **[**Watch it now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbup8a1jeahpnt8rnv41omf1bkbcb1ekvotav8s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)**[**, and then join me in defeating this lawsuit designed to silence me.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze6jvlab07o09cphpvpdeh3avo2nvqk054plk7do_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)

****Project Veritas, the organization I founded, has turned against me, filing a lawsuit to stop me from doing my job as a journalist and starting O 'Keefe Media Group (OMG). But I'm not backing down, and [**I need your help**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb9ncg3980v2rpok0sriqp415mvrojires187818_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs).

**Recently, we made a huge breakthrough:** a judge allowed us to serve Matt Tyrmand, over X. Tyrmand is a key player in the coup against me, and we've been unable to serve him months. He'll have to sit in a deposition with my attorneys to answer, explain, and defend his actions and words that continue to this day.

**That 's right, we're dragging them into the light, one deposition at a time.
**
Before you go any further, **[**watch the video**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmmfgj11p61rj59k06uhhgm9p1mc24bh80s0gon0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)**[**I 've posted**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6f7i4ja6se160i3pvs2jpn2sqglcrq6puvada9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs). It's part of my docuseries, _The Truth Behind Veritas_ , and it lays out exactly what's happening. You'll see the deposition footage, the interviews, and the documents that prove this isn't just about me--**it 's about protecting journalism**. **[**Click here to watch the video and donate to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg6vd1nc58in6ce6e33ecftdro6djjma51iujkm0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)**

This fight isn't cheap. We need to depose Tyrmand and other board members to keep unraveling the truth. Each deposition costs **$12,000** , and we're looking at needing **$68,000** to cover all the legal fees. [**Time is running out, and the bills are piling up. But every dollar you donate goes directly to Liberty Guard 's legal defense fund, fighting for my right to speak out.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt8kd53tndjq91nl7i7ep31ll18eulh40k5bmca0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)

This isn't just my fight--it's yours too. **If they can silence me, they can silence anyone who dares to question the powerful**. I've spent years exposing corruption, and **now they 're trying to use the courts to stop me**. [**But with your support, we can defeat this lawsuit and keep the truth alive.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcuh45f725mok5f5r4aigb0sn7sjug6mkn6k5rk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)

[**Please,**watch the video** , see the evidence, and then **donate** to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrppmnitopreas63ut7f48il2hr9e3hmp37ln8q0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs) Every contribution, no matter how small, helps us fight back against those who want to silence us. We're close to our goal, [**but we need you now more than ever**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zirhol8h92ot61491jrba25eumnhiin0k5iad60o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs).

**[**Click here to watch the video and donate to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3rbbiobfh0onl1i2pkgnac2omg0ei525qehcong_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)**

Thank you for standing with me. **Together, we can win this.**

In Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** Don't miss this--**[**watch the video**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z39j2uff00gprerk5gohc02ougekf7k3figo82vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)**[**now and**donate** to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhi0n5deq9n8pvfg113ifsidhrr1seombin5hsu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs) We need **$68,000** to keep fighting, and time is running out. **[**Click here to watch the video and donate to my defense fund.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z90q5id5lvbggmt5m05sci1j9q720tvn10is5dj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmcob2c1h2bs)**

| Good Morning,
Rob voted to protect and preserve Medicaid for American Citizens, double the Child Tax Credit to help struggling families, and stopped what would have been the biggest tax increase in American history! You may hear lies from the left, but that’s all they are - lies. Rob would never take away benefits from American citizens who truly deserve it, and his vote last week proved that.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Rob loves coming back to PA-08 on the weekend. On Memorial Day, Rob attended the West Hazleton and Wilkes Barre Township Parades honoring our fallen heroes. The brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice are honored on Memorial Day, but their selflessness stays with us everyday, and they are the reason we are all here.
---

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Clarence Thomas Deserves Better
body:
This is the most critical time to stand with him

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu4dhjheuq61omiufhjli2qkf3i6bvi66tbm3qi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmeo32clh2bs)
---
|
---
**I’m officially declaring a Code Red MAGA Alert.**
It’s Byron Donalds. I love America, the Constitution, and our Nation’s Founding principles.
I’m proud to stand with the greatest Justice in modern history, but sadly, I’m bringing you some terrible news.
Justice Clarence Thomas is now under attack after he put America FIRST over the Radical Left’s agenda, ruling in favor of stripping 300,000 illegals of _protection from deportation._
In response, the Woke Left went straight at him for defending our nation from CRIMINAL illegals.
_**[Isn’t that crazy?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0r2q7n0ajgb9cu2licqmf8vcoojenob2otdho7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmeo32clh2bs)**_

|
---
[STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1iac5nfuorud94tcvb715qinfgps80b7i5j0qp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmeo32clh2bs)
|
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf4a2bpf1aqabletidd631gucbgm0tja4gve57o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmeo32clh2bs)
|
---
There have been immediate LIES spread about his character, THREATS aimed at his family, and worst of all:
_They’ve launched a petition to IMPEACH him, and it has over 1,000,000 signatures._
All signed by Radical Leftists who want our nation flooded with Illegals.
_**_[Not on my watch.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9lfungguv6umhra2t1ne0idndkiv4a2c4sefppg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmeo32clh2bs)_**_
But if we don’t respond right here, right now, the attacks on Justice Thomas will continue unabated:

|
---
[STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7ooeu4mdliikhk4q603tk36ihmei8nlgj7oojk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmeo32clh2bs)
|
---
If the Radical Left’s dream scenario of _IMPEACHING_ Justice Clarence Thomas happens, **every Conservative ruling in recent years gets ripped to shreds.**
I’ve always kept it real with you - I don’t have liberal billionaire buddies in my back pocket to help Justice Clarence Thomas - _**[ALL I HAVE IS YOU!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlcjln0sf1ohsmec19kdeulrrod30pen7ggrah08_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmeo32clh2bs)**_
So I’m calling on you in this **_CRITICAL moment_** \- can you join me today, go on the record, and say you STAND with Justice Clarence Thomas?

|
---
[STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zurcmqq05dn9jl0a02qb42qk0uk3bvv331djq6g0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sphmeo32clh2bs)
|
---
God Bless you,
Byron Donalds _****_

# [Jim Jordan SHUTS DOWN radical Jasmine Crockett for yelling about I.C.E detention of illegal migrants](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164553859&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTUzODU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgzNTQyNDMsImV4cCI6MTc1MDk0NjI0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5GDlTrxwgw7uFzrsAPWxlyyIJjxsbRTu_Ktfw_1Dw5g)
### "God bless the men and women of I.C.E!"
| | [Politibrawl](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---
| May 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164553859&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTUzODU5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0ODM1NDI0MywiZXhwIjoxNzUwOTQ2MjQzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dW33GnDGvTbMgGYYtZGoM6AmJlON9SBuuCGVq4Fkno8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164553859&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTUzODU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgzNTQyNDMsImV4cCI6MTc1MDk0NjI0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5GDlTrxwgw7uFzrsAPWxlyyIJjxsbRTu_Ktfw_1Dw5g&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164553859&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTUzODU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgzNTQyNDMsImV4cCI6MTc1MDk0NjI0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5GDlTrxwgw7uFzrsAPWxlyyIJjxsbRTu_Ktfw_1Dw5g)

---

GOP Rep. Jim Jordan **[fired back at far-left Democrat Jasmine Crockett](https://substack.com/redirect/c08cad93-bb6a-4071-b860-8b09723a8d1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for praising Democrat lawmakers who stormed an I.C.E detention facility in Newark, New Jersey, clashing with agents during the chaotic stunt.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c08cad93-bb6a-4071-b860-8b09723a8d1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c08cad93-bb6a-4071-b860-8b09723a8d1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"They want to pretend like it's members of congress that are the thugs, that it's members of congress who are the ones who are stoking this kind of violence!" Crockett shouted during the hearing. "Let me tell you what those members of congress were doing! They were trying to make sure that there would not be another mother that would lose her life in I.C.E custody as it was Mother's Day weekend!!"
"They decided that they just wanted to make sure people were safe because that is who we are supposed to be in this country!" she continued. "Honestly, for anybody who considers themselves to be a Christian, they should care about treating people in a humane way!"
Rep. Jordan instantly jumped on her and the Democrats' undeniable hypocrisy, citing the left's condemnation of January 6th even after their summer-long bender of rioting and looting American cities in the name of Black Lives Matter.
**["Don't give me this, that somehow we're being inconsistent!"](https://substack.com/redirect/c08cad93-bb6a-4071-b860-8b09723a8d1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Jordan snapped. "We have condemned (violence) every single time."
### What happened at the I.C.E. detention center:
* Democratic lawmakers and protesters forcibly entered a federal immigration facility - The group, including Representatives LaMonica McIver and Bonnie Watson Coleman from New Jersey, stormed the gate of Delaney Hall Detention Center on May 9 after chasing a bus carrying detainees.
* The facility houses serious criminals according to DHS - Homeland Security Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin said the detainees include "murderers, terrorists, child rapists and MS-13 gang members," making this a high-security immigration detention facility rather than a typical holding center.
* There are conflicting accounts of what happened during the confrontation - Rep. McIver claimed on social media that ICE officials "shoved" her and "manhandled" Rep. Watson Coleman, but Homeland Security released footage that appears to show McIver pushing and elbowing officials who were defending the gate.

Jordan explained that the Biden administration invited millions of unvetted illegal migrants into the U.S., creating the dangerous problem not faced by I.C.E and the Trump administration who are trying to pick up the pieces of irresponsible immigration policy.
**["God bless the men and women of I.C.E!"](https://substack.com/redirect/c08cad93-bb6a-4071-b860-8b09723a8d1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Jordan concluded. Watch him decisively take down Crockett's grandstanding:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c08cad93-bb6a-4071-b860-8b09723a8d1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together With Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/65e826cd-5f2a-4735-8658-e8da279e4e24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65e826cd-5f2a-4735-8658-e8da279e4e24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### Your Lifeline To Help Protect Your Money From An Anti-American Digital Dollar
Americans over 60 years old MUST DO THIS now! Unfortunately, inflation will continue for at least the next 2 years unless something unheard of happens...
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/65e826cd-5f2a-4735-8658-e8da279e4e24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **MAGA Navy Seal BLASTS Democrat disgrace Eric Swalwell in front of congress**
GOP Rep. Eli Crane **[dunked on Democrat Rep. Eric Swalwell](https://substack.com/redirect/2978efba-d87a-4d9e-81ef-9bc426fb08a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for complaining about Elon Musk and his efforts to cut the fat in the federal government with DOGE.
"Elon Musk, wow man, you are really effective because these guys are melting down," Crane mocked Swalwell. "We might need to request some of your funds to get these guys some tissues, maybe some therapy dogs because these guys are melting down. Good job Elon!"
**[Watch the tense exchange here:](https://substack.com/redirect/2978efba-d87a-4d9e-81ef-9bc426fb08a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Here’s what’s happening:
Ken Paxton is leading John Cornyn in the Republican primary. Yes — that Ken Paxton. The indicted, impeached, Trump-worshipping extremist whose scandals could fill a book.
And if (more like when ) he becomes the GOP nominee, Texas Democrats will have a gift we’ve never had before:
→ A deeply unpopular, scandal-ridden MAGA lunatic
→ Tied at the hip to Trump’s collapsing regime
→ Running on a record of economic disaster and authoritarianism
While Republicans tear each other to shreds, Democrats have a clear path — if we’re bold enough to take it.
We need to ensure our Democratic nominee enters this race with strength, momentum, and serious resources. That starts with grassroots donors like you stepping up NOW — before the big money floods in to rescue Paxton. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=042625_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?express_lane=true&refcode=042625_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?express_lane=true&refcode=042625_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?express_lane=true&refcode=042625_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?express_lane=true&refcode=042625_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?express_lane=true&refcode=042625_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=042625_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: This isn’t just about Texas. This is about the future of the Senate. The future of our economy. The future of our democracy.
Trump and Paxton want to burn it all down. We can stop them — if we start fighting back today . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=042625_1]
Let’s go.

Friend, Florida is the tip of the spear in the battle to secure our borders and enforce our laws. Under my leadership, we’ve taken **bold, decisive action** to protect our communities and uphold the rule of law. It started with Operation Tidal Wave, a historic crackdown that led to the arrest of over 1,100 illegal aliens in just five days. **This wasn’t just a win for Florida—it was a wake-up call for the nation.**
---
[ **FIGHT TO SECURE OUR BORDERS** ](http://links.email.ronpac.com/s/c/a7XD6Zzz-L1vqs_tCWIlu8Ds6XOF0JqRIhvmDije3PcoFZXURM-pDFL65AJ9RH-CPKCSdrx6ByG1j6fxHgVgXWWqqDnh8yu2h65ZhdaTSbhuqdeiaZJTUgbLbz0Id7n79uEMn5AkY3Hiuo44BcRq6js7qRz-waJJ91fxiOyevRpQfSjMTPechv9tQPxkRheEATBl0qBusptX1nWb1-dObEKvGhF2GiEDeYZVQKvyQoPJGlMunlNUTiIg283X0nzIlNh8geIqr-0Or2wL9_MksrrvXSiDWj4PTd7uP8tP2CXkOCUc6beBFlKotqS0hFCnJEoilwiSE_kCHqJ3eWvHTVvZI1A8K2viFb-GotDGmVz4dfEBWB4MHh944LA2_zC2Dnuw-9fF21TcX6e9T2QFmqQ7IixAxfNZmw/vIJ-0v3yVe533S8ci6QQgdodaltyhcfT/9)
---
How did we do it? Florida banned sanctuary cities, ensuring no corner of our state harbors lawbreakers. We deputized more state and local law enforcement officers to work hand-in-hand with ICE, multiplying our strength. And we passed the strongest immigration enforcement legislation in the country, sending a clear message: __Florida will not tolerate illegal immigration.__ **Operation Tidal Wave was so successful that the federal government is now racing to replicate our model nationwide, with plans to roll out a similar program in the next 60 days.**** **
---
[ **EXPAND OPERATION TIDAL WAVE NATIONWIDE** ](http://links.email.ronpac.com/s/c/vyn04a6KyYKDf3xQeoWn-0vBRsPLqHhzSumZrqAMhTSbA2-V759K4teoLLWrF84BWvMTZ3eOa47QdL8TXK-LWGhnFTDMxGRTRcrL7tz_V6GURgQEFnW0G2cEo2X_EMDV647iScVH74hjhqMb5YtPtwBAEv7iD9ppRJNbelhqvE1DDLR8Cv-1Blej2cHYSimF0ZmcwA657TzZXqSkdgrVYKmGb3QKsDSkjmoM_fMVNBws10dB5N5HaSpYBPNyU9fWbrmtS-pcHlPd73VsvgDdr0_EXqAUf211omijd4A4p_lveimsZVzu7YiwkMPU15eVxQ4IkVa5SrL9qeRwM5Qutwp3YQ5ueNfj17O9N37sn3--AZQ48IIfHV5RDGjzm21Sk-MJR7fVpbT4w8fD1pu1t4JEBk2sqhG-lA/4wRKuk4hJ6a5HoTXOcRwgewM8Hb7-4BW/9)

The radical left and open-border activists are pushing back, trying to undermine our efforts and flood our nation with unchecked illegal immigration. We can’t let them win. clean_body: This is a win, not just for Florida, but for the United States as a whole. | | | Friend, In Florida, we’re not just talking about cracking down on illegal immigration. We’re doing it. In fact, Florida’s immigration enforcement – known as Operation Tidal Wave – has been SO successful that the Trump administration is now using it as its nationwide blueprint! I’m fighting to ensure conservatives elect leaders who will make border security their #1 priority. Thank you for your help,Gov. Ron DeSantis Sent from my iPhone \--------Forwarded Message--------From: Gov. Ron DeSantis Subject: Florida was the nation’s wake-up callDate: May 24, 2025 Friend, Florida is the tip of the spear in the battle to secure our borders and enforce our laws. Under my leadership, we’ve taken bold, decisive action to protect our communities and uphold the rule of law. It started with Operation Tidal Wave, a historic crackdown that led to the arrest of over 1,100 illegal aliens in just five days. This wasn’t just a win for Florida—it was a wake-up call for the nation. How did we do it? Florida banned sanctuary cities, ensuring no corner of our state harbors lawbreakers. We deputized more state and local law enforcement officers to work hand-in-hand with ICE, multiplying our strength. And we passed the strongest immigration enforcement legislation in the country, sending a clear message: Florida will not tolerate illegal immigration. Operation Tidal Wave was so successful that the federal government is now racing to replicate our model nationwide, with plans to roll out a similar program in the next 60 days. Florida is leading the way, showing the country what it means to prioritize the safety and security of our citizens, but this fight is far from over. The radical left and open-border activists are pushing back, trying to undermine our efforts and flood our nation with unchecked illegal immigration. We can’t let them win. That’s why I’m calling on YOU to stand with me today. This is a defining moment. Florida has lit the fuse, and the nation is watching. Will you join me in this historic fight? For Florida and our future, Governor Ron DeSantis P.S. The success of Operation Tidal Wave is just the beginning. With your support, we’ll keep the pressure on and make Florida’s model the gold standard for the nation. | | | | | | Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC). Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate’s Committee. www.ronpac.com | | P.O. Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: | | | I’m a public school mom, and I’m fighting back against Donald Trump’s attacks on our schools. Donald Trump and Elon Musk are trying to take a chainsaw to public education. They’re... Dismantling the Department of Education Threatening to completely defund school districts Promoting book bans and censorship I immigrated to America as a single mom, working three minimum wage jobs at the same time. High-quality public schools ensure that any hard-working student has a chance at the American dream. Friend, it’s time to stand up for public education. I’m a public school mom running in a red-to-blue race for the Virginia House of Delegates - in a key district that Donald Trump lost. This November, Democrats are defending a 51-49 majority, and our elections will be the next major test of the resistance against Donald Trump and Elon Musk. Thanks to over 3,000 donations from grassroots supporters like you, we outraised our MAGA incumbent opponent last quarter ... but he’s hard at work to catch up. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. **ATTENTION: The RSLC launched a six-figure attack ad in Virginia, targeting four Democratic incumbents in our most competitive districts. ** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDJlBRz_PasGKn-5Y68umRb827YMc54UXO7MziFc7lO-6cPYoww1iDB83pENPqqyuv3oBk-E3Uk4xpmp-lti7X-_3DSb5EmuZXGMyddDpCfOKC4j5pQM6fiFoWqihfnGHvIxcV48uv_V84NXZk6kaiXKTtA_YGrZPZMl5V9KAGQjjUPfnJcGhpp5MaGg9lrcMKBTU3apsVGC29SbPGu9T3TG-M_wSnXgtfv0ChDuzvuw6T2fZIy4q8udWM_oHnpPnG4SNd-KceBMvk0OP7DKDfS4nvmpHDl6IhV6Eg3c3-h2dxvDt03JxFq14xNSL2XZM0KJBAoSn8i4TaDYUCiAT-GPHsjLbGJ7ZeqnmCp6TrgHg/4gu/jbZwTjCARH-0We_Un5XpJQ/h0/h001.g1JpmhK1IWArfMhPQIr9ApVr-tD1sI54SaUZtbsiGNI) This new ad buy is our Republican counterparts’ second major investment in Virginia. They are using all their resources to flip the VA House this November. But we know the truth: If Republicans gain power in Virginia, they will stop at nothing to attack abortion rights, limit voting access, and loosen gun laws – pushing Trump’s Project 2025 through the legislature. So we must fight back. **We’re counting on grassroots donations to power our candidates across the finish line and give state Dems the resources they need to go toe-to-toe with extreme MAGA Republicans.** [Can we count on you to rush a 3X-matched gift of $7 to win competitive races in states like Virginia and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDJlBRz_PasGKn-5Y68umRb827YMc54UXO7MziFc7lO-6cPYoww1iDB83pENPqqyuv3oBk-E3Uk4xpmp-lti7X-_3DSb5EmuZXGMyddDpCfOKC4j5pQM6fiFoWqihfnGHvIxcV48uv_V84NXZk6kaiXNrZfYFIfrFUc4bKbmSAcqfMhlfyVOhpHFt9a0jST9-cvIxn_rpclHd6xo2E49ql45D4lB2vcTiaVepF-gyH1yIIYfyqrEYxUZLq6qZ3HyLmWLx04wrMSitYf0rQkaLD7RXPIH_Peprfnarp-bLAYkxYYovORjB5tsWUISbSJQSSt1ExCdoqPS9nUClC9CaWSps0kBlO_xdXZGZhC6P6n-ncE4rg1ZwHig0Jvosl2aZT/4gu/jbZwTjCARH-0We_Un5XpJQ/h1/h001.c8xciyR6m5KAQGE8ZWi_ugz5GjLRf1J6r-beUtMQLm8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: The RSLC launched a six-figure ad campaign in Virginia, targeting four Democratic incumbents in our most competitive district. | | | | | ---|--- ATTENTION: The RSLC launched a six-figure attack ad in Virginia, targeting four Democratic incumbents in our most competitive districts. This new ad buy is our Republican counterparts’ second major investment in Virginia. They are using all their resources to flip the VA House this November. But we know the truth: If Republicans gain power in Virginia, they will stop at nothing to attack abortion rights, limit voting access, and loosen gun laws – pushing Trump’s Project 2025 through the legislature. So we must fight back. We’re counting on grassroots donations to power our candidates across the finish line and give state Dems the resources they need to go toe-to-toe with extreme MAGA Republicans. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. He joked about my support for President Trump and the America First agenda.
To liberal talk show hosts, standing up for American values is comedy.
_But I 'm not here for their laughs._

spent years challenging the hollow narratives pushed by the media and political insiders.
[Now, I'm bringing that fight home to Ohio.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/JOsnxHNNDaq4eHMeaNKeKiweMTwyEBuDUAoHWpn9amlnaOCwXaYBT3nJLPbHlft9vEFOB9CzaqAoUOZhWFqRLZoxf0RfPl_VYL8QJtfWK2V69w8q7GWNGO_od_JeInOIh87mD_eo3bkwhBbwLTonNGzz6cnl1EBq3mpOeseKsnHFifM5eWEY7BnF0KHfl55t5AN_ER7b9YMrA3S5Cy5il_RmFyYdh3ZHo7Bfdu8ONl5L8ZxwvPKRMoO-OGjgcaIMc29x4KdHbZoniRWGfxX_Xi6qoDSwpEDjMRfVjhUleW_LBo6wVSl1vnc_mwF1K7YftIRnSCFh_-BldN22hFqSR4WhxOwqQ_VfpvWn0aInOKSvKOm-XD3KkDJcEc33sej2OUKq59GwWkLAN5emlvR9j7f1C6Cw7q7OxR5zIq0w4kIDTmFbMj4rXFXSzzy5SZIE08rfPZgWAkFN_fwECDd_C_aZHrdi4imd-recV3_DHM4PauBW709StAx1oTyR1YciGzHe7pU/uZOnJBTPHmQk1g64mshKlKsZKzYBBukS/9)_Take a peek at my plan: _
* Eliminate the state income tax
* Secure our elections
* Cut wasteful spending
* Fix our education system
* And support President Trump in making America GREAT again

Like President Trump, I won't waste a second.
We'll move swiftly to dismantle the bureaucracy and deliver real results.
Ohio will set the standard for the rest of the nation.
The media can keep laughing. But we're building a movement that's no joke.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: CNN claims...
body:
CNN claims, “There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis.”

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/Zemzi-KtoDHHs_33XH8LwThpgeRGTxgSHahmLEiED7IPB-TC2vY_2V98f0yuQZCrrzXHsBUChWZrTU9KsModxJqsdwQUFzlVvxSsgkfEnFX6YZZIDNyYpmRBOX5UzEFnhrr1i8g9BWuaJg3ZUIj5y4XVTpiGC6fnpwYckvudbX7ETfwthcEAPW_i/7q07Qol9tK6P3MOduG0YCxDsdepdAlS0/9)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/_sGINmKhCQzx8IWa9Qb9Vgdv8XZ4barPVr5WeYaFcKaCC9A29WthfRchzr40s50oQlVzKet_ebnwasw_11rDv9KsAVpMc5HDuHR_C--wsO00ieoCeCYaz_G7JsUyP_NXQ2eQLvi-PH-x12OuoKN4qsnH0x1Gn2RK_7Fc-4PqGy_tAAKzwvkDx-BAG72MkNqKObRs6uukHBTIrb6uTQKweC8Qmj4g8KmEur2kMyhgZO_VLEHQostgw_28yzFcxpkarQpwa7P4BhXEQ3LKr8o19uj4ojl47eKD6wzYMNd8Dg3W4xXADn_VFPdgEVM7URmaAPUE6Nz5-Mz9WzJbGj8ib-eS_mGy1HdlJImApJz7EAcjaJSqOFb4xOoKDBHrG6Qz2uRKQnRY3nkLMtutF3VAQZ-xA4nhwyr3eo7IYzHn1K35yjHEDoJuAvsV_0PYdjcXlGYU4Nugu-TKX2vi1LT_Qi9xkVE/Ai6rdVmYJOgKDA2s6CBspDE5soTWUvJK/9) Dear Friend, CNN claims, "There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis."

There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/1gvP1Fxj5p_Eq1wxOkeXVy4Y8mHxoB9jZN7dVVXwzuUHNJK4vOHdvzhPT15Z9NVSXW9mj_FTJvjARw2jRh-j5Z-Xmw8cESWsuQ97lZMpe-3AgLTxngOXLhz-4530GDaX4xzIS0M46rG7s1HvojpkKX13NKrX3jY4w3h_Eqel-UJ27pb1qjYB8OyMdmniyXeTFh-9F-xo2eYsyjl38uucT3D7A-HK6KMNx5DIOXKjrJyW_12ygjllEiLUKXD_lJW5Zz_xtdzq3flJKs9Ctk744vyVruDJXEFDfL2e4z1oiWYzOIXgwdj2usVAL3_sVOKvVb7M15fvKKwH-hRXYiHaZDtTqyE3pitpxNs0tLMk4L9xgOzi5rNHnzreNpDBmj4pcWBp4kTtnfdPH-TAc-BAbkadzKAm9YfF5lXzmQ6qXMVB1ANVan5ycQnJJCWgPBMK4995BvqsBm4fqAtYLDqnbnBA7ao/vYrobnoIx3oUGQ7y8npp7T4oYcwb2N9E/9) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/jCnmI2pTtINp58C4b2-BEWO3M0Re93Y6FW2Z3Hqo6EH8N9ud78ZSO3vksro8VJa4txwzqglBTQhXnppss4kxYYbMizSjGMh6TOiYyxTOeJFOFRhotk8Gm9q6rTUbR6RzmjOh20cbiXvsNDjIXK5HzaacKqhVTXiPXSQ1yIBKgm6GF5ClnVIm1VC3aCtStR9_7YO4Rj8dwGHFbY1WwRlzLRGuMoXy43FVPzxFrfWs6BJyFJtd6ZNY_YAiPKeD3NZjSkHoEJKaNZ-GLZlU5ocp_LU6bjc_ISVFNTuSZ6-RRP9tpun2ABw6mlogndA_uGNsoCQwNmX6yIt-sD7RY3glPVby8QYAOQZJ91yqDsGPM7Dy8r2Ni_k5LaPqq5NlqDFLtDQjeQ8iah5Eo3iHAJSB7YFa6QwLuBmSzW7KVgQpaTzSHP0MHhigLR_LCgelSys9fx2biAfEzWZC0I7OMZYrX_Zom9Q/PmVdNQIbUKjzgt7Kx8rvBzd4YVNyI1Ay/9)

Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/ZrZ-fL9Kh8E33w9rQ2Uuat-J7BnztW_an0j6nlgxvQQ4lr6dMBTHTYijKRRTcicvtEySoPkOtIisOYiAAC9WR29E9CJbQ_PJva0Bz5IL7m0fBlLWQszC6DdsAdSVne0LWoQrzp4084_HkDt9ciU-Ac76J0j7K95W3FB3RQeudxxl8QpLimJf6019aOYNUKJ6cO8qjPfUTRbLLgiQm3cz0ywvmu3BWRAMZA/fZh16ZZDOfpUwBxicbD-wIJUsNk3kA-w/9)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/Zemzi-KtoDHHs_33XH8LwThpgeRGTxgSHahmLEiED7IPB-TC2vY_2V98f0yuQZCrrzXHsBUChWZrTU9KsModxJqsdwQUFzlVvxSsgkfEnFX6YZZIDNyYpmRBOX5UzEFnhrr1i8g9BWuaJg3ZUIj5y4XVTpiGC6fnpwYckvudbX7ETfwthcEAPW_i/7q07Qol9tK6P3MOduG0YCxDsdepdAlS0/9).

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc866549d-0449-49b1-a3a1-2eb9edc177f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

This money will help us talk to voters, run ads, and so much more before the primary. But more than that, it will help us elect a Governor who has spent his life fighting for Jersey and the people who live here.

Josh is ready to get to work to protect Jersey Values, Lower Taxes, and Lower Costs. But he needs your help to get there. **[Click here to donate $10 or anything you can to help us meet our goal!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108439020/547926129/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250527_FR_ReportingDeadline_0_3MO_DanielPardee_NA_NA_1.3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGMxM2JiYS0wNzNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eL1lH3jOtkr4QOmrJ8VfiuaYrUoOFfUp-ZV4l6-M4qI=&emci=b9c6c921-ff3a-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=58c13bba-073b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=37438246)**

Daniel Pardee

* * *

name: Wes Moore
subject: The people of Maryland
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=97%2E1086043%2EIcMMCG ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=97%2E1086043%2EIcMMCG ]Wes Moore for Governor

When I first ran for Governor, I had never held political office in my
life. But I was connected to the people.

My upbringing and life’s journey have allowed me to gain experiences that
the establishment doesn’t have. Whether it be because of my military
background or family history — I am grounded in my beliefs.

Peter, it was the
people of Maryland that made me Governor, and I will always stand with
them. No matter what the Trump administration or the congressional GOP
might throw our way, I will fight for the people of our state.

But the truth is, I can’t continue that work without your support.

Grassroots donors are key to everything we accomplish. With thousands of
people chipping in
what they can, we’re able to build a movement to stand up for Maryland
families.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250527-1-ak?refcode=em-20250527-1&refcode2=97_1086043_IcMMCG&akid=97%2E1086043%2EIcMMCG ]Our next end-of-month deadline is May 31st. That’s why I’m coming to
you directly to ask if you’ll chip in $5 before midnight on
Saturday to help us reach our goal.

Reaching our goal will directly help us fight for progress.
Reaching our goal will make sure our work to cut taxes for the middle
class, protect Maryland jobs, and make historic investments in our public
schools continues.
Reaching our fundraising goal will allow me to continue standing with the
people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250527-1-ak?refcode=em-20250527-1&refcode2=97_1086043_IcMMCG&akid=97%2E1086043%2EIcMMCG ]So if you’re able, please chip in $5 or more before our
5/31 deadline.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250527-1-ak?amount=5&refcode=em-20250527-1&refcode2=97_1086043_IcMMCG&akid=97%2E1086043%2EIcMMCG ]Donate $5 ››

Elevate,

Wes

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250527-1-ak?refcode=em-20250527-1&refcode2=97_1086043_IcMMCG&akid=97%2E1086043%2EIcMMCG ]Wes Moore

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: Personally asking
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Hi there, it’s DNC Chair Ken Martin. I’m reaching out to personally ask if you can make a $3 contribution to the DNC ahead of our next FEC deadline.

This moment demands a strong Democratic Party. We need the resources to keep organizing and standing up against Trump and his allies’ attacks on critical programs like health care and food assistance. And at the same time, we need resources for the long run: to help Democrats take back Congress in 2026.

The only way we’ll do both is if we all work together now.

[**So I’m asking: Will you please make a contribution to the DNC today? We’ll put your contribution to work immediately organizing against Trump and electing Democrats nationwide.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250527_3550_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3550_22930333_O9iiv_&akid=3550%2E22930333%2EO9iiv_) Ken Martin |

name: Team AOC
subject: Support emergency relief in Gaza today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Please donate to World Central Kitchen as they fight to provide meals in Gaza.
#
For the past 11 weeks, the Israeli government has blocked all humanitarian aid — including food, water, and medicine — from entering Gaza.1
According to the UN, at least 57 Palestinian children have starved to death since March 2.2 **This is a humanitarian crisis.**
But last week, after global pressure, the first few aid trucks were finally allowed back into Gaza.3
Today, we’re asking you to support **World Central Kitchen** , whose team has hundreds of trucks filled with aid ready to roll into Gaza to provide as many meals as they can to over 2 million Palestinians who have been living under the blockade.
[ World Central Kitchen is working against the odds to provide emergency relief in Gaza. Will you support their critical efforts today by making a donation of any amount that is meaningful to you? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250527-wck.GiedBa&refcode=em20250527-8925-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250527-wck.GiedBa&refcode=em20250527-8925-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250527-wck.GiedBa&refcode=em20250527-8925-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi)
Whether or not you can donate today, thank you for your solidarity.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

1 - [**BBC:** Israel lets aid into Gaza after 11-week blockade but UN calls it 'drop in ocean' ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32540?t=22&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi)
2 - [**United Nations:** Gaza: 57 children reported dead from malnutrition, says WHO ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32541?t=23&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi)
3 - [**AP News:** First few aid trucks enter Gaza but allies threaten Israel with sanctions and urge more ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32542?t=24&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi)

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=8925%2E2526796%2EWkkUDi)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Prayers for a safe return
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
With a gift of just $2, you could help us double the population of Navy SEALs in the U.S. Senate. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=190f899571b645ee91fd3e2a66decdc8&_e=EStfO_Kir_RCTp6ED5N02HrkdCBX5xv_gWej-nYSlNbbqpw8T7hjo2nVi-QixmsTbo3TMkcHCc9GDspJhJ0jZsqu-lsauujzPzAo-HAseSsTNa4DXzXeq0VFEJDXJdvOMnEkJuPbx1OSCGEH3-qn1i1ZAS5FNoHwbOqF5AbCPWPVoleZk-AL6XAJOSNGQ_uZVPhaw4wlc7df55lvjiWtE9ZXQHLPxYGtg2g-4TftGxS7jF-LQz4qXKyQTUmONKh3e9LoQbpQ2MuoWrumN1YkfWMoKuD4ahgh6yr_aGvxGtK5jj2vPkg0JOGPLiycb-mbBsuNe-wn0-R2b0-n_amuJU4V-8ZuB7vEZxpRRydxnvdAyl5l0xx-q3lQwFb4sG4Rsvum4HPbLfaeoB44QfewuXyiH9r78sM5l5fLe7GeTfpdzL-eE-EFM1I5jFTyCejA)

---

Peter,

I'm Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. As a combat veteran who has fought and bled in defense of our nation, I’m writing to you, in your capacity as a mother or a father, grandmother or grandfather, who fights daily for your family, to ask for your support in my run for the U.S. Senate. If you’re not from Minnesota, that’s OK I need you to keep reading this email. Because much of what’s happening in Minnesota now - _**a state run by Tim Walz, Kamala Harris’ radical VP nominee- is happening elsewhere in the United States, perhaps even in your community.**_

Our communities aren’t like they were when I grew up in the late 80s and into the 90s. Would you feel comfortable with one of your beloved children or grandchildren playing outside, out of sight, for extended periods? **The days when that was possible seem like a distant memory to me.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=190f899571b645ee91fd3e2a66decdc8&_e=EStfO_Kir_RCTp6ED5N02HrkdCBX5xv_gWej-nYSlNbbqpw8T7hjo2nVi-QixmsTbo3TMkcHCc9GDspJhJ0jZsqu-lsauujzPzAo-HAseSsTNa4DXzXeq0VFEJDXJdvOMnEkJuPbx1OSCGEH3-qn1i1ZAS5FNoHwbOqF5AbCPWPVoleZk-AL6XAJOSNGQ_uZVPhaw4wlc7df55lvjiWtE9ZXQHLPxYGtg2g-4TftGxS7jF-LQz4qXKyQTUmONKh3e9LoQbpQ2MuoWrumN1YkfVEJ9Cq6GYvrUhe1_J3p05q3x_izwlF5TzK4A5AAWtnn84FuZNUuNSPyviuEG3CuckQXD7POUlEPD8m3ZGhQLprUHjzk7kxrIC8g9fZUlHDvBvu37sohx70_yiWWcEnIvAR9Q7VBtTCZxzm_zniI94ucTvUnv9dJD9DLCieDdmuL)

But they shouldn’t be a memory. Americans should feel safe to let their children and grandchildren play outside without fear. **Every man, woman, and child should have the opportunity to live in a community where their safety isn’t constantly under assault from criminal illegal aliens or violent left-wing factions of the Democrat party.**

President Trump and Republicans in Congress are making substantial progress toward ensuring a strong and secure southern border. But they need reinforcements. **There is simply too much to do and too little time. Should we try and fail to keep our Senate majority in next year’s midterms, they won’t be able to finish all the work needed to make America safe again.**

_**President Trump needs reinforcements - and not just any reinforcement. He needs another Navy SEAL, like me, in the Senate to join the ranks of public servants like Sen. Tim Sheehy.**_****

That’s why I’m coming to you with a simple favor. **[I’m asking you for $2 today to help me double the number of Navy SEALs in the Senate](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=190f899571b645ee91fd3e2a66decdc8&_e=EStfO_Kir_RCTp6ED5N02HrkdCBX5xv_gWej-nYSlNbbqpw8T7hjo2nVi-QixmsTbo3TMkcHCc9GDspJhJ0jZsqu-lsauujzPzAo-HAseSsTNa4DXzXeq0VFEJDXJdvOMnEkJuPbx1OSCGEH3-qn1i1ZAS5FNoHwbOqF5AbCPWPVoleZk-AL6XAJOSNGQ_uZVPhaw4wlc7df55lvjiWtE9ZXQHLPxYGtg2g-4TftGxS7jF-LQz4qXKyQTUmONKh3e9LoQbpQ2MuoWrumN1YkfdcdZH1j9xvToepXKZQJBtSrooRQhS4T_UZHsD_sQCqxcGOPkZ-by4FxPU4owUy1TV2OeRe_nHcHHo9_qysd8nbvdJOcZ-UsSOCWhre0ssTZWWwQob_4BFGRlgC_0aTCc63dTS8KMnidQUYp92ijVv00sJ42W99RIDtP1F7ezX__)**.

Sen. Sheehy is already one of the most effective members of the Senate, and he’s only been in office for five months—imagine what two Navy SEALs could do working in tandem.

[**CHIP IN $2
DOUBLE THE SEAL POPULATION **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=190f899571b645ee91fd3e2a66decdc8&_e=EStfO_Kir_RCTp6ED5N02HrkdCBX5xv_gWej-nYSlNbbqpw8T7hjo2nVi-QixmsTbo3TMkcHCc9GDspJhJ0jZsqu-lsauujzPzAo-HAseSsTNa4DXzXeq0VFEJDXJdvOMnEkJuPbx1OSCGEH3-qn1i1ZAS5FNoHwbOqF5AbCPWPVoleZk-AL6XAJOSNGQ_uZVPhaw4wlc7df55lvjiWtE9ZXQHLPxYGtg2g-4TftGxS7jF-LQz4qXKyQTUmONKh3e9LoQbpQ2MuoWrumN1YkfXkpVjp0mO-vIMXeqoDDkVCirXfY7f9nRrfAUGRATV9M2BFQiHP6fwYcJkTkxm60K5WVFXaEEpNJztwsVBSqW7mZXiJLw-InHqwmXC2ywHIRMFp8jxQRL_ZBiX25cHLXR-D6eXnNg71hPm-5WBMuRlpVB7EzdcVZQGDpBzd1SNyo)
I grew up in a working-class family, playing hockey and learning the value of duty from my parents. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, mere weeks after 9/11, _**I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country. I joined our Armed Forces out of fidelity to a country I love and because I had always wanted to be a part of something greater than myself.**_ As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, putting my life on the line to keep families like yours safe.

No two missions were the same. But one thing that never changed, no matter where I was, was that I carried prayers for a safe return from my mom and dad. Now, I’m stepping up again—into the unknown - this time to protect Minnesota and America from the radical policies tearing apart our communities.

**I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, whose far-left agenda has made our streets less safe and our values less secure. You saw the chaos in Minneapolis in 2020—riots, violence, and a governor’s team that sided with lawsuits against our police instead of protecting our neighborhoods.** As a mom, you know how important it is to feel safe in your community. That’s not the Minnesota you fought for or your family deserves.

name: Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith
subject: I’m furious

body:
Hillary Clinton just insulted every Republican woman in America.

_**[Friend, I've just about had enough.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za1o5064rpauoakb8nca0olucsjcb8o1j5halud8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)**_

Hillary Clinton just had the nerve to say that if we ever had a female Republican president, she'd just be a _**["handmaiden to the patriarchy."](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu645rkengvo3qr7h4d8ses1pppdm0jiblssct00_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)**_

**[Well, bless her heart, but that's a slap in the face to every conservative woman I know.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfn06pigr2jrg8t1natehs51t9eh0ro9a5ucs408_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)**

I'm a woman, a wife, a mama, and a proud U.S. Senator from the great state of Mississippi.

I've worked my tail off every step of the way, and I didn't get where I am by taking orders from anybody--**[certainly not Hillary Clinton.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4cdu7f75avm0ccvvt9r6slee4oag25qd9309tbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)**

Republican women don't need Hillary Clinton--_or anyone else_ --to tell us who we are or what we're worth.

We know who we are. And we are not _" handmaidens."_

**[So let me ask you straight up, Friend : Where do you stand?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0ii0p7h504m355ltl0rb1k4fbkndhdh0dmdp8qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)**

[I STAND WITH REPUBLICAN WOMEN](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3fv2httm3hkc943m3onnb4lqpjmv521mhrkpib0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)

[I STAND WITH HILLARY CLINTON AND THE RADICAL LEFT](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs7fpp3uruj3fc170o1f1sapk80p84emgmcl9lpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)

And I'll tell you what really gets me: the same folks calling us these names are the ones pushing for biological men to compete in women's sports. _**[How does that make sense?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zib62o9afj7agrpnkjqrj16hc5rq48r6e099tf1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)**_

**[I 'm sick of being lectured by people who can't even define what a woman is.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zto4sm5fs6ggl00uit89qniqis11591u7ntr8t3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)**

**[So I'll ask you again: Do you stand with Republican women who believe in fairness, truth, and real opportunity? Or do you stand with Hillary Clinton and the radical Left and their backwards agenda?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkvm1582tojkkg889dq2f9hkrbmpm7mun7aec4go_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)**

[I STAND WITH REPUBLICAN WOMEN](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0p50asj33q09vs4rd1qrjundh5mu5qqo8jjg460_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)

[I STAND WITH HILLARY CLINTON AND THE RADICAL LEFT](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo02nr5iaug39bfs577pede3ivu3tqk43o271f7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)

Thank you,
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zikdq9e5nknngdaatm64rqmo6skrabkafr8s8730_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spjm8pb0cjh2bs)
Cindy Hyde-Smith
U.S. Senator, Mississippi

Peter, If you’ve ever wondered how you can support the DFL’s work fighting back against Trump, look no further than **Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program**! Thanks to this grassroots fundraising tool, you can donate up to $75 (or $150 per couple) to the DFL and receive a full refund from the Minnesota Department of Revenue. Here’s how it works: **Step 1:** Make a $75 donation to the Minnesota DFL. **Step 2:** We’ll send you a receipt and a 2025 PCR application form. **Step 3:** Fill out the form and send it to the Minnesota Department of Revenue. **Step 4:** Get your refund. name: James Carville
subject: We gotta get serious about Jon Ossoff!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
After all of my years in politics, I've learned that sometimes things that are said are true, and other things that are said are less than true.
#

[
---
Hey Peter: it's James Carville. As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, I’m telling ya — we gotta get serious about Georgia's Senate race. After all of my years in politics, I've learned that sometimes things that are said are true, and other things that are said are less than true. **This is the truth: Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state won by Trump. That makes him Republicans’ top target.** But I'd rather not predict. I'd rather affect — and Jon Ossoff has a critical fundraising deadline in just a few days. If everyone reading this pitched in a few bucks, we'd reach his goals with room to spare. Unfortunately, not everyone gives. So they asked me to reach out to give you a push to act before it's too late. [**Please use this link to contribute directly to Jon Ossoff's campaign before his fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few days.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250527&t=2&akid=383%2E5691347%2ElzQ_sn) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-may25.m5wiqz&refcode=em250527&t=21&akid=383%2E5691347%2ElzQ_sn)**

name: Becca Balint
subject: Taking healthcare away wasn’t enough for Republicans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108441994/547934741/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250527_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTJlOWNhMy0wYjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=37yU08OgnB888lRIhFLaFzfVawSOi41iem2AOw-2D74=)
---
Get this, Peter: Republicans just passed their bill to cut taxes for the wealthiest Americans while kicking millions of people off of Medicaid, slashing Medicare, and gutting food assistance programs — but even _that_ isn't enough.

Buried deep in the bill is a measure that gives _tanning bed companies_ a tax break.

That's right: Rural hospital beds? Forget it. Tanning beds? We're coming to the rescue.

It's ridiculous, it's shameful — and it's reflective of how beholden the GOP is to billionaires.

I'm fighting for an economy that works for working people, not the billionaire class. And when folks like you chip in to my campaign, it shows that there's a movement of people behind me.

Now more than ever, we need to send a message loud and clear that we're sick and tired of Republicans working against working people — but we're behind on our fundraising right now, so I'm asking:

**[Can you chip in any amount today? clean_body: | = Get this, Peter: Republicans just passed their bill to cut taxes for the wealthiest Americans while kicking millions of people off of Medicaid, slashing Medicare, and gutting food assistance programs — but even that isn't enough. Buried deep in the bill is a measure that gives tanning bed companies a tax break. That's right: Rural hospital beds? Forget it. Tanning beds? We're coming to the rescue. It's ridiculous, it's shameful — and it's reflective of how beholden the GOP is to billionaires. I'm fighting for an economy that works for working people, not the billionaire class. And when folks like you chip in to my campaign, it shows that there's a movement of people behind me. Now more than ever, we need to send a message loud and clear that we're sick and tired of Republicans working against working people — but we're behind on our fundraising right now, so I'm asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I want to let you in on something, Peter. It doesn’t matter how much folks chip in. What matters is the number of people who do_ — this is what grassroots movements are built on, and it’s how we’ll show the strength of this people-powered movement. Thanks for helping us send a message. — Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Peter, I'm asking you to contribute to our campaign today. In a close race, every dollar is appreciated.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Peter, when I see a problem, I don't pass the buck. I step up, and I get to work.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108441917/547934541/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ4MWZkNWUtMGIzYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9NxbmEd-6JmU7S6zf1pDOyrZg0lMPux_rGxH__aoe60=)
---
| Peter, when I see a problem, I don't pass the buck. _I step up, and I get to work._

In 2018, I ran for Congress in part because Donald Trump and my Republican representative attempted to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which would've eliminated protections for Virginians with pre-existing conditions and healthcare coverage for hundreds of thousands of Virginians. Now, Glenn Youngkin is blessing Republicans' budget bill that puts Medicaid on the chopping block.

_I couldn't sit on the sidelines then, and I won't today._

Not when my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears is silent on Trump's attack on affordable healthcare. Not when she praises the tariffs that have sent Virginians' costs skyrocketing. And not when she threatens the right of Virginians to marry who they love and decide when they're ready to start a family.

**My promise to you in this campaign is the same promise I've always made: to put Virginians first.**

That's what I'm doing as I travel the Commonwealth and hear from people on these issues. But we all know the best way to tackle problems is not alone — it's as a team.

[_**Peter, I'm asking you to contribute to our campaign today. In a close race, a race that could become the most expensive in Virginia's history, every dollar is appreciated.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108441919/547934542/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ4MWZkNWUtMGIzYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9NxbmEd-6JmU7S6zf1pDOyrZg0lMPux_rGxH__aoe60=)

name: Cori Bush
subject: We have people power.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]
Hey there Peter,
Cori Bush here, founder of Politivist Action PAC.
The threats to our democracy have never been clearer. Trump and his billionaire enablers are cutting vital programs like Medicaid and Social Security to fund tax cuts for their ultra-wealthy donors and friends, disappearing and deporting people to foreign countries without due process, and ignoring Supreme Court orders. And now, Trump has even gone as far as to accept a private plane worth up to $400 million from the Qatari government.
They are advancing an agenda that only serves the ultra-rich, silences marginalized communities, and destroys democracy’s progress.
We refuse to let that happen.
At Politivist Action PAC, we’re laser-focused on electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights—leaders who will reject everything Trump is bringing our way. But we can’t do it without the sustained support of this movement.
Will you become a monthly donor today to help us power this fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q2?refcode=x_250527_recurring_act&recurring=1]
MAKE IT MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q2?refcode=x_250527_recurring_act&recurring=1]
Your recurring contribution, whether it’s $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q2?refcode=x_250527_recurring_act&amount=5&recurring=1] , $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q2?refcode=x_250527_recurring_act&amount=10&recurring=1] , or $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q2?refcode=x_250527_recurring_act&amount=25&recurring=1] , will give us the resources to recruit, train, and elect the champions our democracy desperately needs.
Donald Trump and his billionaire donors might have money at their disposal, but we have people power. And if we show up together, we can stop their extremist agenda in its tracks.
Let’s do this, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q2?refcode=x_250527_recurring_act&recurring=1]
Cori Bush, founder
Politivist Action PAC
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all.
If you want to learn more, visit our website at PolitivistAction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com] .

At CPAC this year, Moms for America talked to so many amazing women making a difference and forging their own paths. In today's
episode, we are sharing two of those inspiring conversations.

Comedian Karith Foster knows firsthand the pitfalls of DEI and "woke" policies. She is bringing a commonsense approach to
conversations about our country and race. Amy Robbins is a mom who wanted safety-focused athletic wear that was also comfortable
and fashionable. While training for a marathon, she discovered there were no athletic clothes that allow women to concealed carry.
So, she made Alexo Athletica that does just that. Like, subscribe and share.

Creative Ideas Moms Can Use to Make Summer Great Again

Summer is almost here. The kids are finishing the school year and gearing up for their long-awaited break. Whether your budget for
this year’s summer fun is tiny or tremendous, we know moms are the experts at creating sun-splashed adventures and lasting
memories. You don’t have to plan a grand or pricey vacation to discover the fun nearby – even in your own backyard. This week,
we’re sharing some ideas to help you make the season shine!
