I woke up to yet another gut-wrenching horror: Israeli airstrikes killed at least 52 people in Gaza Monday night--including 36 Palestinians who were taking refuge in a school-turned-shelter. Most of them were women and children. Killed while they slept, their belongings--and their bodies--incinerated in the night.
This wasn't a battlefield. This was a school. A shelter. A place people fled to escape death, only to be immolated by it. The Israeli military burned children alive while they slept. Let me repeat, Netanyahu ordered the burning of babies as they slept.
This is not "just" genocide anymore. This is a full blown holocaust. **Let 's Address This.**
I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism, and I need your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..W5NM90WjlZxJxkgmPzWb18J9_chRAPraVRThuW3Nyqk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164522706)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bb890107-11f3-4a14-94cf-e3602e7d6213?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The harrowing escape of a 5-year-old Palestinian girl named Ward Al Sheikh Khalil as an Israeli strike incinerated those around her
## It Is Time To Recognize We Are Witnessing A Holocaust
Leading scholars of genocide, including Israeli scholars, are unanimous in recognizing Israel's actions against Palestinians as genocide. For example, world renowned Israeli scholar Shmuel Lederman of Open University of Israel [wrote just this month](https://substack.com/redirect/d57a22df-0966-4c67-a748-3feabfdacbb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> **... the cumulative effect of what Israel is doing in Gaza is genocidal in every sense**. I think the second half of 2024 is the point at which a consensus emerged among genocide researchers (as well as the human rights community) that this was genocide. Those who may have still had doubts--I estimate that they have dissipated following Israel's actions since the cease-fire was broken.
Those who continue to deny this genocide for what it is are denying the reality and gravity of the situation. And it is that same reality and gravity that moves us to now consider whether this is also a holocaust? While I accept some might object to using the term _holocaust_ , I ask only that you look at the facts before drawing a conclusion. And when we analyze this from a definitional and factual perspective, the conclusion seems undeniable that what we are witnessing is in fact a holocaust.
Let's start with the definition. The _Merriam Webster 's Dictionary_ defines _holocaust_ as "_a thorough_ _destruction involving extensive loss of life, especially caused by fire_."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0496b61a-0f76-486d-8417-6c6e4c608054?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thus, this definition gives us three elements to consider:
1. A thorough destruction
2. Involving extensive loss of life
3. Especially through fire

Now, let us apply that rubric to the ground reality in Gaza.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..W5NM90WjlZxJxkgmPzWb18J9_chRAPraVRThuW3Nyqk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164522706)
## 1\. Has Gaza faced a "thorough destruction?"
Here's what the facts tell us. Just this week a UN survey concluded that [more than 95% of land in Gaza is now unusable for agriculture](https://substack.com/redirect/24b9720a-9880-4bbc-9971-ce4e52bec966?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Another report by Doctors Without Borders in January 2025 concluded that [more than 92% of homes and more than 70% of all buildings in Gaza are destroyed, damaged, or unusable](https://substack.com/redirect/4bc19c43-ed9c-4b18-b6d1-864f8933b8f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Yet another UN report from last September concluded that nearly [70% of all infrastructure in Gaza has been destroyed or damaged](https://substack.com/redirect/1c1569e9-7003-4fc8-98c1-9ed2d6442a54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Finally, simply compare the visual destruction in Gaza from [October 12, 2023 to January 11, 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/3488dde3-2471-4e8f-9e88-1639484ac169?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9cf2a867-b910-45ff-89b9-b56936345e26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5fc0d914-a11d-4f0f-bb93-8814fd912c0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
By April of 2024 Gaza had already suffered more than 70,000 tonnes of bombing. To put that in perspective, that is more than the _combined_ bomb tonnage dropped on Dresden, Hamburg, and London in World War II. Now more than a year later, that bombing has only increased. It is no surprise, therefore, that UN Humanitarian Chief Martin Griffiths declared Gaza "[uninhabitable](https://substack.com/redirect/e6402837-ac57-42d9-98b1-318766d75cf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" due to the bombing, destruction, blockades, and subsequent famines. Given all of the above data, it is factually accurate to conclude that Gaza has been "_thoroughly destroyed_."
## 2\. Has that destruction involved "extensive loss of life?"
The Lancet estimated last summer that Israel's genocide upon Gaza [had already killed up to 186,000 people](https://substack.com/redirect/5c2ce563-faf6-4ba8-9e25-777c7b16c6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), conservatively. The analysis concluded:
> In recent conflicts, such indirect deaths range from three to 15 times the number of direct deaths. Applying a conservative estimate of four indirect deaths per one direct death[9](https://substack.com/redirect/4b53fa1e-729c-4eaf-9dc5-0a619d4a708c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the 37 396 deaths reported, it is not implausible to estimate that up to 186 000 or even more deaths could be attributable to the current conflict in Gaza.
The current 'official' death toll in Gaza is approximately 56,000 people. That alone should suffice any metric to mean "_extensive loss of life_." But applying The Lancet's conservative estimate of four indirect deaths per one direct death lands us at a staggering 224,000 people killed. In fact, over the last 20 months, Israeli bombing has killed more children in Gaza than children killed in all global conflicts _combined._ While the latest data is far worse, even 1 year into Israel's siege on Gaza, [OxFam reported this horrifying fact](https://substack.com/redirect/71e301b3-f5b7-498c-b135-3f79a576c21c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> More women and children have been killed in Gaza by the Israeli military over the past year than the equivalent period of any other conflict over the past two decades.
Without question Gaza has suffered "_extensive loss of life_ ," one that absolutely and tragically meets the second criteria of the textbook definition of a holocaust.
## 3\. Has that destruction and loss of life especially been through fire?
While the first two definitional elements of holocaust can also be applied to genocide, the dictionary differentiates a _holocaust_ with the third element of "killing by fire"
Again, let us look at the facts.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8dc6aadf-ccd6-4a70-bd5c-568c60454cb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ward escapes the fire that killed five of her siblings.
This week, Israeli bombing burned alive at least 36 Palestinians, including women and children, while they slept in a school designated as a shelter. And this is not a one-off event. It is part of a repeated, sustained pattern in which the Israeli military incinerates entire Palestinian families and family lines. And sadly is not new. Back in December, 2023, the New York Times [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/26b2123f-95fa-4969-bedd-69cc47a891f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Israel claims it protects civilians, but a New York Times investigation found that at least 200 times Israel dropped its most destructive bombs in areas it designated as safe for civilians in Gaza.
Another investigation by NBC [reached the same conclusion](https://substack.com/redirect/a51b77ea-2a96-4320-b87e-f35bd6b33700?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), that Israel repeatedly forced Palestinian civilians into what they called "safe zones," then bombed those very safe zone, killing by fire and explosives the very people they forced into those trapped locations. How is this in any way different than rounding up civilians into camps, and then killing people in those camps?
And these reports were only from the first two months of bombing Gaza. The atrocities that have unfolded since further add to this death toll and mass killing by fire. And then there are the [countless horrific stories like of Dr. Alaa al-Najjar](https://substack.com/redirect/ef390606-1c60-45b1-a203-19ae3bc84d60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who as reported, "_left her ten children at home when she went to work in the emergency room at the Nasser Medical Complex in southern Gaza. Hours later, the bodies of seven children arrived - most of them badly burned_." In total, the Israeli military killed nine of her 10 children by targeting them at home and burning them to death.
Let's be clear. Hundreds, if not thousands, of bombings on locations Israel designated as safe zones, and forced people to move to under threat of death, before bombing them to death in those safe zones is not an accident--it is intentional policy. This is one reason why ICC prosecutor Karim Khan charged Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu with war crimes. And we see these blazes live streamed right before our eyes. Consider the horrifying images of young Ward Al Sheikh Khalil.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/52b455a5-152b-4c7f-afde-7b796ae46fa8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ward describes how she survived, while 2 of her brothers and her 3 sisters were killed. [Credit: Channel 4 News]
Content warning as below I show the video of a young girl named Ward Al Sheikh Khalil escaping the fires ignited by Israeli night raids. Bombings and fires that crushed and incinerated her loved ones. Ward miraculously survived, while her mother, two brothers, and three sisters did not.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a56dc713-61da-412e-bd54-b0fafb120112?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We see tragic example after tragic example of the Israeli military killing Palestinians by burning them to death. In schools, in hospitals, while they sleep, and while they sit in what is left of their homes. Any fair minded person can see these hundreds, if not thousands, of examples of the Israeli military killing Palestinians by fire and acknowledge that it meets the third definitional criteria of a holocaust.
**Support our human rights efforts and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..W5NM90WjlZxJxkgmPzWb18J9_chRAPraVRThuW3Nyqk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164522706)
## Conclusion
Let's recap this painful discussion. The textbook definition of _holocaust_ is a _ "thorough destruction involving extensive loss of life especially through fire." _Applying this definition to the facts at hand, the Israeli military has:
* Destroyed more than 90% of Gaza
* Killed more than 224,000 Palestinians
* Incinerated Palestinians by fire and explosives with thousands of targeted, deliberate bombings, including in designated safe zones

Based on these documented and irrefutable facts, what other conclusion can we draw but recognize this as the literal dictionary definition of _holocaust_?
And still, no consequences for Netanyahu. Still, the world's most powerful nations--including the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, and Canada--continue to fund this horror, in opposition to the unanimous consensus of genocide scholars that this is genocide, in opposition to their own government reports that Netanyahu is committing war crimes. In my younger years I used to wonder how the world could watch the Holocaust unfold and do nothing? How governments could witness mass extermination and justify their silence with "complicated geopolitics." But now we don't have to wonder. We are living through it. We are watching a genocide unfold on our phones in real time.
A holocaust, live-streamed.
And our elected leaders not only look away--they bankroll it with our tax dollars. The daunting words of comedian and commentator Sammy Obeid come to mind.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5ef163db-184b-4948-ad7d-0d15dd3beb28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For now, if you're reading this, please know this: your voice matters. Your advocacy matters. As Ms. Rachel beautifully said recently, "_You may pay a price for defending Palestinian children. Let it be paid! Their lives are worth more_!" The corporate media has largely turned away, and you won't hear them have the courage to call this what it is--a genocide and a holocaust. But you can be sure that as a human rights lawyer beholden to justice and humanity above all else, I will not hesitate to speak truth to power. I do so for the sake and safety of all humanity--Muslims and Jews alike, people of all faiths and people of no faith alike. I am grateful for your trust, partnership, and support as we navigate these extremely difficult and trying times. Let us keep raising awareness. Keep organizing. Keep calling our members of Congress. Keep shouting the truth until they cannot ignore this genocide and holocaust, and finally end it.
Keep speaking up. Because silence is complicity. And this is not a moment for silence.

Back in December, 2023, the New York Times : Israel claims it protects civilians, but a New York Times investigation found that at least 200 times Israel dropped its most destructive bombs in areas it designated as safe for civilians in Gaza. Another investigation by NBC , that Israel repeatedly forced Palestinian civilians into what they called "safe zones," then bombed those very safe zone, killing by fire and explosives the very people they forced into those trapped locations. How is this in any way different than rounding up civilians into camps, and then killing people in those camps? And these reports were only from the first two months of bombing Gaza. The atrocities that have unfolded since further add to this death toll and mass killing by fire. And then there are the , who as reported, "left her ten children at home when she went to work in the emergency room at the Nasser Medical Complex in southern Gaza. Hours later, the bodies of seven children arrived - most of them badly burned." In total, the Israeli military killed nine of her 10 children by targeting them at home and burning them to death. Let's be clear. Hundreds, if not thousands, of bombings on locations Israel designated as safe zones, and forced people to move to under threat of death, before bombing them to death in those safe zones is not an accident--it is intentional policy. This is one reason why ICC prosecutor Karim Khan charged Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu with war crimes. And we see these blazes live streamed right before our eyes. Consider the horrifying images of young Ward Al Sheikh Khalil. | | ---|---|--- Ward describes how she survived, while 2 of her brothers and her 3 sisters were killed. [Credit: Channel 4 News] Content warning as below I show the video of a young girl named Ward Al Sheikh Khalil escaping the fires ignited by Israeli night raids. Bombings and fires that crushed and incinerated her loved ones. Ward miraculously survived, while her mother, two brothers, and three sisters did not. We see tragic example after tragic example of the Israeli military killing Palestinians by burning them to death. In schools, in hospitals, while they sleep, and while they sit in what is left of their homes. Any fair minded person can see these hundreds, if not thousands, of examples of the Israeli military killing Palestinians by fire and acknowledge that it meets the third definitional criteria of a holocaust. Support our human rights efforts and subscribe. Conclusion Let's recap this painful discussion. The textbook definition of holocaust is a "thorough destruction involving extensive loss of life especially through fire." Applying this definition to the facts at hand, the Israeli military has: Destroyed more than 90% of Gaza Killed more than 224,000 Palestinians Incinerated Palestinians by fire and explosives with thousands of targeted, deliberate bombings, including in designated safe zones Based on these documented and irrefutable facts, what other conclusion can we draw but recognize this as the literal dictionary definition of holocaust? And still, no consequences for Netanyahu. Still, the world's most powerful nations--including the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, and Canada--continue to fund this horror, in opposition to the unanimous consensus of genocide scholars that this is genocide, in opposition to their own government reports that Netanyahu is committing war crimes. In my younger years I used to wonder how the world could watch the Holocaust unfold and do nothing? How governments could witness mass extermination and justify their silence with "complicated geopolitics." But now we don't have to wonder. We are living through it. We are watching a genocide unfold on our phones in real time. A holocaust, live-streamed. And our elected leaders not only look away--they bankroll it with our tax dollars. The daunting words of comedian and commentator Sammy Obeid come to mind. | | ---|---|--- For now, if you're reading this, please know this: your voice matters. Your advocacy matters. As Ms. Rachel beautifully said recently, "You may pay a price for defending Palestinian children. Let it be paid! Their lives are worth more!" The corporate media has largely turned away, and you won't hear them have the courage to call this what it is--a genocide and a holocaust. But you can be sure that as a human rights lawyer beholden to justice and humanity above all else, I will not hesitate to speak truth to power. I do so for the sake and safety of all humanity--Muslims and Jews alike, people of all faiths and people of no faith alike. I am grateful for your trust, partnership, and support as we navigate these extremely difficult and trying times. Let us keep raising awareness. Keep organizing. Keep calling our members of Congress. Keep shouting the truth until they cannot ignore this genocide and holocaust, and finally end it. Keep speaking up. Because silence is complicity. And this is not a moment for silence. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Seattle will be hosting 6 World Cup matches
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Earlier this month, I took a tour of Lumen Field along with representatives from the Seattle World Cup 26 Committee.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108453065/547967079/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDM3NzhkMC0xYzNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GwoV4XTxHX09Kq-rkRD3axiErt3fQ3RDY5XKbFwuhs=&emci=2f4f7247-db34-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a43778d0-1c3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Earlier this month, I took a tour of Lumen Field along with representatives from the Seattle World Cup 26 Committee.** Just over a year from now, Seattle will be hosting 6 World Cup matches, and I wanted to know what we are doing to prepare. **The World Cup games are estimated to bring over 1.4 million people to our region.** And from visitors buying local products, staying in hotels, and dining in restaurants, Northwest Washington is projected to see _tens of millions of dollars_ in investments. The World Cup will be a big opportunity for Northwest Washington to shine, and we need to make sure we have the proper infrastructure in place to support it. Co-hosting the world's largest sporting event with Canada and Mexico will showcase our communities to a global audience and do wonders to promote soccer in the United States. So as a co-chair of the bipartisan Congressional Soccer Caucus, I look forward to working with the White House's newly created World Cup Task Force. An event the size of the World Cup requires coordination across the federal government and with state, local, tribal, and international partners, particularly the co-host nations. Together, we will ensure the FIFA 2026 Men's World Cup is a success. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

body:
I think the answer is, obviously, “NO”... | [](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=d7faf16d806a42eba44fc8f9cb16edf3&_e=6mL6VWjLlMh9tBOjLQc3NO-XCf2imSSmp3I4dVmZatBskZDMeGK7WD7NZ1jC63QxGaXgc2Iz31wlrVqyvcMrJUD6eizQ0g1mxfJato45pAqzI_9FVgBVHRNCxDHCtWM0nz-kC9tVbQurIRsCoyfb40ToHE3CGrUa8FVShBDNQCxw3qo_fa67h0a5oZK2mRU0f4YSVVuKQAOdaGemq370x--WAgCzw-twMmd3jMN3GZyW6WFwyVmXMMYyuUBkAE8wtto5w7AE_9esXXtQK497o-YW06uvmXvJNsLPIyxswzqkuZgs5ogmzazUxvKWJa1wjL5YpUhwOaqC5CHpQ0nxk67SRPy06H8pqkreRLQFKaPwXMLf4JEomnsKYEMeceqR3Q1NIYRoJ_49dyeRaFcsdBf__2hyRsN6C-3qalk_NK3qOlo6v45HaK4RLV7EuBKP)
---
I have a question for you, friend:

_Do you want Democrats to regain control of the House and have the power to impeach President Trump a third time?_

I think the answer is, obviously, “NO”...

But I still have to ask, because even though we’re still in the first half of 2025, Democrats have been raising record millions from their donor base so they can win in November of 2026 and – you guessed it – have the power to impeach President Trump.

So, if Democrats are raising that much to impeach the President, _**why aren’t Republican donors doing everything possible to match their efforts so we can stop them?!**_

I am running against a pro-impeachment Democrat in NV-03 – one of the thirteen Democrat-held House seats that President Trump won in 2026. This is one of the top districts Republicans **MUST flip** to prevent Democrats from retaking the House.

If you want to stop Democrats from having the power to impeach President Trump, [**I NEED YOUR HELP!**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=d7faf16d806a42eba44fc8f9cb16edf3&_e=6mL6VWjLlMh9tBOjLQc3NO-XCf2imSSmp3I4dVmZatBskZDMeGK7WD7NZ1jC63QxGaXgc2Iz31wlrVqyvcMrJUD6eizQ0g1mxfJato45pAqzI_9FVgBVHRNCxDHCtWM0nz-kC9tVbQurIRsCoyfb40ToHE3CGrUa8FVShBDNQCxw3qo_fa67h0a5oZK2mRU0f4YSVVuKQAOdaGemq370x--WAgCzw-twMmd3jMN3GZyW6WFwyVmXMMYyuUBkAE8wtto5w7AE_9esXXtQK497o-YW06uvmXvJNsLPIyxswzopE1mtR1D9EZ8hMgjIO1CVQN-KG76J12MW4Wv1JECVC_t3-yWYyP9EhIl-a0LIOWmI57m5zJVsAuMI-XE43A-AB7RKuoScwOpgtcnk1_BR_oY46M8eoyZtxNwNEMTKYIk3kh2w2UCLsm11TugLWsNF)

_It’s that simple, friend_ , but I fear not enough donors understand this yet. And one of the problems we’re facing now is not having the resources to reach them.

**So, I’m asking you to be one of the early supporters who can help ramp up our campaign and ensure we can reach more supporters.**

[**This battleground seat is a MUST-WIN to stop the Democrats’ impeach plot, and I’m only asking you for $7 today to help me win it.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=d7faf16d806a42eba44fc8f9cb16edf3&_e=6mL6VWjLlMh9tBOjLQc3NO-XCf2imSSmp3I4dVmZatBskZDMeGK7WD7NZ1jC63QxGaXgc2Iz31wlrVqyvcMrJUD6eizQ0g1mxfJato45pAqzI_9FVgBVHRNCxDHCtWM0nz-kC9tVbQurIRsCoyfb40ToHE3CGrUa8FVShBDNQCxw3qo_fa67h0a5oZK2mRU0f4YSVVuKQAOdaGemq370x--WAgCzw-twMmd3jMN3GZyW6WFwyVmXMMYyuUBkAE8wtto5w7AE_9esXXtQK497o-YW06uvmXvJNsLPIyxswzrLvk54xGHpUfg0g1jl6CYBQ-BJPll6dOVoAJNyiEF2bE0vhK5Hq2_YaHtGxiT3-aEQ6MQlvxQrhjDcMoErOHN0J-jPIhVLyhmhuixJ6xGeeSNBjxhng0py7OXoAtZqVg_FiL3wzo8RqGtvXQMXX4ve)

clean_body: I think the answer is, obviously, “NO”... | I have a question for you, friend: Do you want Democrats to regain control of the House and have the power to impeach President Trump a third time? I think the answer is, obviously, “NO”... But I still have to ask, because even though we’re still in the first half of 2025, Democrats have been raising record millions from their donor base so they can win in November of 2026 and – you guessed it – have the power to impeach President Trump. So, if Democrats are raising that much to impeach the President, why aren’t Republican donors doing everything possible to match their efforts so we can stop them?! I am running against a pro-impeachment Democrat in NV-03 – one of the thirteen Democrat-held House seats that President Trump won in 2026. This is one of the top districts Republicans MUST flip to prevent Democrats from retaking the House. If you want to stop Democrats from having the power to impeach President Trump, It’s that simple, friend , but I fear not enough donors understand this yet. And one of the problems we’re facing now is not having the resources to reach them. So, I’m asking you to be one of the early supporters who can help ramp up our campaign and ensure we can reach more supporters. Democrats have been raising millions for several months now, and we’re way behind. to ensure the America First leadership we’ve been enjoying isn’t short-lived. name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Will you take a look at my resume?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m running for the Senate against a politician who, while our streets burned, pushed lawsuits against law enforcement officials

| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd2kjum2m59p7ns4ko3brdd1lofotoql9q6uer78_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)

---

Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjt3tov6q4oandr4ok010jje79q17he7sv049910_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs81ia1g3n6n3rsbadd985h11a4t28k5tmdoeu9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi4seska256c4c0gj0hqvpvo6a82gs3rkjg76jgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4vkhh6rav3hfbhfbsd67unkbkqsjh9qo7ijbhb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuenhdna28ifo698l4sigo4g1uh76jm4qs8037ro_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)

**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z92blf4426lq0227pg9v29ljv6t2184osbfil3mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj7eg3p48rqkuiamsugpoeve318n7bk1idju9q2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)
Here’s what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love.

You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, **[I’m asking you to take a chance on me and support my campaign today, in its infancy, to help me get it off the ground and give us a shot at reclaiming a Senate seat we haven’t held in a generation](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z94qnebke6oh09c14f6ovsuc15pdc3i6l58060u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)**.

This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. **I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive.**

**[Your gift today will give our nascent campaign a fighting shot.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmmhhbkoc6g6d180f686gg0qet7sqja48t288uo8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)**

I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd4d9l106t0akq7am6vjru0kcans1uqv4uardg4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm6as5ckkkl21sof862jml1cdr0a3a4v3ghrkiqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)

**FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA**

| | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhso1aq7hqo82ghc9khuf9e1lua8n3t8a96las2g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekr76dtiesp7ad1hegqracjkmoq37djjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob1cjg66oj246h22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr9ll6eh00vj7nc7g5701fg0qnuvod1gv8mukhs0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge8ob6clh2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1g3hrmu7cffnq0ukvhgnsrpkrl8sml27pgv4da0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr1c3j61p31cpim49fg)

Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Leah, Deb for New Mexico
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I won’t sugar coat it.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2223%2E400544%2EFUA7Ep)
Hi,
My name is Leah — I’m the Finance Director for Deb’s campaign.
**I’m reaching out because our team set a goal to raise $500,000 in May, and our big end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up on Saturday.**
Reaching every one of our fundraising goals is critical to make sure we have the resources it will take to build a fierce movement across New Mexico, spread Deb’s message, and keep our state out of Republican hands.
[**Can you chip in $5 (or anything you can) to help us reach our May fundraising goal? Our campaign relies on grassroots donations from emails just like this one.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250527_1_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250527-2223&refcode2=2223_400544_FUA7Ep&akid=2223%2E400544%2EFUA7Ep)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250527_1_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250527-2223&refcode2=2223_400544_FUA7Ep&akid=2223%2E400544%2EFUA7Ep)**
**We’re building _real_ momentum.** You can feel it in the energy at our events, in the hundreds of first-time volunteers signing up, and in the growing grassroots support from every corner of New Mexico.
But I won’t sugar coat it. This race is already heating up. We now have a Republican opponent, and there’s still a _long_ way to go before this race is over.
**But to run _and_ win, we need to keep up the pace, starting with reaching this critical $500,000 May goal before midnight on May 31st.**
[**We don’t have a lot of time left. So if you can, please pitch in $5, $10, $25, or even $50 today. Every donation helps us reach our goal, grow our campaign, and elect Deb as our next governor.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250527_1_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250527-2223&refcode2=2223_400544_FUA7Ep&akid=2223%2E400544%2EFUA7Ep)
Thank you,
Leah Johnson
Finance Director
Deb for Governor
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250527-1&t=2&refcode2=2223_400544_FUA7Ep&akid=2223%2E400544%2EFUA7Ep)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2223%2E400544%2EFUA7Ep)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Elections matter. Here is the proof
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I believe in this vision, and I’m here today to make the case to you

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._tDKuFhva0ffjDouGmg)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,

It's easy to understand why half of Americans under the age of 40 have a negative view of capitalism - they feel like the system is rigged against them. Thanks to our hard-won Senate majority, my colleagues and I are working to pass a bill that would change the perception of capitalism for those who don't necessarily feel like they've been able to take advantage of it. **_How are we going about it?_** We will start by ensuring their children have the best possible chance at success in the world, starting from the day they're born. We're going to let the magic of the private sector do its thing. We'll put $1,000 in an investment account that tracks the S&P 500, tax-deferred, until the individual reaches the age of 18, upon which they can choose to withdraw the funds or continue making contributions. Family and employers would be able to contribute as well. _**_This once-in-a-generation piece of legislation will transform millions of lives._**_ This, Fellow Conservative, is why elections matter. If Democrats still controlled the majority in the House and Senate, we wouldn't be on the cusp of getting this incredible bill passed into law. _**_This is a perfect example of why we must ensure we have the entirety of Trump 's four years in the White House to pass legislation, like mine, that reminds American voters why we're a center-right country; why capitalism is better than socialism any day of the week, and why they elected us in the first place. _**_ **_ _****As you know, the party in the White House typically loses 4% of its incumbents in a midterm election. If the election were held today, we 'd lose. **** ** **I 'm asking you to chip in $1 or more to help us defend our Senate and House majorities. ****Please, there is no time to waste on this. I need you to act now.** ** ** [**Chip in $1 or more right now >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.) Fellow Conservative, my legislation will benefit Americans who are usually not inclined to invest in the stock market, and here is why that is important. The New Deal propelled Democrats into Congressional supermajorities for decades, resulting in unbreakable, unstoppable voting coalitions that Republicans couldn't compete with. I believe my legislation, which we're championing right now, could pull millions of Americans out of poverty and drastically change the trajectory of future generations. It could also save American taxpayers untold sums of money and ensure a new coalition of Republican capitalists that would dominate American politics for decades to come. This is an example of the transformative legislation voters asked for when voting in Republican majorities in November's election. _**_I hope you 'll consider supporting me and my colleagues as we seek to defend and grow our footprint in Congress in next year's midterm elections. _**_ **[C hip in $1 or more right now >>](http://trk.tedcruz.)**[](http://trk.tedcruz.)[](http://trk.tedcruz._td5cxkyoqn1kQ) To victory, Ted Cruz
---
| | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
---
| | PO Box 25400
Houston, TX 77265
---
| |
---

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
It’s time for merit to make a comeback.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/sTNgiQiisbXfX5awXJOw5mVRA6j3Tv6f_ClCAafH2RDpljkFKYkJmngU7swUvxaBu7Tqn1-YBhqviakVziFtLT_2NE51Mi2Z7oaZhNSwaE1K0BGL4EBPF10Acy2tI4PHwXg8iDczt0aygfIbK47kySQEUzPXH-2PL268LytbjAhHdt0Mqsg_yCjC/bij94xbEgaAY9FpTO-MqZpQTyYC7Iw5a/9)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/-p6HThnr1Tif9kyHF_BsFEzoWSqsza3M16SIi4gxfr90EuvUly7rKbOGYOPVorfQ0vauOvkEeY5aWZZuVDgoMwwPm2CUIZQSHnqEjDEZtMsbMWu84BpTjzRkKpq-kCtdyussRITHzR-1AQqhDFai0wz120Z5xEUU1aHASkAI4VC471sz5p5LJ781lkzq8ym8Xi6Ampg0NIJTnOGOfY95OlaD52jngfibPwJB74AaIxkkbxAiQJrTEdg70umEvFHVyISwgR6lgTMCbGCzYBXs_qdWAtVwPi0m_5tsgKd1irFLeD5gymwW_02UA1LWlX_Li6S1DZRvpUWnU_8fv3cppPRqtGZxg3bKBJNoPG1a_ZfS8wRpZ7Bw7zG7s7UvreRDkOunTv57W4f6F32pKJIhhQ831Biu818mqJUMu4JU-BtOGhn2LoXR2Q/cIBVJqjOCRr2HM2wNvTQqiA5CrZ3jQJB/9)
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That's why I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/flVJ4JKfeqsY6FhQ7esO9Etx4o4RvcO-aN0rKwXtOmcfXmcgqSdQ58mYGWEMNvrfR-8puhzkUL2YLBxWuOaJfZ2cgzpghiucTpButJGG2KGxWaftVAoez5BwFMEiOy42RqNc-vcQytjHbKgQD5u3Y_IM-XTtfmNpg5LuIvEmqLb_WB5jQHQSXfz0TeYHElEuulGjUG6vRzf2dI82FF_7-ZjBEHBWAqnQ3STG6DsZCSqFzqdYPBVd9kWAGv69RVtbP0wBUu9IpQ1aw5FWwtXLfbnncrEFgno5fA93kSFUco-Zbn7w89Gs3_moBW-jrKEOKfO3-G2omQBudf0ofQ_3h75h6W09YV_f1ZfuBWjRo9NwZFMulFCPpFODmTos6VmrTnhtc-z2hs3h90P8HdXnsMKQAR6PQHfSa10DTfbmSyLn7jlHjVmwIw/9vTtiOVUc292-X4iIUtXbr-SaMgNmszY/9).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/riXWpCFooo-T_fxMf--1qa-8Xp5fUFGmQXMt53eC_auQ6Tv261KoNYoWOkRjBZCL12H9LKP26CKsaOABK6ZdQy_50SqTxMwXc5DbsP0lT9pgQYcf9CVlYrlx6-WkxB5ioGIVGPNTcHWk4b7Y4gvQ39FeC1Mv6ZHhZNwhzOGUbBeHVKV4LRS4H9WFBsRHCWUiRbn4Bmz-GdtStxGp2DrGmJqs8y7qD_fPi8t99-rztm1LJRwX9LW9wXacc1lUyMJGZri6FCaF8hxkGO_Z9fROg7lbC_LhMl_PT1meBuamvpU8wkvIqZxtwEyl9HRV9xzWCQb-VJa3lFbOZBbV4J1xdXwmSGfnw7bRE12jtxPp_B9cE6O2JxG_EuuP_IxXs0aMmYqbu6okJ4pvXB6lpb_y9hX4fXn4tGa94bPhdJiO25CA2w-rNy9jTQ/Q0Pfi-ptqQPlCqs5aQ-3kxBDCjbINT9M/9)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/ipFygs-H6Pc3QjyrdrkRSscPJTFyK8_TkGRxBJuATviaeDsJ8qYIAGnJ04jUsWTjXn4eobpfsKtcP0WqeyRJQHzhb60pqR_lCsMZePnlP7z2FfJV04h5ezMFwJjWiz6XlZyJQde9AeX1lgUTQA4Tdj23cY-S8r522PR1YG-Xq2z7bbP9E56oxrz_bvMcxIj63iUBgp-UlY3B6gqtGLw0e2BeohPDzrnyfbqx4uhjUQas3HgtXjfVCkhIkfJfiJb2Ot_TadTxU9Fpwry2wxZbNi9mTz9w3McY4Yu94N-T6ryOXbsEqcFRhaIJ5zywsvHhDhLTyHKtfw8FFXcyZIe1utiBgri-T3iHNle36Q2WD7-2JxKvUs5w-HrwufCOe0kSnk1IDecQoCOZNcaWHyicmLk9I3ysoJzimcl60iGs7otVxh6yI7Tiug/IOsR3C_w63BYL39IJQP_Znr98YUqXad_/9)

Thank you!
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/AVkpV1-uRtPpMaiIlNUr7RUNQbuPUR9lKXZvnOkj_S6hD-qlw-EffaDzAvud0C89FM8CmJ4q_8DNa8PLOiol6k1HCHU7rmxXd_0rl4gqgsyD4j6MtPFhqxsfYJK1opMrbt4xq3GPlMRaUwHn4JdaUr7VDVkGK9wNQ2J5mKnF5-Q-lxaxgAC8OOqEbflU4APndsCHs_xIdR0PcL9BFMm6-YYY0IHCCPHrug/_4Lgv6IBjcCFHhEVjnIBZ3055CfBVIQ_/9)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/sTNgiQiisbXfX5awXJOw5mVRA6j3Tv6f_ClCAafH2RDpljkFKYkJmngU7swUvxaBu7Tqn1-YBhqviakVziFtLT_2NE51Mi2Z7oaZhNSwaE1K0BGL4EBPF10Acy2tI4PHwXg8iDczt0aygfIbK47kySQEUzPXH-2PL268LytbjAhHdt0Mqsg_yCjC/bij94xbEgaAY9FpTO-MqZpQTyYC7Iw5a/9).

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Right now, we’re up against Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress who are more extreme, more dangerous, and more determined than ever to roll back progress for working Americans.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108456014/547978280/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTI2NTRjOS0yNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydWvB4lN_q3-uw5SzGElQavrqgraD9FXTj3kH8zMins=&emci=1e2654c9-243b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2a2654c9-243b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)

| | Right now, we're up against Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress, who are more extreme, more dangerous, and more determined than ever to roll back progress for working Americans. With the end-of-month deadline just days away, we need to send a message loud and clear: our grassroots movement is strong, fired up, and ready to go. This is about more than hitting a number on a fundraising thermometer — it's about showing that people power beats billionaire dollars. Trump's agenda will devastate working families — attacking unions, gutting Medicaid and health care, undermining climate action, and handing more power to corporations and billionaires. Republicans in Congress are lining up behind him, eager to rubber-stamp his every move. **We can't afford to sit back. We know what's at stake.** If we're going to take back the House and take back the Senate, we have to organize harder, mobilize faster, and raise the resources to win — together. [**Can you chip in before our end-of-month deadline to power our grassroots fight? Every dollar helps us push back against Trump's agenda and elect progressive champions up and down the ballot.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108456015/547978288/-2122444374?refcode=2025-05-27-eom&recurring=&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2a2654c9-243b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTI2NTRjOS0yNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydWvB4lN_q3-uw5SzGElQavrqgraD9FXTj3kH8zMins=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108456016/547978290/-2122444374?refcode=2025-05-27-eom&recurring=&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2a2654c9-243b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTI2NTRjOS0yNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydWvB4lN_q3-uw5SzGElQavrqgraD9FXTj3kH8zMins=) Let's keep building the grassroots momentum that meets this moment. clean_body: Right now, we’re up against Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress who are more extreme, more dangerous, and more determined than ever to roll back progress for working Americans. | | | | Right now, we're up against Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress, who are more extreme, more dangerous, and more determined than ever to roll back progress for working Americans. With the end-of-month deadline just days away, we need to send a message loud and clear: our grassroots movement is strong, fired up, and ready to go. This is about more than hitting a number on a fundraising thermometer — it's about showing that people power beats billionaire dollars. Trump's agenda will devastate working families — attacking unions, gutting Medicaid and health care, undermining climate action, and handing more power to corporations and billionaires. Republicans in Congress are lining up behind him, eager to rubber-stamp his every move. We can't afford to sit back. We know what's at stake. If we're going to take back the House and take back the Senate, we have to organize harder, mobilize faster, and raise the resources to win — together. = = Let's keep building the grassroots momentum that meets this moment. Together, we can fight back against the MAGA agenda, win Democratic majorities in the House and Senate, and deliver for working Americans. name: Lee Johnson
subject: Let’s Fire Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108455988/547978058/2109746102?refcode=250527_MFC_Johnson_FireLindseyGraham&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmMyMmU4MC0yNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n31le-g2qHwLR0H8pndc-cPpAYNKQJrVLgv8R51zb5w=) When people tell you who they are, believe them. For years Lindsey Graham has:
* Flip flopped on major issues impacting South Carolinians
* Done anything it takes to stay close to power
* Turned his back on South Carolina.

For over two decades, we’ve watched as Lindsey climbed the ranks in Washington. Lindsey has been focused on his career, not his constituents. It’s time that we do something about it. We know Washington is broken. But I believe America is still a land of opportunity and our best days are still ahead of us. We can build a better future through innovation — but that takes new leaders. In this campaign, I have pledged to not take any corporate PAC money because lawmakers should listen to their constituents, not special interests.. That’s also why I’ve pledged to serve no more than two terms as a Senator - to make sure that leadership in Washington stays fresh and accountable. South Carolina deserves a Senator who will follow through on their promises. [**Chip in whatever you can, split with Seth Moulton, and help us build that coalition of South Carolinians that believe in unity and civility.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108455989/547978061/2036686014?refcode=250527_MFC_Johnson_FireLindseyGraham&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmMyMmU4MC0yNDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n31le-g2qHwLR0H8pndc-cPpAYNKQJrVLgv8R51zb5w=) Together we can help turn this ship around, send Lindsey Graham packing, and take a step towards building a better South Carolina together. Thanks,
Lee Johnson
Candidate for U.S. Senate

Last week, House Republicans rammed through a budget with billions in cuts to critical programs including Medicaid, Medicare, food assistance, and more – just to hand out more tax breaks to billionaires and massive corporations. **It’s cruel. It’s corrupt. And we can stop it by flipping the House.** That starts by defending Derek’s seat in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the country – we flipped this GOP-held seat back in November by only 653 votes.

**[So we’re asking you directly: Will you chip in $3 to help us meet our end-of-month goal? clean_body: | = Last week, House Republicans rammed through a budget with billions in cuts to critical programs including Medicaid, Medicare, food assistance, and more – just to hand out more tax breaks to billionaires and massive corporations. It’s cruel. It’s corrupt. And we can stop it by flipping the House. That starts by defending Derek’s seat in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the country – we flipped this GOP-held seat back in November by only 653 votes. = | = Hitting this goal will send a clear message: We aren’t backing down, no matter how much MAGA super PAC cash and attacks head our way. Here’s what else sets our campaign apart: Unlike many in Washington, Derek refuses to take a cent from Big Pharma or Oil. Instead, he’s putting the people he was elected to serve first, not bowing to billionaires and special interests. name: Sherrod
subject: why I wear this canary pin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dignity of Work PAC
body:
This reminds me what we're fighting for.
| | |
---
Can I tell you a story, friend? Many years ago, at a Workers' Memorial Day rally, a steelworker named Dominic gave me a pin depicting a yellow canary in a birdcage.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108456290/547979201/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk25-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDJhYWQzMy0yNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jBfBPzp8CIPe-mGt8CzYD3norU9MkRe8yYbnC3dknrc=)
Most of you know the story -- coal miners used to have to carry canaries down into the mines with them to warn them of poisonous gasses. Back then, they didn't have a union strong enough or a government that cared enough to protect them. They were on their own.
Together, we changed that. We passed worker safety laws and overtime pay. We banned child labor. We passed clean air and safe drinking water laws. We enacted Social Security and Medicare, workers’ rights, women’s rights, and civil rights. But now, I fear we're going backward.
**Americans are working harder than ever with less to show for it. **Costs are going up, wages are stagnant, and our president is pushing chaotic policies that are making things even worse.
**So I continue to wear my canary pin for the same reason I started the Dignity of Work PAC: Because when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. Too many of our leaders today seem to have forgotten that.**
**[That's why I'm counting on you to chip in $5 or more now so we can invest in candidates nationwide who will put workers first. Together, we can give workers what they deserve: a government that's on their side and a country where all work is valued. Are you with me, friend?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108456291/547979202/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk25-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDJhYWQzMy0yNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jBfBPzp8CIPe-mGt8CzYD3norU9MkRe8yYbnC3dknrc=)**

# [Tell the Senate to vote NO on Trump’s “big beautiful bill”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d3e2fd5-75ab-48e3-9b2a-8a23fa3487fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bbc6fd3-c8b0-4312-a1dc-14d9f9110fe7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | House Republicans narrowly passed Trump's disastrous spending bill, which he's calling his "big, beautiful bill," by just one vote. This bill would add $2.3 trillion to the federal deficit over 10 years and revoke Medicaid benefits for 8.6 million people. Now this awful bill heads to the Senate, and we need them to vote NO. Some Republican senators have voiced opposition to certain parts of the bill, but we need the Senate to fully REJECT this bill that would be a disaster for our economy and for millions of Americans that rely on important programs that this bill cuts or restricts. [**Tell Republicans to show some backbone, and join with Democrats to vote NO on Trump's "big, beautiful bill."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4548b07a-a87c-4b4f-81ce-ff0d0626ba19/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Peter,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe...
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Peter...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/v_zXTs0bJo_CShpD2fsTwACJwuM-xlOTmFKY_kB9lZkjEI9DqqkgPrOOdv1VSxfPuZtQ0TqcvCOxNcelDGmcjzuokkXBGfXV0DCV16VSAzHKN5RjQaT6gFWlgZ7dgiyH3masMSRizqL8HhCsjuR_i3x64PUJrVPzJbi1oXHSHQWT41iP4l-zzjiqwxTTxs76MENEOEHqgbW9Dk-wnGkNL2XTPnraPV-ON0qHEpw2zuATkJsoYTRc-_JubShNL5R-pmvLEFsHct2cjJ0-KB6ofsDpMHSB5GM7BPU84HUTTcvilxZbiT3Q_3uBkyp3BWgCT_0-DQfWuIR-TlmN-YEk_1dNKxkjxWn4JjwpFk9FKMNSFO5uZmRkteId7BfsMp1EiEPesQ2GUrmDE0BxLqPDjcl2JCwLnWXA3u1ZFs7i4EYqtrUCXkEm_imSVh4rVWu5xkWtLTmkzP6kxzYvpyw6Q9LaF78Zvd-_LUmPq8jsx0tI42N9tEHHhvuJCpnrhg/wA1aUgOrbJzjWrYLhaiUJMECBnNK-YJU/9)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me WIN the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice against the Deep State as they attempt to JAIL me for the rest of my life in Arizona.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/IJ59JLXDlZiLNxMBrwC8759k9S29h60qmzn3Qokwd5yKncni2T2bvH4fbm5_ZgurP8PqzUkbQ3FUiX4upNIougJaTytyopFtDIWWL2z6KcxYXJOEbqT8mUBmhfBNi04HfPPrh_XyTIzhMj4bFNMa-lSLfD0O2IrkNGGA1jX2uh9eTxGaQHoUVpwE5SWJvK98PyZR271ht_MghbOrWxSmDJXikunnELsImq6aIiN7SIqydYZLNgfAGJemG6qwgsUnvNgzQasK4HBJM80y_auqWl3rithZ4mcqtzfLqZcopNwWh94DGyU-cypAPiECfkhkfxvoRF2cH-XzYh9BWxid7DNVMA0emQ7C-SuBDDoRWotQXXsOjVddDh7jhdCnYLfdY1mdol-xrSK_OYzSnoua2k26H4-ce6pGOSiRyZ0NFhOWWrSNiSsqdWVApDI7uTvvILAFq_Mmn1h-EMW6uvwIN-X5_E4Q1vn41XEYKTZ2vWtYO5sQQYb7NDvuGjFvwg/MxFMXQGAYqgaXdkkLvyWRgLtAvkmFjYQ/9)

clean_body: ........................ | Peter, All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a helper. I helped take down the mob in New York... I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th... I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable. Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like YOU. But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [MSNBC] “Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection” [CNBC] “Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” [New York Times] And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ FINAL sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask you to help me. That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Peter... Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core. But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE. Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a state-level charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old! My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump. And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell! Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies. And the ONLY way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to it. ...Just ask President Trump! The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under booking # 2313757. So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

name: circling back: (DOTL)
subject: Are you against a Trump impeachment?!?!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
we heard NOTHING from you, Peter!

|
---
Peter,

We reached out earlier about Jamie Raskin’s effort to impeach Donald Trump for executive overreach...**and we heard NOTHING from you!**

We’re hoping that this is a system error, so we’re nudging you again to sign the “Impeach Trump” petition before our extended deadline at 11:59pm tonight!

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: I’m starting with nothing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m running for the Senate against a politician who, while our streets burned, pushed lawsuits against law enforcement officials

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2oal3h50907ame87mssgoeh5k1gvfkahmei2hkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)

---

Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zon0ml43omnu1vgvuokrju1mf01e3gub9vitii6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4l2lhqmrfo6jkashh471p7lroih73bae5qs7mpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8sscmhafr2nptkbsqhde3es9uist70b3vnq2nqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ln1airq6q5re1f6m1u3mi8ehq1ktj2ct5hmt1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrrkhg8qepj95toirpeu3v7oc8pdsf1fh3cpie2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)

**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfag107mud3jua3gbeladlvaf67dfk57k1tq5b7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zarisrohtjl3o2mu0nr3n3g6qtvg8310e1jonatg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)
Here’s what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love.

You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, **[I’m asking you to take a chance on me and support my campaign today, in its infancy, to help me get it off the ground and give us a shot at reclaiming a Senate seat we haven’t held in a generation](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvaol1ef9hj1nc2gpc79715pt8blhl3ciqo8bpjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)**.

This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. **I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive.**

**[Your gift today will give our nascent campaign a fighting shot.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5958bb4b5q7prj1617m6tue4tm90pi4ejquqad0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)**

I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpvoc1tqlvktcj88jvjskeogtk1u7tngdl2u4nh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeqqohvtov6s9b7n66s3qgpg3aqmpn8tsmo5ou50_rp22sh2s8i6eob0spge2p32cth2bs)

**FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA**

| | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Since our founding, we've helped thousands of women step up and run for office — many of them first-time candidates who went on to become mayors, state legislators, and members of Congress.

clean_body: Emerge is on a mission to change the face of power — by training and electing Democratic women who are ready to lead. | = | | | Emerge is transforming politics — and you can be part of it. | = Peter, Emerge is on a mission to change the face of power — by training and electing Democratic women who are ready to lead. Since our founding, we've helped thousands of women step up and run for office — many of them first-time candidates who went on to become mayors, state legislators, and members of Congress. Now, with Trump back in office and our rights under attack, we’re expanding our work to meet the moment. And we need supporters like you to help make it happen. = | = This is your chance to be part of something bigger than any one election. Together, we can build lasting progressive power from the ground up. Thanks for believing in this movement, Sandra Bishop Chief Development Officer, Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: New Dems:
subject: Clooney predicts a Democratic House in 2026!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
New Dems are the key to flipping the House

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108457611/547984606/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDNiNGZhZS0yODNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dJSwpv5ORXrDwCf4ICfc8D3vgQ7sbaqTK0RLHuoskO8=)
---

clean_body: A NEW POLL, taken days after I launched my campaign to defeat Jon Ossoff, shows we’re inside the margin of error with 13% of voters still undecided. | Fellow Conservative, A NEW POLL , taken days after I launched my campaign to defeat Jon Ossoff, shows we’re inside the margin of error with 13% of voters still undecided. That means this race is virtually tied. But there’s a catch and it’s a big one: Jon Ossoff already has $11 million in the bank and he’s raising millions more to pull ahead and stop our momentum. We’re setting a goal of raising $75,000 from grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours to maintain our momentum and overtake Jon Ossoff in the polls. Georgia is the #1 Senate race in the country and we have an opportunity to take the lead early. Missing this chance would hand Jon Ossoff and the Democrats momentum. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. Join the mission by pitching in $10 to help John defeat Jon Ossoff and win the #1 Senate race in the country. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. body:
You need to see this:
| **🚨 BREAKING: DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90412?t=6&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O) Bernie Sanders is LEADING the charge to take on Trump and save our Democracy. We’re _THRILLED!_

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already attacking him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90412?t=7&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90412?t=8&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90412?t=9&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90412?t=10&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19961%2E878179%2EGGZ20O)

I’m fighting to protect our clean energy future, lower energy costs, and ensure a livable planet for the next generation — but with these devastating cuts on the table, I need your support to show that WE are on the winning side. Our May fundraising deadline is right around the corner, so I’m humbly asking:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for fueling my fight for our planet and our future. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. **A brand new poll shows Jocelyn beating _every_ potential candidate in the Michigan governor’s race.**

**The numbers are clear: Jocelyn Benson is the strongest, most electable candidate in the race.**

clean_body: I mean it. | = = But before I do, I want to give you three good reasons why you should consider chipping in: 1️⃣: Your contribution makes a real difference. Every dollar you give empowers us to challenge the overwhelming influence of the fossil fuel industry in politics, making space for climate champions who will prioritize our planet's future. 2️⃣: Time is running out. Scientists warn we have just a few years left to significantly reduce planet-warming carbon emissions to avoid the worst impacts of the climate crisis. Your donation helps us act now before it’s too late. 3️⃣: Meeting our goal is a must. To expand our grassroots movement, we can't afford to fall short of this goal. Your support is vital in enabling us to reach more people with our message, strengthen our collective voice, and amplify our impact as we combat the climate crisis in key elections across the country in 2025 and beyond. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s fight like hell, together, Jane Fonda | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
