name: Jena
subject: Almost there…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Friends - I am bumping my team’s email from the weekend because your endorsement is just that important.
We are trying to get 500 new endorsements before we end the month of May. While endorsements from elected officials and community leaders are important, it is just as important to know folks like you are on our team.
Knowing that you have my back in this race means so much to me, and I know that winning is a team effort. I couldn’t have gotten this far without you, and I can’t win in 2026 unless we work together.
So, read our message below and take a minute to complete your endorsement today! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/X2R814ZkoUO_3vTXWDTXng2]
Thank you so much,
Jena
----- original message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250525-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250525-email]
Peter -
Jena is running for Attorney General with one goal: to stand up for the people of Colorado and protect our rights, freedoms, and future.
And people are taking notice. Over 130 current and former elected officials, unions and community leaders across the state are stepping up to endorse Jena’s campaign—because they know she has the experience, courage, and commitment to get the job done.
Before the end of May, we are trying to get 500 more community endorsements from supporters like you.
It couldn’t be easier to get involved, Peter. Click this link and fill out the quick endorsement form, and you’ll have done your part to help us get 500 endorsements before 5/31. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/X2R814ZkoUO_3vTXWDTXng2]
ENDORSE JENA [https://secure.ngpvan.com/X2R814ZkoUO_3vTXWDTXng2]Whether it’s fighting for reproductive freedom, standing up to Donald Trump and MAGA extremists, or holding powerful interests accountable, Jena has always put Coloradans first.
Your voice matters. Public endorsements show the momentum behind this campaign and send a clear message that Colorado is ready for bold, pro-democracy leadership. That is why we are trying to get 500 new community endorsements before the end of the month.
Be part of our team and help us reach 500 more endorsements by adding your name today >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/X2R814ZkoUO_3vTXWDTXng2]
– Jena For CO
Jena Griswold is running for Attorney General because Colorado needs a strong, proven leader in this critical moment. She'll stand up to Donald Trump to protect our rights and freedoms. She’ll fight for working- and middle-class Coloradans, hold big corporations accountable, and safeguard our land, air, and water.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250525-email]
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

Friend, Florida is the tip of the spear in the battle to secure our borders and enforce our laws. Under my leadership, we’ve taken **bold, decisive action** to protect our communities and uphold the rule of law. It started with Operation Tidal Wave, a historic crackdown that led to the arrest of over 1,100 illegal aliens in just five days. **This wasn’t just a win for Florida—it was a wake-up call for the nation.**
---

And we passed the strongest immigration enforcement legislation in the country, sending a clear message: __Florida will not tolerate illegal immigration.__ **Operation Tidal Wave was so successful that the federal government is now racing to replicate our model nationwide, with plans to roll out a similar program in the next 60 days.**** **

clean_body: bold, decisive action| | | Friend, Florida is the tip of the spear in the battle to secure our borders and enforce our laws. Under my leadership, we’ve taken bold, decisive action to protect our communities and uphold the rule of law. It started with Operation Tidal Wave, a historic crackdown that led to the arrest of over 1,100 illegal aliens in just five days. This wasn’t just a win for Florida—it was a wake-up call for the nation. How did we do it? Florida banned sanctuary cities, ensuring no corner of our state harbors lawbreakers. We deputized more state and local law enforcement officers to work hand-in-hand with ICE, multiplying our strength. And we passed the strongest immigration enforcement legislation in the country, sending a clear message: Florida will not tolerate illegal immigration. Operation Tidal Wave was so successful that the federal government is now racing to replicate our model nationwide, with plans to roll out a similar program in the next 60 days. Florida is leading the way, showing the country what it means to prioritize the safety and security of our citizens, but this fight is far from over. The radical left and open-border activists are pushing back, trying to undermine our efforts and flood our nation with unchecked illegal immigration. We can’t let them win. That’s why I’m calling on YOU to stand with me today. This is a defining moment. Florida has lit the fuse, and the nation is watching. Will you join me in this historic fight? For Florida and our future, Governor Ron DeSantis P.S. The success of Operation Tidal Wave is just the beginning. With your support, we’ll keep the pressure on and make Florida’s model the gold standard for the nation. | | | | | | Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC). Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate’s Committee. www.ronpac.com | | 5550 Glades Road, Suite 500 Tallahassee, FL 32315 |

body:
I'm not here to play politics, I'm here to prosecute criminals.| | | Friend, While Democrats push to defund the police and let violent criminals walk, I am standing with law enforcement — and _**delivering results that are saving lives. **_

_**Jay Jones**_ voted against holding fentanyl dealers accountable — even when their poison was killing Virginians. Jones even called for ending qualified immunity, opening law enforcement up to lawsuits just for doing their jobs.

_**Shannon Taylor**_ brags about being a “progressive prosecutor” after gutting her office of veteran prosecutors to chase a political agenda.

_**I am not here to play politics, I am here to prosecute criminals, stand with our police, and keep Virginians safe.**_

While others turn their backs on law enforcement, I will always salute the badge and **back the blue.**

__[_**Help me protect our law enforcement.**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/9DO5bdgw8jshCMntfz6TGtbgLVAZwWdNExkJkYGLTYT8JwgE4X2H7yj-kkEabN5ewuKhQkBJd0TO12G34zySVeNcLQ5O8SK1eieLCXg5u8oDQ231kjo3RaMNhOggAH6Is7iPTTEXEI7MwWddgRHYhDpxTE_w3DJSjoBiEXGQ_o_x1V4RnhCBEzpVgwbQLb7UmKgDm34A2SBK1Fp-c1TrP_T6Su1vhWX7-ljVVz9HruezNFq5MNGDZC_1LzfGt0PMQYP0RmywMlaJ9TfSTjb0_cddXSCRNv_oVhpQdKi_496G85d-xXfto2jKK3CxyXtQRf6N5gaIdK7zfX-jWMvbjVtyLqGNoz5GRmNlt5hCQzmt2OpJNbVlbm8_qXw/GDFNysB8jmeLj9D0Veoqx6EefCoI9jWq/9)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I am 35 years sober
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108459909/547992422/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250527_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU1N2I5ZGYtMmMzYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cLXVYKZhGTlgy74BVYnuzEDrWdQhS1wmyu9KbhYPFx0=)
---
Hi, it’s Deb Haaland. The Arizona Democratic Party said I could reach out, and I’m so grateful for the chance to connect with you. I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: **I have reached 35 years of sobriety.** Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different. I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction. My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress, which aired 7 years ago this week. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for saying that in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me. **My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.** Crime, poverty, homelessness, and addiction are weighing heavy on New Mexico, and I intend to tackle those challenges head-on as governor. I promise to be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal. Thank you for hearing my story. And I want to thank the Arizona Democratic Party for their support. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. **[If you can, I’d be grateful if you’d split a donation between my campaign for governor and Arizona Democrats today. name: Eric Burlison
subject: SCOTUS Could END Birthright Citizenship
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/s6UBDoTO5Js8DkFsTXVBrKc_PIvo2ZWBXmdvKUbMCLO7COQ871ofmfukASTVmee22jGIn5q2HVdE6YYn0WKCuVu8Fgie5sP278lXbVKxSBlH0n1-Uc9B-wokvxqrT3vhfJ6rQR9SQvSHAi-LgYcdHpKX-fC1z68Huvt1uf80L_5R4k3zDmMzR8tTO0Rq1ENUbh22AjOq3cRSey4XATC6kKV8cN_cZWtw35tX1c5WxZdzKbCZCnWzGcD27Zk2qrMXVaPNkWKt-l0-RFVcgbipKwgciBcEhC5U8KiqerydQntW9DhH-erUz9dJb5l1siuub8RqAgIBqfnUwbt4UEZfkg7XgHlW_jBhr5vw2-BlnlCmemuba1OvslphKeVqcAj0l5esPoqE6_pDINXa1_mfFjDiqWfNI5ucAhABbNnSgk7gtYBB-bCjk_vws8TY4QdgX_kxPDdqTz5T84_FOA2YQFK2y35iNW1hB3_ZYgm4YXqA4cYeRXPBZLt_akKQ2GINrmSu2-L6/IGpPwxta0xFt2HRtkAc8FjncShm7XONs/9)

**

**🚨**PATRIOT ALERT: MAJOR SCOTUS CASE UNDERWAY**

**Peter** , Congressman Eric Burlison here--**and I need your immediate attention.**

Right now, the Supreme Court is considering a case that could finally END birthright citizenship for illegal immigrants.

_**This has been one of the biggest loopholes in our immigration system.**_

**Here 's how it works:**

👉 Foreign nationals cross our border illegally
👉 They give birth on American soil
👉 That child is instantly granted citizenship

The result?

# [Get Well Soon President Biden](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=164580469&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTgwNDY5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgzNzI4MTAsImV4cCI6MTc1MDk2NDgxMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ll4_xTtjHeO2ihy7QsACSJmVCAN-cu044bA_CJUxbCw)
### But the President May Have Had a Better Prognosis if He Were Treated
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| May 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=164580469&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTgwNDY5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0ODM3MjgxMCwiZXhwIjoxNzUwOTY0ODEwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzY1MjAxIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.SU4l-eGMygU0DjXJ7giOt2rOljLIwkvtrJhi6N8qZqE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

May 27, 2025
President Biden's staff just announced that he suddenly developed metastatic prostate cancer. But what would truly be disgusting is if President Biden's handlers refused to have his prostate cancer treated early in order to keep political power. Is this possible? Let's analyze the facts.
President Biden's personal office stated the following:

"Last _week, President Joe Biden was seen for a new finding of a prostate nodule after experiencing increasing urinary symptoms. On Friday he was diagnosed with prostate cancer, characterized by a Gleason score of 9 (Grade Group 5) with metastasis to the bone. While this represents a more aggressive form of the disease, the cancer appears to be hormone-sensitive ... "_

Dr Ezekiel Emanuel is a prominent oncologist and brother of Rahm Emanuel. Rahm is a Clinton confident who was also the former Democratic major of Chicago. Ezekiel himself advised President Biden on COVID. According to this doctor:

"_He 's [Biden][ had this [prostate cancer] for many years](https://substack.com/redirect/99558dbe-d893-4073-949d-e802ad7844a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), maybe even a decade, growing there and spreading. He did not develop it in the last 100 to 200 days."_
Dr. David Shusterman, a New York City urologist [stated:](https://substack.com/redirect/c5419e63-a825-45e9-a686-46fc4f4996a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_" The fact that we just find it at a Gleason nine [a very aggressive cancer] is just pretty much unheard of in this day and age of medicine. This is what I typically would see in a VA hospital, where a patient hasn't had medical attention in 10 years, presents to an emergency room with bone pain, and then they find that it's metastatic prostate cancer."_
Our mendacious media is now in a self-flagellating mode for hiding President Biden's dementia and Parkinson's. In fact, one of the biggest protectors of conservative attacks on Biden's health during his presidency was CNN's Jack Tapper. Now Tapper is making millions on a book he co-authored entitled _Original Sin: President Biden's Decline, Its Cover-Up, and His Disastrous Choice to Run Again_. Only in America does such hucksterism pay off.
But the million-dollar question is: Did Biden's handlers and doctors also hide President Biden's prostate cancer, and would treatment have prevented the hideous side effect of bone metastases?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8fd3e984-8b1f-4e51-9896-5a465eb9df16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Former President Biden and his wife Jill in a photo taken in May, 2025.
First some quick background. The prostate gland is a spherical tissue that encircles the tube - the urethra - that connects the bladder to the penis. It produces seminal fluid, the liquid that mixes with spermatozoa to form sperm

As men age, the prostate gland may grow and restrict the urethra's circumference, thus causing increased episodes of urination. It also frequently becomes cancerous and 80% of men 80 and over have prostate cancer.

But prostate cancer is more benign in older men. Thus, urologists and oncologists are constantly debating who should be treated, what these treatments should be and whether it is worth screening for prostate cancer and at what age this should be done.

Screening for prostate cancer is done with a blood test called a PSA (Prostate Specific Antigen), a protein that is normally secreted by the prostate gland but increases in prostate cancer. The problem is that this test is notoriously non-specific and can be elevated by trauma to the prostate gland - e.g. riding a bicycle - or recent sexual activity.

Furthermore, the treatment of prostate cancer has frequent devastating side effects - impotence, incontinence (both to urine and feces) and leg swelling - being the most common. Thus, [doctors constantly debate ](https://substack.com/redirect/be39e308-09e4-418c-b17e-bdddac8757dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)whether it is worth the risk of exposing the patients to these unpleasantries in a disease that is often non-fatal, especially in the elderly.

As one urologist stated, the PSA is a great test as long as it is normal.
According to the President Biden's handlers, the former president's PSA was last checked [in 2014. ](https://substack.com/redirect/7bc2ffea-3b6b-4dee-91f6-27b04c8d7712?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)This is highly unlikely. While the current recommendation of the US [Preventive Services Task Force (USPSTF)](https://substack.com/redirect/6c457cb3-d542-480a-8817-c08fb51ba971?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is not the check the PSA after age 69, this was not the case in 2014 when most males [over the age of 69](https://substack.com/redirect/be39e308-09e4-418c-b17e-bdddac8757dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) were routinely screened. And this man was both Vice-President and President of the United States.

Thus, the overwhelming odds is that President Bidens's PSA was checked, found to be elevated and prostate cancer was highly suspected. Biden, his doctors and handlers either refused to do the necessary biopsy for a definitive diagnosis or did the biopsy and refused to disclose the positive results so he could run again in 2024. Then the disastrous debate with President Trump occurred and exposed his dementia, knocking him out of the race.
What really happened? We may never know. But many doctors - myself included - believe that if President Biden had been diagnosed with prostate cancer and had been treated aggressively, the hideous complications of bones metastases could have been prevented.
And bone metastases are very painful. Bones have a huge number of pain sensitive nerve fibers, as anyone who has broken a bone knows. The poor former President is going to be subject to brutal chemotherapy and radiation therapy to keep him comfortable.
The chattering classes are babbling about the cover-up of Biden's health problems, but the average American looks to the future, not the past, and this will not be a major political issue in future elections.

But if Biden's handlers knowingly sacrificed President Biden's health so that they could surreptitiously run the country with autopen, they are truly evil people.

Furthermore, the treatment of prostate cancer has frequent devastating side effects - impotence, incontinence (both to urine and feces) and leg swelling - being the most common. Thus, it is worth the risk of exposing the patients to these unpleasantries in a disease that is often non-fatal, especially in the elderly. As one urologist stated, the PSA is a great test as long as it is normal. According to the President Biden's handlers, the former president's PSA was last checked is highly unlikely. While the current recommendation of the US is not the check the PSA after age 69, this was not the case in 2014 when most males were routinely screened. And this man was both Vice-President and President of the United States. Thus, the overwhelming odds is that President Bidens's PSA was checked, found to be elevated and prostate cancer was highly suspected. Biden, his doctors and handlers either refused to do the necessary biopsy for a definitive diagnosis or did the biopsy and refused to disclose the positive results so he could run again in 2024. Then the disastrous debate with President Trump occurred and exposed his dementia, knocking him out of the race. What really happened? We may never know. But many doctors - myself included - believe that if President Biden had been diagnosed with prostate cancer and had been treated aggressively, the hideous complications of bones metastases could have been prevented. And bone metastases are very painful. Bones have a huge number of pain sensitive nerve fibers, as anyone who has broken a bone knows. The poor former President is going to be subject to brutal chemotherapy and radiation therapy to keep him comfortable. The chattering classes are babbling about the cover-up of Biden's health problems, but the average American looks to the future, not the past, and this will not be a major political issue in future elections. But if Biden's handlers knowingly sacrificed President Biden's health so that they could surreptitiously run the country with autopen, they are truly evil people. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Joseph Bentivegna 541 Cromwell Avenue, Rocky Hill, CT 06067 ? ?

clean_body: Rising grocery prices and a volatile stock market are all happening while we watch our retirement savings dwindle. Who’s responsible for this chaos? A Republican majority in Washington. | Peter, = Rising grocery prices and a volatile stock market are all happening while we watch our retirement savings dwindle. Who’s responsible for this chaos? A Republican majority in Washington. They control the House, the Senate, and the Presidency. And instead of using that power to help everyday Americans, they’re tanking our economy, they’re fighting with our allies, and they’re robbing us of our security. All the while, they’re trying to tell us that everything’s fine. The coward caucus is afraid to stand up to Trump. And, what’s worse, they’re trying to blame everything on Democrats. Well, we’re here to tell you the truth. No spin, no bullsht , just an honest explanation of what’s going on in Washington and what that means for you and your family. As the Chair of Bold PAC, I’m standing up to Trump and his cronies by electing Democrats up and down the ballot. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Linda | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez PO BOX 4006 Whittier, CA 90607 United States | = = Congresswoman Linda Sánchez has dedicated her life to improving the community where she grew up and making Southern California a better place to live and work for generations to come. body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1011&refcode=email-20250527_v&akid=8555%2E5885482%2EOtaPrh ]Our Revolution logo

BREAKING: NPR and three Colorado public radio stations just filed suit
against Trump, arguing his relentless attempt to usurp Congress’ authority
to defund public media is a violation of the first amendment.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29455?source=email-20250527&t=1060&akid=8555%2E5885482%2EOtaPrh ]Headline: NPR sues Trump over Executive Order slashing federal funding

It comes just days after the Corporation for Public Broadcasting (CPB)
amended its bylaws to protect its board from political firings after Trump
tried to seize control by firing the leadership at the CPB – the
organization responsible for funding NPR, PBS, and local public media
across America.

These are bold, courageous moves – but our beloved public media can't hold
out alone. Which is why Our Revolution is mobilizing supporters nationwide
to protect NPR and PBS and uphold our independent media – but with more
threats coming every day, we urgently need your support to scale up our
work.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250527nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8555%2E5885482%2EOtaPrh ]Will you chip in now to power Our Revolution's work defending public media
from Trump's assault?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

This isn't some abstract fight – it's about safeguarding our democracy
itself. Trump knows the truth-telling and accountability journalism from
NPR and PBS threaten his authoritarian impulses...which is EXACTLY why he's
determined to silence them.

If he succeeds, we’ll lose more than television and radio shows – we risk
losing the bedrock of independent journalism, accountability for powerful
interests, and vital educational content. Trump must not be allowed to
silence voices and institutions that hold truth and democracy as core
principles.

Our Revolution is mobilizing grassroots networks, pressuring members of
Congress, and building the public resistance needed to thwart these
extremist attacks on public media. We’ve beaten back threats against
public broadcasting before, and with your support, we’ll do it again.

But we cannot succeed without urgent funding. Your immediate donation will

name: Senator Jennifer B. Boysko
subject: Meet Freedom Virginia - Wednesday Evening
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfc-boysko-septfunding?&refcode=tfc-em27-SeptFund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfc-boysko-septfunding?&refcode=tfc-em27-SeptFund]
Dear Peter,
Please join me tomorrow evening to learn more about the advocacy organization Freedom Virginia. I am honored to be named one of their Legislators of the Year. We have worked closely together on legislation to bring Paid Family and Medical Leave to Virginia.
Freedom Virginia is a nonpartisan 501(c)4 organization committed to ensuring a commonwealth where hardworking people have the freedom to thrive in an affordable and fair economy. Freedom Virginia advances economic security policies through grassroots activism, voter engagement, and legislative advocacy. They've fought for a more fair and affordable Virginia by sharing real stories about Virginians’ access to affordable health care, education, housing, and the need for policies that foster an economy where hardworking people can get ahead.
I look forward to seeing you all tomorrow.
Kindest regards,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2025%20May/electronic%20signature.png]
Jennifer B. Boysko
Member, Senate of Virginia
Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church)
PS If you would like to support my work, please visit my fundraising page [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb27-website] .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2025%20May/unnamed%20%2824%29.jpg]
Friends of Jennifer Boysko
PO Box 247
Herndon, VA 20172
United States

POLITICO: Nancy Pelosi’s midterms mission By DUSTIN GARDINER and BLAKE JONES Presented by California Environmental Voters
---
Former Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Pelosi has made defending federal health care programs her focus as she tries to help Democrats take back the House in the 2026 midterms. | Tom Brenner/Getty Images
---
THE BUZZ: GROUND GAME — Former Speaker **Nancy Pelosi** has a go-to line these days to criticize Rep. **David Valadao** : He could be the “one vote that cut Medicaid” by backing Republicans' megabill to bolster President Donald Trump’s domestic agenda.
Pelosi, in her post-speaker act as San Francisco’s representative in Congress, has made defending federal health care programs her key focus as she tries to help Democrats flip the House next year. She regularly targets battleground Republicans like Valadao — who, as Pelosi will note, “has close to 500,000 people on Medicaid” in his Central Valley district. About 64 percent of his constituents were enrolled in the program as of last August.
“I know the grassroots of California down to the last blade of grass. These people have made themselves really vulnerable,” Pelosi told Playbook in an extended interview. “We’re not doing this in the San Francisco Bay area, we’re doing this in the districts where the Republicans are.”
More than a year ahead of the midterms, she’s deploying her volunteer army to target GOP members in swing seats, including Valadao, Orange County Rep. **Young Kim** and Riverside County Rep. **Ken Calvert**. Pelosi’s Save Our Health Care campaign, part of her national PAC, is organizing multiple phone banks per week to target those vulnerable Republicans, and she’s raised more than $5.5 million this year to help boost the effort via the DCCC and her campaign committees.
Pelosi’s team said her volunteer events — including support from the state party and labor unions — have produced 140,000 phone calls to voters in those districts in the last six weeks. Volunteers urge voters to call Republican offices on Capitol Hill to protest proposed cuts to Medicaid, food stamps and other safety-net programs. Pelosi’s offensive is part of a volley of attacks Democrats have launched against Republicans over their push to slash safety-net spending.
The effort is reminiscent of Democrats’ strategy during the 2018 midterms, when GOP efforts to gut Obamacare led to a blue-wave year during Trump’s first term (when Democrats flipped 40 seats in the House). Pelosi, who championed the Affordable Care Act and has led a yearslong effort to protect the law, was the architect of the party’s successful strategy to flip control of the House that cycle.
...
Pelosi argues a midterm cycle comparable to 2018 is already taking shape and that House Republicans sealed their fate last week when they narrowly passed Trump’s budget megabill on a 215-214 vote. The bill’s proposed changes to the Medicaid program, including new work requirements, would likely cause millions of recipients to lose coverage.
Valadao, Calvert and Kim have argued the bill protects crucial health care benefits for children, seniors, individuals with disabilities and pregnant women, groups that wouldn’t be subject to work requirements.
Senators are pledging to make major changes to the legislation, and Valadao — who has warned his colleagues against making deeper cuts to the program — has said he plans to work with the Senate to protect Medicaid and food assistance “for those who need them most.” Valadao, in a statement, argued the bill would achieve that aim “while rooting out waste, fraud and abuse from bad actors.”
But Pelosi says it’s outrageous to label food stamps and Medicaid benefits as waste without providing evidence of malfeasance. She also questions the sincerity of California Republicans who’ve vowed to make changes to the bill: “They all masquerade, but they all voted for it.”
Pelosi said she’s comfortable predicting that her successor, **Hakeem Jeffries** , will be the next speaker. It starts, she added, by capturing voter sentiment early: “Own the ground, and we will win.”

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. clean_body: | | | = = | = | = | = | = | = | = POLITICO: Nancy Pelosi’s midterms mission By DUSTIN GARDINER and BLAKE JONES Presented by California Environmental Voters Former Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Pelosi has made defending federal health care programs her focus as she tries to help Democrats take back the House in the 2026 midterms. | Tom Brenner/Getty Images THE BUZZ: GROUND GAME — Former Speaker Nancy Pelosi has a go-to line these days to criticize Rep. David Valadao : He could be the “one vote that cut Medicaid” by backing Republicans' megabill to bolster President Donald Trump’s domestic agenda. Pelosi, in her post-speaker act as San Francisco’s representative in Congress, has made defending federal health care programs her key focus as she tries to help Democrats flip the House next year. She regularly targets battleground Republicans like Valadao — who, as Pelosi will note, “has close to 500,000 people on Medicaid” in his Central Valley district. About 64 percent of his constituents were enrolled in the program as of last August. “I know the grassroots of California down to the last blade of grass. These people have made themselves really vulnerable,” Pelosi told Playbook in an extended interview. “We’re not doing this in the San Francisco Bay area, we’re doing this in the districts where the Republicans are.” More than a year ahead of the midterms, she’s deploying her volunteer army to target GOP members in swing seats, including Valadao, Orange County Rep. Young Kim and Riverside County Rep. Ken Calvert. Pelosi’s Save Our Health Care campaign, part of her national PAC, is organizing multiple phone banks per week to target those vulnerable Republicans, and she’s raised more than $5.5 million this year to help boost the effort via the DCCC and her campaign committees. Pelosi’s team said her volunteer events — including support from the state party and labor unions — have produced 140,000 phone calls to voters in those districts in the last six weeks. Volunteers urge voters to call Republican offices on Capitol Hill to protest proposed cuts to Medicaid, food stamps and other safety-net programs. Pelosi’s offensive is part of a volley of attacks Democrats have launched against Republicans over their push to slash safety-net spending. The effort is reminiscent of Democrats’ strategy during the 2018 midterms, when GOP efforts to gut Obamacare led to a blue-wave year during Trump’s first term (when Democrats flipped 40 seats in the House). Pelosi, who championed the Affordable Care Act and has led a yearslong effort to protect the law, was the architect of the party’s successful strategy to flip control of the House that cycle. ... Pelosi argues a midterm cycle comparable to 2018 is already taking shape and that House Republicans sealed their fate last week when they narrowly passed Trump’s budget megabill on a 215-214 vote. The bill’s proposed changes to the Medicaid program, including new work requirements, would likely cause millions of recipients to lose coverage. Valadao, Calvert and Kim have argued the bill protects crucial health care benefits for children, seniors, individuals with disabilities and pregnant women, groups that wouldn’t be subject to work requirements. Senators are pledging to make major changes to the legislation, and Valadao — who has warned his colleagues against making deeper cuts to the program — has said he plans to work with the Senate to protect Medicaid and food assistance “for those who need them most.” Valadao, in a statement, argued the bill would achieve that aim “while rooting out waste, fraud and abuse from bad actors.” But Pelosi says it’s outrageous to label food stamps and Medicaid benefits as waste without providing evidence of malfeasance. She also questions the sincerity of California Republicans who’ve vowed to make changes to the bill: “They all masquerade, but they all voted for it.” Pelosi said she’s comfortable predicting that her successor, Hakeem Jeffries , will be the next speaker. It starts, she added, by capturing voter sentiment early: “Own the ground, and we will win.” Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support? = Nancy Pelosi is counting on you. | | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I’m writing to you today because I need your help to secure our elections once and for all and keep America on the path to greatness.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=eef49f52b33f423bb700625766a01262&_e=MsAFsXbACEwJBqPAZ-ENksh9IeVc78tYRBAWiT5rvjF_mxOsnyROo99DvhEVCdX4AjJBvWY3t-or6hhyZ6S0eeKDX-C_AmJy6ADnBXdNY7MIZ4m_yzehhnfEd1KJnjMxj25SIGs_kEAQeDwklsf5_eJrCyX6pn8Vh49HFjZLiZQ_8xNXsRKLe2kAhQhkQm6ziJlBJwL0ytiRRoQUEvTWzYBEWEnFW9YwdQOHk34q_6DXgpevMtIfd1TRgr5g08z0oi6dDCru21uGTFRbMDO9CvMM1ks5hPrOL8xjEDHfc8rFybHez4owSBx6SCCYjO33og3StN7Nhlvr_QSZ0-lg6mQSrRPo7UltgpULrfAMqSY%3D)** My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. **That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate.** I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. **[That’s why our election integrity efforts must be a priority right now._election integrity efforts_ must be a priority right now.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=eef49f52b33f423bb700625766a01262&_e=MsAFsXbACEwJBqPAZ-ENksh9IeVc78tYRBAWiT5rvjF_mxOsnyROo99DvhEVCdX4AjJBvWY3t-or6hhyZ6S0eeKDX-C_AmJy6ADnBXdNY7MIZ4m_yzehhnfEd1KJnjMxj25SIGs_kEAQeDwklsf5_eJrCyX6pn8Vh49HFjZLiZQ_8xNXsRKLe2kAhQhkQm6ziJlBJwL0ytiRRoQUEvTWzaCjpYeurjI_AUGSgUCSQ94TtQeR3iL2SwK1Wr8el3TYdFhzIbWozqrnX5b9HQNuZcy3lFVv8vwmE1qUNJxXRaCc7fQn6Nveq3azZbbgzBr_-aiJ2_ttLA29Abum1QTcosy5RMQmXRRzkgtjdgXzhXQ%3D)**_If we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate...__ _ _If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation...__ __If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts..._ ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond.[**AMAC Action, will never give up. But my friend, as a strong conservative senior, we NEED you right there beside us.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=eef49f52b33f423bb700625766a01262&_e=MsAFsXbACEwJBqPAZ-ENksh9IeVc78tYRBAWiT5rvjF_mxOsnyROo99DvhEVCdX4AjJBvWY3t-or6hhyZ6S0eeKDX-C_AmJy6ADnBXdNY7MIZ4m_yzehhnfEd1KJnjMxj25SIGs_kEAQeDwklsf5_eJrCyX6pn8Vh49HFjZLiZQ_8xNXsRKLe2kAhQhkQm6ziJlBJwL0ytiRRoQUEvTWzaOEQ_nHAfwFnAqAIlvAebngPDGAKpDoI8lkeePzEWR9rFt70kNZqQpSN22fEUGt3kA1iKEw4BSab39lFG268Q85JQhvmRp-3feqjJsNBTfFW6JLhRRFaiwYi5rgrW2z9ycntXhtMcZdJdUqGFftgkg%3D) My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action****is****the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the****is****sues.** Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to:
---
** Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. ** Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. ** Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections.** Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. ** And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes.
---
All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend.**[That’s why I hope you’ll click this link to support AMAC Action during this critical time for your sacred vote.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=eef49f52b33f423bb700625766a01262&_e=MsAFsXbACEwJBqPAZ-ENksh9IeVc78tYRBAWiT5rvjF_mxOsnyROo99DvhEVCdX4AjJBvWY3t-or6hhyZ6S0eeKDX-C_AmJy6ADnBXdNY7MIZ4m_yzehhnfEd1KJnjMxj25SIGs_kEAQeDwklsf5_eJrCyX6pn8Vh49HFjZLiZQ_8xNXsRKLe2kAhQhkQm6ziJlBJwL0ytiRRoQUEvTWzZGyS4qIo89ey3St_IWThJoO5Wj7EWMCEPamcLUJbcUoQCCe3QA6tZ5dkqNSFS7TQ3OuYLy1M7uwXOD0RNXz8J7rbUV2X-YV_QWtalWJDcYoEAyC3kc59oSg6HDTcXKa2eE9bo3shZg7MflK6eBSktU%3D)** We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from:
---
* voting in our elections
* taking benefits reserved for you
* being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives
* and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes.

---
Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully **canceled out in all future elections**.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. **[And that’s why I hope you’ll pledge your support for AMAC Action with your very best gift today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=eef49f52b33f423bb700625766a01262&_e=MsAFsXbACEwJBqPAZ-ENksh9IeVc78tYRBAWiT5rvjF_mxOsnyROo99DvhEVCdX4AjJBvWY3t-or6hhyZ6S0eeKDX-C_AmJy6ADnBXdNY7MIZ4m_yzehhnfEd1KJnjMxj25SIGs_kEAQeDwklsf5_eJrCyX6pn8Vh49HFjZLiZQ_8xNXsRKLe2kAhQhkQm6ziJlBJwL0ytiRRoQUEvTWzfe30sQivQi-jHrFqM5879NbP0LQp8_umFZMz5KbFH30nr0X0hd-LQGS62GqAv2ESTGWyxkjKt0dNgqrUqtBjXYt3Y2dji6ezGvZwnxevh0vsp1DIM1EjHsNm1DrhN6yaEsrBcAmRnzvvHzLB-Us1k4%3D)** AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. **[That’s what makes your best gift to AMAC Action so important today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=eef49f52b33f423bb700625766a01262&_e=MsAFsXbACEwJBqPAZ-ENksh9IeVc78tYRBAWiT5rvjF_mxOsnyROo99DvhEVCdX4AjJBvWY3t-or6hhyZ6S0eeKDX-C_AmJy6ADnBXdNY7MIZ4m_yzehhnfEd1KJnjMxj25SIGs_kEAQeDwklsf5_eJrCyX6pn8Vh49HFjZLiZQ_8xNXsRKLe2kAhQhkQm6ziJlBJwL0ytiRRoQUEvTWzbKaorcJ3lwlCotMBtDCcoaRqnZ2Xd6IcxSurblec1nYU31TZAs6U2mBWgBcY1zV388CoYxqOdBjXc8-jMrdLZ3deK07F-2ftmECuFY4CRWBgbb2CAjEiInB9HtKCM8QSvyYrv07jfkNbzI95axiYVU%3D)** So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response.

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate. I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate... If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation... If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts... ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond. My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Actionisthe most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors. We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them. And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on theissues. Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to: Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections. Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes. All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend. We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from: voting in our elections taking benefits reserved for you being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes. Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully canceled out in all future elections.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | P.S. My friend, YOU are the difference between success and failure. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

The same Buddy Carter who cheered on Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs — calling the hellscape we’ve been living in for the last four months a **"GOLDEN AGE"** — even as they threaten to gut small businesses and cripple Georgia’s shipping industry.
And now? **He wants a promotion to the U.S. Senate.**
He’s auditioning for Trump, pledging loyalty to a billionaire who’s only ever looked out for himself — and dragging Georgia families down in the process.
Let’s be clear: **Buddy Carter isn’t standing up for the Georgians who elected him.**
Carter and his MAGA allies handed Trump a blank check to wreck local economies with higher prices and lost jobs and slash critical programs like SNAP, Medicaid, and the Child Tax Credit if it means padding the pockets of billionaires like Donald Trump and Elon Musk.
This isn’t policy. **This is a power grab — and Georgia families are being forced to pay the price.**
Instead of standing up for the small businesses and families that fuel Georgia’s economy, Carter is backing devastating cuts to programs the people he purports to represent rely on — all to stay in Trump’s good graces.
[We need to close our $25,000 budget gap before midnight on Saturday to keep Georgia’s Senate seat blue, flip the Senate, and bring Trump’s agenda to a screeching halt. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I barely had time to unpack…
body:
|
#
Friend, I’ll keep this brief. After voting NO on the disastrous GOP budget that guts nearly a trillion dollars from SNAP and Medicaid, I flew back home to mid-Michigan on Thursday night. **And folks, I barely had time to unpack before the attack ads started hitting my TV screen.** The same special interests that pushed that cruel budget are now spending over $300,000 to flood the airwaves with false attacks lying about me and the bill. Let’s be clear: this is just the beginning. We’re still over a year away from Election Day, and they’re already launching a full-scale misinformation blitz. [**We need to respond – fast – before their message becomes the only one voters hear. clean_body: | Friend, I’ll keep this brief. After voting NO on the disastrous GOP budget that guts nearly a trillion dollars from SNAP and Medicaid, I flew back home to mid-Michigan on Thursday night. And folks, I barely had time to unpack before the attack ads started hitting my TV screen. The same special interests that pushed that cruel budget are now spending over $300,000 to flood the airwaves with false attacks lying about me and the bill. Let’s be clear: this is just the beginning. We’re still over a year away from Election Day, and they’re already launching a full-scale misinformation blitz. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204ijdwo1mzc948574hlb4zsov8n5bqvyelqfod4iyvj7zl32o3wgcdqo1vyxbrbrt2xsjknb2dqompf9b6&__stmp=swxr33&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swxr33&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jdlvea0d998wq95ntecewmc197zrfza64c410r5c9er43qbr3ihmy2njptyyi46x5tqsxuvnia8kbg77qhy3hv3h4t1z7crqf72ndtmhki3tfjswrrbenxpevfp6j1ibd5h416l27c5lkaiyw4fc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swxr33&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swxr33&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swxr33&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swxr33&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jdlvea0d998wq95ntecewmc44gye5913ki2ke2cqr1k2z3k8ab1q2puofaltxurqrxgvdnugkmvgwk65y5uehaux29b2vl7yg7e1polw6avbxtcr92veacm6cd2jahu1r26av5g9ctxoljz546xm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swxr33&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swxr33&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: Celebrate the Dad Who Raised a Patriot.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Perfect for the dad who flies the flag and fights for freedom.

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/proud-dad-proud-american-merch?utm_source=email&utm_medium=ac&utm_campaign=20250520_ORGOP_ProudDadMerch&utm_id=campaignengine)
---

| | Friend, There’s a certain kind of dad who doesn’t just clock in and show up. He builds. He sacrifices. He leads by example. And through it all, one thing is crystal clear: **_He LOVES this country._** **This Father’s Day, show him that you see him and that you’re proud of everything he stands for.** Our **“Proud Dad, Proud American”** gear was made for the family man who flies the flag high, votes conservative, and believes the American Dream is worth fighting for.

He leads by example. And through it all, one thing is crystal clear: He LOVES this country. This Father’s Day, show him that you see him and that you’re proud of everything he stands for. Our “Proud Dad, Proud American” gear was made for the family man who flies the flag high, votes conservative, and believes the American Dream is worth fighting for. | | | | | | | From tees to hats to koozies that he can carry to the backyard BBQ – this collection screams faith, family, and freedom. | | | | | Let’s celebrate the dads who raised us to respect the flag, honor God, and never apologize for being American. They gave us everything – and now we can give back with a gift that says it all. Proud Dad. Proud American. Proud to fight for freedom. body:
This is an attempt to systematically undermine our democratic process. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108462375/548001191/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_REA_GEN_NO_20250527_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcwNmY0MS0zNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZpShNJ5udNEZM5DW4y9kyhrKdsL1f6IAV1-XPf9qWAA=)

Peter — I’m not writing to be alarmist, but Trump has just made another move as part of his billionaire-first agenda. Trump announced he is launching an investigation into ActBlue, which you likely recognize as the largest digital fundraising platform used by Democratic campaigns, advocacy organizations, and donors. While Trump and Republicans claim this investigation is to ensure that no foreign actors are participating in our elections, let’s be very clear about what this is: **an attempt to systematically undermine our democratic process. ** By limiting how and when grassroots supporters — supporters like you, Peter — can contribute, your ability to engage in our elections is greatly diminished. And by limiting how and when grassroots donations are received, Democratic candidates — like me and my House Democratic colleagues — lose our ability to reach as many voters as we can through on-the-ground organizing, direct voter outreach, and so much more. But it doesn’t limit the ability for billionaires like Elon Musk to cut million dollar checks to the corrupt, greedy, and cruel politicians who are willing to sell out their constituents to further their own power. That’s not right, that’s certainly not fair, and that couldn’t be farther from a representative democracy where folks are elected to serve the people, not just the wealthy few. **We still have time to fight back, but we have to act fast. ****[So, Peter, will you rush in whatever you can today to help us in our fight for a truly representative democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108462385/548001228/-549607442?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_REA_GEN_NO_20250527_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcwNmY0MS0zNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZpShNJ5udNEZM5DW4y9kyhrKdsL1f6IAV1-XPf9qWAA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [PITCH IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108462391/548001236/-549607442?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FSP_FR_REA_GEN_NO_20250527_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcwNmY0MS0zNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZpShNJ5udNEZM5DW4y9kyhrKdsL1f6IAV1-XPf9qWAA=)

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: May 2025 Newsletter
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
May 2025 Newsletter
Conversation with the Young Democrats of Maryland
On May 18th, I had the opportunity to serve as the keynote speaker for the 2025 Young Democrats of Maryland (YDM) Convention. As a former leader of the Prince George’s County Young Democrats, it was especially meaningful to meet with our state’s future leaders and discuss how we can effectively advocate for a better Maryland for everyone.
YDM works to make sure that the young people in our state and nation have a seat at the table. They work with politicians, caucuses, and other government officials to ensure equitable representation.
I thank the outgoing YDM Executive Board for their years of hard work, and I’m eager to see what YDM’s new leaders accomplish in the coming term. The next generation of voters and leaders deserves a say in their future and the future of this nation. I’m excited to watch them thrive in their careers.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Convo%20with%20the%20Young%20Democrats%20of%20Maryland.jpg]
Power Hour Briefing at College of Southern MD
I had the pleasure of joining colleagues and faculty at the College of Southern Maryland (CSM) for their first-ever Power Hour Briefing. It was a great opportunity to learn more about the incredible work they’re doing for the region and the state of Maryland.
CSM is a leader in providing dynamic educational opportunities to students across the tri-county area and beyond. It was a pleasure to join my colleagues, Delegates Debra M. Davis and Edith J. Patterson, for a visit to their beautiful La Plata campus and to learn more about their impactful work. Thank you to the CSM faculty for having us and for playing such an important role in our region!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Power%20Hour%20Briefing%20at%20College%20of%20Southern%20MD%201.jpg]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Power%20Hour%20Briefing%20at%20College%20of%20Southern%20MD%202.jpg]
Maryland’s AAA Bond Rating
For the first time since 1973, Moody’s has downgraded Maryland’s bond rating from AAA to AA1, ending our decades-long record of top-tier financial standing. For over 50 years, this rating protected us from higher borrowing costs and underscored our reputation for sound fiscal management. This downgrade threatens to raise long-term expenses for Maryland taxpayers and places added strain on future state budgets.
Despite Moody’s downgrade, Fitch affirmed our AAA credit rating. This is a testament to the state’s strong financial health and prudent fiscal management. We’ve enacted the largest budget cuts in 16 years, ensuring the government runs more efficiently and effectively. Through disciplined planning, we’ve transformed a budget deficit into a surplus, a success that protects Marylanders from economic uncertainty.
Even in the face of harmful federal budget cuts and layoffs, we remain committed to safeguarding Maryland’s future and supporting our communities. Our values are clear and our determination is stronger than ever.
Medicaid: What’s at Stake
On May 13, 25 individuals were arrested at the Capitol during a protest opposing Republican and Trump-backed legislation aimed at reducing, restricting, or eliminating access to Medicaid benefits. These life-saving services are essential, and their availability is non-negotiable.
Our government has both a moral and legal duty to protect all its citizens, especially the most vulnerable. Yet, this proposed legislation signals a dangerous move away from that responsibility.
While Trump may not believe in the law or legal obligations, we do here in Maryland. Let me be clear: Healthcare is a human right . I will not stay silent as these benefits are stripped from those who need them, nor will my colleagues who fight beside me each day.
I stand with the protestors. I stand with the 10.3 million Americans at risk of losing coverage. And I stand against any effort to dismantle the fragile web of care so many rely on.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Dont%20cut%20Medicaid.png]
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Delegate Jazz Lewis
Democrat, District 24, Prince George's County
Taylor House Office Building, Room 151
6 Bladen St., Annapolis, MD 21401
800-492-7122, ext. 3691; jazz.lewis@house.state.md.us
www.jazzlewis.com
By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

❌ Fired thousands of essential government employees.

subject: Tell Congress to prioritize domestic workers over billionaires
body:
Urge Congress to deliver for domestic workers instead of billionaires!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108463055/548003025/664783965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2FmMmVhZi0zNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqwIHHNo-V2CSrgezlfjdIzJjQii560bkAWoSONPiA4=&emci=6352c0ed-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0caf2eaf-353b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
**Trump and his GOP allies have spent his first 100+ days in office enriching themselves and their billionaire donors, while domestic workers, and so many others, get left behind.**
We’ve seen this happen too many times, so we’re calling on Congress to deliver for the people on a set of principles that will lift up care workers, domestic workers, and the entire working-class.
The campaign is called **the People’s Promise** , and it urges our leaders to pass laws that build: (1) an **economy that works for everyone** (that includes ensuring a living wage for domestic workers); (2) **a democratic government for the people** (one that prioritizes funding for the healthcare programs that care workers rely on for insurance and their livelihoods, instead of tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy); and (3) **equal rights and opportunity for all** (like a Domestic Workers Bill of Rights).
[**Add your name now to support the People’s Promise campaign and urge Congress to deliver for domestic workers instead of billionaires!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108463056/548003026/457768187?source=043025swap-cia&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2FmMmVhZi0zNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqwIHHNo-V2CSrgezlfjdIzJjQii560bkAWoSONPiA4=&emci=6352c0ed-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0caf2eaf-353b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108463057/548003027/457768187?source=043025swap-cia&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2FmMmVhZi0zNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqwIHHNo-V2CSrgezlfjdIzJjQii560bkAWoSONPiA4=&emci=6352c0ed-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0caf2eaf-353b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
**These aren’t radical demands** and we MUST be able to rely on our elected leaders — from the federal government down to local officials — to enact policies that materially benefit and protect care workers and domestic workers across the country.
The tenets of the People’s Promise campaign, and what we’re asking Congress to deliver, are here:
* **An Economy That Works for Everyone** : 1 in 6 home care workers live in poverty and child care workers earn one of the lowest hourly wages of any occupation in the country. This needs to change. All workers should earn a livable wage and be able to afford essentials like quality health care and housing.
* **A Government for the People** : While the GOP tries to gut Medicaid and slash taxes for billionaires, we know 72 million people rely on Medicaid — and many care workers rely on its funding both for their insurance and their job. The wealthiest among us must pay their fair share in taxes so care and domestic workers, and their families, have a strong social safety net.
* **Equal Rights & Opportunity for All**: America desperately needs a Domestic Workers Bill of Rights to enshrine workplace protections that many care workers don’t currently have, fair and adequate pay standards, and access to benefits.

We need elected leaders who will do the work Trump and his administration refuse to do. Leaders who will fix what he broke, strengthen what he tried to destroy, and finally deliver the promise of a government for domestic workers — and all of us.
[**Sign on to the People’s Promise campaign now and tell Congress to deliver for domestic workers!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108463058/548003028/457768187?source=043025swap-cia&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2FmMmVhZi0zNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqwIHHNo-V2CSrgezlfjdIzJjQii560bkAWoSONPiA4=&emci=6352c0ed-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0caf2eaf-353b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108463059/548003029/457768187?source=043025swap-cia&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2FmMmVhZi0zNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqwIHHNo-V2CSrgezlfjdIzJjQii560bkAWoSONPiA4=&emci=6352c0ed-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0caf2eaf-353b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
Thank you,
The Care in Action Team

This email was sent by [Care in Action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108463063/548003033/664783965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2FmMmVhZi0zNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqwIHHNo-V2CSrgezlfjdIzJjQii560bkAWoSONPiA4=&emci=6352c0ed-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0caf2eaf-353b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787). Care In Action was founded by progressive women of color. Care in Action is the policy and advocacy home for women who care, working on behalf of more than 2 million domestic workers and care workers in America. Care in Action is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization. Donations to Care in Action are not tax-deductible.
Learn more about our [privacy policy](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108463064/548003034/1824245643?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2FmMmVhZi0zNTNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqwIHHNo-V2CSrgezlfjdIzJjQii560bkAWoSONPiA4=&emci=6352c0ed-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0caf2eaf-353b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787).

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108463165/548003479/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmQ5NDgyYS0zNjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOQ_fNIXrooA94D1GKGNsm77UO__Q72EIT2lFFZpMW0=)
I’m not asking for your donation today, Peter.

Instead, I’m asking for something that I can’t put a price on – **your signature of support.**

Earlier this month, I reached out to ask you to endorse my re-election campaign. While we received a surge of support, we fell short of our 2,000 signature goal.

Here’s why it matters: National Republicans are honing in on me as a top target to keep their extreme majority in power. A strong show of support right now will prove to them that CA-27 isn’t going back – and lay the groundwork for flipping the House blue.

name: Golden Portfolio on behalf of Conservative Broadcast
subject: What if America bought gold like it used to?
body:
|
---
Today, gold makes up just 0.5% of U.S. household savings. That's far below the historical average of 2%. In other words: The public is completely asleep on gold -- even though the gold price recently broke through $3,500. If gold demand merely returns to normal the historical average, we're looking at a 4X surge in gold buying. And that's before factoring in:
*
* Central Banks buying gold at record speed...
*
* Trump unleashing a gold mining renaissance in America...
*
* [Warren Buffett potentially revealing a massive gold stake by May 15th.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YWFhhhsXaOJm1tmgh3IxsA~~/AARclBA~/1GQg3fsTiUmOtqkMl68s1yGm2twUUB8c1W3TZ0dlg9XIAc-ym0Kto4Ud4JWLi34jHmOYD_DHwCxvboXIecGBUHqcXXvZayFs0Pw5_VoHwLRnB1ECFpUd5VkHmDsgkCGspfP4nobrVdpOZ1klX0iqpkUa5EmYrkpnClDQWGAjQESJf74xoj_js-Pk1ZWXdBb--0LuemmMTakghgE6AQ1etQ~~)
*

If that tidal wave of demand hits while supply is already tight... Gold's price won't just double. It could go 3X, 4X, even higher -- just like it did in the 1970s. And the small miners tied to the best new gold discoveries? They could go up 100X or more. [That's why I've identified the top four miners for the coming gold mania.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YWFhhhsXaOJm1tmgh3IxsA~~/AARclBA~/1GQg3fsTiUmOtqkMl68s1yGm2twUUB8c1W3TZ0dlg9XIAc-ym0Kto4Ud4JWLi34jHmOYD_DHwCxvboXIecGBUHqcXXvZayFs0Pw5_VoHwLRnB1ECFpUd5VkHmDsgkCGspfP4nobrVdpOZ1klX0iqpkUa5EmYrkpnClDQWGAjQESJf74xoj_js-Pk1ZWXdBb--0LuemmMTakghgE6AQ1etQ~~) You don't need to overthink this. You don't need $1 million in the bank. Even a small $1,000 stake in the right miners -- the ones I've already identified -- could change your financial future forever. Don't wait until gold is $6,000 or $10,000 an ounce and the public is panicking to buy. By then, it'll be too late. [Take a position in my top four picks for the coming gold bull market mania.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YWFhhhsXaOJm1tmgh3IxsA~~/AARclBA~/1GQg3fsTiUmOtqkMl68s1yGm2twUUB8c1W3TZ0dlg9XIAc-ym0Kto4Ud4JWLi34jHmOYD_DHwCxvboXIecGBUHqcXXvZayFs0Pw5_VoHwLRnB1ECFpUd5VkHmDsgkCGspfP4nobrVdpOZ1klX0iqpkUa5EmYrkpnClDQWGAjQESJf74xoj_js-Pk1ZWXdBb--0LuemmMTakghgE6AQ1etQ~~) This may be the last great gold buying opportunity of our lifetime. Let's make it count. Garrett Goggin, CFA, CMT
Chief Analyst and Founder, Golden Portfolio

body:
Let’s call Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” what it really is:

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=QkuIxjxyG3MsF06AZdm62GWO5xUp1%2BRewl%2FzaEClyuiUrYSTFFqIvy10gJY2w7nYCtewnLhDehoW2OtMYcB1IphMdbeJyGnOscEcKhsbJR8JWMFOldQBvxW5wHbGdxV%2F5UYGpRaJ5OzLjLc4zHNn768QylsVP4EGHly4gedNI3RgxESsm1j%2B8BR79Ki80khLlFBRov%2FhGGiOM8Mz0vboxxEYufzbUnbpwW4XovefAyXPjmvnImlAoJWghTiCY67Ocb2wJucEdluG9hoR7hLkp4cGeWKE%2BQhJfFNsjhATWIRT58idHLj9ZTrI61SrOu310zSdqCwdZVF7VLBNRxXeJ8Qb1ktCny9PI9habJ9ShxQrqCMaC8fOvr9suIXHubukTZIGS%2Fo63FMs9aaHcBA2h8M7MN5iZB0RG9L1Jh8eiGo%3D)
---
| |
---
Let’s call Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” what it really is: a blatant money grab by Donald Trump and Republicans — all at the expense of the rest of us. Republicans are pushing for cuts to critical programs that millions of Americans rely on just to survive — housing, food assistance, healthcare — all so they can hand out even more tax breaks to billionaires who already have everything. Trump doesn’t need another break. Elon doesn’t need another loophole. But working families? They need a break from rising prices, shrinking paychecks, and a government that keeps turning its back on them. I’m tired of watching our most vulnerable communities get pushed aside so the ultra-rich can hoard even more. This isn’t sound policy — it’s cruelty dressed up as fiscal responsibility. They think no one’s paying attention or cares. That we’ll just let it slide. But we won’t. **I won’t.** Holding this seat is absolutely critical to stopping Trump’s agenda and protecting the programs that actually help people. Every single donation — no matter the amount — helps us stand our ground and build the campaign we need to win. [We’re closing in on our $10,000 end-of-month fundraising deadline on Saturday at midnight, and your support now will make all the difference come Election Day.
