clean_body: Let’s call Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” what it really is: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Let’s call Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” what it really is: a blatant money grab by Donald Trump and Republicans — all at the expense of the rest of us. Republicans are pushing for cuts to critical programs that millions of Americans rely on just to survive — housing, food assistance, healthcare — all so they can hand out even more tax breaks to billionaires who already have everything. Trump doesn’t need another break. Elon doesn’t need another loophole. But working families? They need a break from rising prices, shrinking paychecks, and a government that keeps turning its back on them. I’m tired of watching our most vulnerable communities get pushed aside so the ultra-rich can hoard even more. This isn’t sound policy — it’s cruelty dressed up as fiscal responsibility. They think no one’s paying attention or cares. That we’ll just let it slide. But we won’t. I won’t. Holding this seat is absolutely critical to stopping Trump’s agenda and protecting the programs that actually help people. Every single donation — no matter the amount — helps us stand our ground and build the campaign we need to win. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. clean_body: The GOP's cruelty is only matched by Trump’s corruption. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. I’ve seen a lot in Congress, friend, but even I’m stunned by this. Trump formally accepted the $200 million luxury jet from Qatar, and now he wants taxpayers to spend a billion dollars retrofitting it into his personal Air Force One. Meanwhile, his loyalists are in the process of gutting Medicaid and food stamps — slashing nearly $1 trillion from programs that help working families, seniors, kids, and people with disabilities survive. name: Autism Health
subject: Join Us for the 2025 Autism Health Walk!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **2025 Autism Health Walk: Every Step For Autism, Every Mile A Miracle!**
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=c796b540fa&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| Join us for a day of **movement, music, and miracles** as we come together to support families impacted by autism! Whether you're walking **in person** at Huntington Beach Central Park or **virtually** from your own community, your steps matter. Walk as an individual, create a team, join an existing team, or just simply sponsor a walker. Rally your friends and family to support the cause from anywhere in the world! [Click HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=694a8fa3d2&e=3a42edfdc4) to Register! **Date:** Saturday, September 6, 2025
**Location:** Huntington Beach Central Park West
18381 Goldenwest St, Huntington Beach, CA 92648
[_(See our website for parking and map)_](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=fa68a2c29b&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
|
---
|
### **Event Schedule**
* **8:00 AM** – Registration Opens (Pick up your t-shirt)
* **9:30 AM** – Dance Warm-Up
* **9:55 AM** – National Anthem & Prayer
* **10:00 AM** – Walk Begins
* **1:00 PM** – Awards Ceremony & Sponsor Remarks
* **1:30 PM** – Group Dancing
* **4:00 PM** – Resource Fair Closes

---
|
---
|
### **Registration Options**
* **In-Person Walk** at Huntington Beach Central Park West
* **Virtual Walk** from any location worldwide
* [**Sponsor a Walker** or **Create/Join a Fundraising Team**](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=cdfc25fa0f&e=3a42edfdc4)

---
|
---
|
### **Fundraising Incentives**
* Raise **$100 or more** → Get a **FREE walk t-shirt** (Must enter t-shirt size)
* **Top Fundraising Team** → **VIP Tickets** to the 2026 Autism Health Summit (Max 10 tickets)
* **Second Place Team** → **General Admission Tickets** to the 2026 Autism Health Summit (Max 10 tickets)

---
|
---
|
### **Why Your Support Matters**
Every dollar raised helps Autism Health Inc.:
* Provide **educational scholarships** for parents of children with autism
* Fund **cutting-edge autism research and therapies**
* Offer **free monthly webinars and family resources**
* Host the **Autism Health Summit** , connecting families with life-changing experts and solutions

This walk isn’t just about raising funds, it’s about **raising voices** , building community, and making every step count for families navigating autism.
---
|
---
|
### **Vendor & Sponsorship Opportunities Available!**
Looking to showcase your business or support in a bigger way? We are now accepting **sponsors and vendors**! Reserve your space today and help create an unforgettable experience for our families.
[Learn more about sponsorships or to become a vendor HERE.](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=7b0eb5d7f1&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
|
---
|
### Ready to Walk With Us?
**Sign up today** —walk with heart, walk with purpose, and turn every mile into a miracle.
---
| [REGISTER NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=de310eb170&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER NOW")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---
| [Donate Now](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=575d878c36&e=3a42edfdc4 "Donate Now")
---
| **Autism Health Inc.
San Diego, CA**
**[www.AutismHealth.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=6e16ef912a&e=3a42edfdc4)**
Contact Us: [info@autismhealth.com](mailto:info@autismhealth.com)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=4247c04bed&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| | [](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=56852f5709&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| | [](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=860db80e7f&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| | [](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=3853a51303&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| | [](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=6e3937c1c2&e=3a42edfdc4)

[_why did I get this?_](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/about?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=1c80113a5a&e=3a42edfdc4&c=7c89bfad94) [unsubscribe from this list](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=1c80113a5a&t=b&e=3a42edfdc4&c=7c89bfad94) [update subscription preferences](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=1c80113a5a&e=3a42edfdc4&c=7c89bfad94)
Autism Health Inc. * 500 Hotel Cir N * San Diego, CA 92108 * USA

name: Tommy Tuberville
subject: I’m coming home
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
I have been sincerely grateful to the people of Alabama for electing me to the Senate, and now I ask for your help to elect me as the next governor | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3bd0370b0a9842f9aff5e9f55ae6404c&_e=Clc0_IZ1qRlBwn8zA-eNdGXPhbFkLX2XghU0gY5MCFMKJVxVa2juyzEi4GP1rdNmrIdshHO7HyxBpcjZGDUQL_tf1_39w04Mfqlp8BkDKFcw94ukkwhORupIU-QqXH65wUtREhlzlhDJpwqKTanSGOpejh_y_mXa9adwtOLJQFiPYK4W9RyDBou0qSNN6KhIDQFyAWPZuA-qTMsLq3JM3_v1kELcdQDLD5KEJaJWjcLn-IG0tAQ9l6G-AkVfRNF7x-MmIrJw_yzhTGXL2feymanlQlDlrCOpYRH8ZJWXnNxX1DMvutIoQxARte_5Ch8E-2jBxUBOm2WKKRVtXH9UBzr8Qer7vsC4j8oJ6eU-6SE%3D)
---

Peter,

We fought like heck to build a MAGA Majority—and because of YOU, we’re on the verge of restoring common sense, faith, and freedom to this great country. I’ve been proud to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump in the Senate, pushing back hard against the Radical Left and their woke, anti-American agenda. We are truly on the path to the next golden age of America.

**But today, I want to share something personal with you.**

After deep prayer and long talks with my family, I’ve decided **not to seek re-election to the U.S. Senate.**

**Instead, I’m headed home** —to sweet Alabama—to fight a new battle for the heart of our state.

[**I’m running to be the next Governor of Alabama.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3bd0370b0a9842f9aff5e9f55ae6404c&_e=Clc0_IZ1qRlBwn8zA-eNdGXPhbFkLX2XghU0gY5MCFMKJVxVa2juyzEi4GP1rdNmrIdshHO7HyxBpcjZGDUQL_tf1_39w04Mfqlp8BkDKFcw94ukkwhORupIU-QqXH65wUtREhlzlhDJpwqKTanSGOpejh_y_mXa9adwtOLJQFiPYK4W9RyDBou0qSNN6KhIJQAIECHO5XCd9fZ2YgNrj7vIvJXzKr4fAmoJFEB74-o2N035i43xELed_uZ_ik9fSkmUeHuPLi8UjEqe9JjCVU5m1oLnenzGUBc4NanRVkYY_HfciLVLXj74dTxObz2BTMRP_RjHbtrrok2pz6BrfU-rs1bfF929SCYnBwA47no%3D)
This wasn’t a decision I made lightly. But Alabamians deserve a fighter—someone who won’t back down, who’ll stand up for our values, and who’ll always put faith, family, and freedom first.

I’ve coached champions. I’ve stood up to the Swamp. [**Now I’m asking for your support as I take on this next challenge.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3bd0370b0a9842f9aff5e9f55ae6404c&_e=Clc0_IZ1qRlBwn8zA-eNdGXPhbFkLX2XghU0gY5MCFMKJVxVa2juyzEi4GP1rdNmrIdshHO7HyxBpcjZGDUQL_tf1_39w04Mfqlp8BkDKFcw94ukkwhORupIU-QqXH65wUtREhlzlhDJpwqKTanSGOpejh_y_mXa9adwtOLJQFiPYK4W9RyDBou0qSNN6KhIFxRMNzy9ItiMBHxfFWG-NGDH1SCyogRJgakJlAbvOJVypS9I6_z_D5xMj7AtCxIGtuxazXWVAZl_f70kygi_IC5T7F70DXpSQpbjnaLZ7Xo7zC-nQamu46CKg6ERBcy7aZam7lvqOUYCsUe55MG9VaFFlXKgWIfMWvWSnsoVNuY%3D)

| [ **SUPPORT COACH FOR GOVERNOR** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3bd0370b0a9842f9aff5e9f55ae6404c&_e=Clc0_IZ1qRlBwn8zA-eNdGXPhbFkLX2XghU0gY5MCFMKJVxVa2juyzEi4GP1rdNmrIdshHO7HyxBpcjZGDUQL_tf1_39w04Mfqlp8BkDKFcw94ukkwhORupIU-QqXH65wUtREhlzlhDJpwqKTanSGOpejh_y_mXa9adwtOLJQFiPYK4W9RyDBou0qSNN6KhIvY9nY_q8p4cfRBVL6FfZZpwVeWMSFnoHgkg1-iJVvdFzf5A_xOfIlusyTavPB4UFs8THWzIq7Ek0VWatIkYNLQZhz2GoNV5ft8dEFp4vfl8Uk62U0A84ggsS8WlknbvbRxyN8-K_vcZZ-aVKfejFEnB09Koz-BlRcuAayXctdOI%3D)
---

We’re building something **BIG** in Alabama—and I want you on the team from Day One.

For Alabama,
Coach Tommy Tuberville

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3bd0370b0a9842f9aff5e9f55ae6404c&_e=Clc0_IZ1qRlBwn8zA-eNdGXPhbFkLX2XghU0gY5MCFMKJVxVa2juyzEi4GP1rdNmrIdshHO7HyxBpcjZGDUQL_tf1_39w04Mfqlp8BkDKFcw94ukkwhORupIU-QqXH65wUtREhlzlhDJpwqKTanSGOpejh_y_mXa9adwtOLJQFiPYK4W9RyDBou0qSNN6KhIOcQG13SI85HZEvy9gywsPm6OiUAfXZ-tRKXjKCQM7R_WKnoSnudsaT_IjDkDMnCqEMpMP79I1BuYQWiJSUhuSt1UTbN1Yw0CDfDZJ1uVmwzUM5oPNQwbbgZmBMp27p4e5vuG8YXVVJX5qeRUgnMUoPEmf1BFw2mc_ngDanN8t7c%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: I have been sincerely grateful to the people of Alabama for electing me to the Senate, and now I ask for your help to elect me as the next governor | Peter, We fought like heck to build a MAGA Majority—and because of YOU, we’re on the verge of restoring common sense, faith, and freedom to this great country. I’ve been proud to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump in the Senate, pushing back hard against the Radical Left and their woke, anti-American agenda. We are truly on the path to the next golden age of America. But today, I want to share something personal with you. After deep prayer and long talks with my family, I’ve decided not to seek re-election to the U.S. Senate. Instead, I’m headed home —to sweet Alabama—to fight a new battle for the heart of our state. This wasn’t a decision I made lightly. But Alabamians deserve a fighter—someone who won’t back down, who’ll stand up for our values, and who’ll always put faith, family, and freedom first. I’ve coached champions. I’ve stood up to the Swamp. | We’re building something BIG in Alabama—and I want you on the team from Day One. For Alabama, Coach Tommy Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? name: Prudent Politics

name: General John King
subject: 24 hours to maintain our momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
A NEW POLL, taken days after I launched my campaign to defeat Jon Ossoff, shows we’re inside the margin of error with 13% of voters still undecided. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=425ed652f0434b2fac54c41622cf6198&_e=jEzuMTUUlC9DnxJzUylVTig77dHhyAckZsuqeGZ6TheipUIKhS_9GpQ-BF05UcyboV2_mQxqRn1RTLr2VtbcHB-5374dIHGLTQI3mCaGejPtj6MSaZRC7-kiac0zMEGODOeyuh93fTE98vgd37pdcnRw3uiZZOmN620PwCL5mQhCCBNe6lUEP_hXJW74MIrQx21p07NraFQVIQWCNXyL_q-Vj_cXEKxQ3UAyZ76gRXS29QnoSCj52UwWZs77Zhg0tIwpHLZ1kmI8Qv_WRw6XcpfhLG0rYCgLJhsaQDppnEozorTVXvgNJs7APjcZM8DzDxZHGOwwlIoj6XKbN7McKj6jrw8b2jhQoqm_Z8Umv7Ab6Om48ztdSnulWMjo1ieIQjbumVUxgzl9UjfltP6q5w%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

_**A NEW POLL**_ , taken days after I launched my campaign to defeat Jon Ossoff, shows we’re inside the margin of error with 13% of voters still undecided.

That means this race is virtually tied.

**But there’s a catch and it’s a big one:** Jon Ossoff already has _**$11 million**_ in the bank and he’s raising millions more to pull ahead and stop our momentum.

We’re setting a goal of raising $75,000 from grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours to maintain our momentum and overtake Jon Ossoff in the polls.

[**I’m asking you to rush $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can give. name: Crow HQ
subject: Have you taken our survey yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Folks — Have you completed our May Priorities Survey yet?

Jason and our team are working around the clock to put your voice front and center and bring Colorado values to D.C. With the end of the month just four days away, we want to make sure you have the chance to make your voice heard.

Record your responses in our May Priorities Survey before it’s too late! [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/may-priorities-survey-1]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/may-priorities-survey-1]

— Team Crow

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Crow
Date: Wednesday, May 7, 2025
Subject: Putting your voice front and center

This much is clear, folks: We need to take back political power in 2026.

Donald Trump has been in office for a little over 3 months — and in that time, he’s attacked working families, worked to rip away Americans’ health care, and tried to push through more handouts and tax breaks for the wealthy and well-connected.

Republicans have refused to stand up to Trump’s extreme agenda, which means we need to elect Democrats to Congress who will.

As the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s (DCCC) new Recruitment Co-Chair, Jason is leading House Democrats’ strategy to take back the House in 2026 — and he wants to put the voices of folks like you front and center.

That’s why we’re reaching out today with our May Priorities Survey. Your responses will help guide Jason’s work to flip the House blue and elect Democrats across the country who will bring a new generation of leadership to Congress.

So what’s on your mind today? What issues are keeping you up at night? Let Jason know by filling out our survey today >> [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/may-priorities-survey-1]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/may-priorities-survey-1]

Thanks for taking the time to respond.

— Team Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . To receive fewer emails, you can sign up here. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-feweremails] If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5AdTmae3UU6fPeitwGd55w2] We believe that emails are an important way for Jason Crow for Congress to stay in contact with supporters like you. We appreciate any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. You can contact us here [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com?subject=Feedback] with any questions, concerns, or ideas. To receive text updates from Team Crow, join us here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/bjvZx6_NWU2fx5btnSgikw2] .

| Dear Friends,
We'd be honored if you could join us for a special event in Charlottesville, Virginia featuring Congresswoman Lisa McClain, a member of Congressional leadership and Chairwoman of the House Republican Conference, representing Michigan's 9th Congressional District, along with Congressman John McGuire, Navy SEAL, representing Virginia's 5th Congressional District.
This will be a great opportunity to connect, hear from two inspiring leaders, get an update on what's happening in Washington, D.C. and enjoy a memorable evening together. We would love to see you there!
[Click here for details](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011T6FeV7ut_nlSzEZN-uv7gXWWJyR9X05Odv4uObR11jROdb2V4b6boGWb9xKoQ14wOJb_8YB7fSnAU4LOUKO_lTKnOyWO3Wul2DFbrUY6XxzjCKXrZpYO11_-j413kHJgqilfH5acxIL972Fi38OBtbyfO_zOVTIa6ZyzWIzVfmSGqLtcQqUH10iWDt85cwI1NazjNxuUh0=&c=bLBex97-SLeOoNik9AWOFomsM1MYyVmeT304OXUe3AS_FHPhbpuV2A==&ch=4kzcuZKXaPSn2qM-nlpVACwuNcs6-EgR44YMXrzyv4qGt3p_MbA8bw==)

| Thank you for your support! Together, we'll take this country back. Please bring a friend!
---
| For God and Country,

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Four reasons why
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4734%2E35263%2EdCgUHL)
Peter — with only four days until our end-of-month deadline, we’re reaching out with four reasons why your $4 donation matters today. **[But if you’re ready to chip in now, you can click here to support Tammy.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4531?c0=stb-em-may25.6dcRDb&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250527_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4734%2E35263%2EdCgUHL)** | [CHIP IN $4](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2527?c0=stb-em-may25.04ZUKL&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250527_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4734%2E35263%2EdCgUHL)
---
Here are four reasons why we hope to earn your support today:
1. Tammy is fighting to support her Democratic colleagues in the Senate, flip the majority **blue** in 2026, and get our government back to work for the people, not the wealthy and well-connected.
2. Tammy is calling out Elon Musk and Donald Trump’s _harmful cuts_ to programs that hard-working Wisconsin families, veterans, and farmers rely on. She’s committed to this fight, and it’s up to us to have her back.
3. _Remember Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race?_ Far-right megadonors are ready to pour **millions of dollars more** into other consequential races across the country. We have to be ready for anything, and that work starts now.
4. **Every goal matters to support this people-powered work** , so we’re asking you one more time:

**[Will you pitch in $4 or more today so we can reach our fundraising goal before the Saturday deadline? Anything you can give helps us build up our defenses and prepare for the onslaught of Republican attacks coming our way.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4531?c0=stb-em-may25.6dcRDb&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250527_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4734%2E35263%2EdCgUHL)**

name: Cory Booker
subject: I am reaching out to you right now and imploring you, if you are able to, to join me with a donation of any amount to Mark’s reelection campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
As we make our voices heard – and uplift the voices of working Americans – we need to be prepared for a fight at the ballot box.

|
---

| | Derek,

Earlier this year, I took to the Senate floor and spoke for 25 hours – because I cannot stand by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

Luckily, I was not in it alone.

Not only did Americans all across the country reach out with words of encouragement, I had colleagues like Mark on the floor with me – standing in solidarity with our fight and helping me hold the floor.

Our work to hold the Trump administration accountable did not end with the conclusion of that speech. _It continues every single day._

**As we make our voices heard – and uplift the voices of working Americans – we need to be prepared for a fight at the ballot box too.**

Republicans are eyeing Virginia as an opportunity to expand their majority in the Senate. We need to recognize that Elon Musk, Donald Trump, or another far-right billionaire could spin up a $50 or $100 million super PAC against Mark to replace him with another Trump acolyte.

[**_We cannot let that happen. The work to defend Mark’s seat has already started. So, if you are able to, I am imploring you to join me with a donation of any amount to Mark’s reelection campaign._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108464509/548008110/-489761693?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Booker_250527_T1_1_c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDQ0ODdkMi0zYjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZ8XA6gj5XhuIuI-HsNKfXlFtIj6_wZsLMOIVpqOH34=) This moment demands extraordinary effort from us all.

We must stand up for the working families of America, and stand against Trump’s plans to cut essential programs like Medicaid and food stamps to fund tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans.

Thank you for taking action with me. It means more to me than I can express.

With love and gratitude,

Cory ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108464516/548008117/-489761693?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Booker_250527_T1_1_c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDQ0ODdkMi0zYjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZ8XA6gj5XhuIuI-HsNKfXlFtIj6_wZsLMOIVpqOH34=)****

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: they’re coming after healthcare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=D0cMgUcSBHWoNNnwTVAcolxbR%2BMe7If49EQDjnQ14nukihJdI%2B6WMlkLRldfXM0Lylf87gYkRymy6HDIcE8%2FgVUg61eInHSRE8meNLap7dfk1iWIiDMretdYeWLBzYcPMZpmR14TQNCluMgPJMn3epT8dlCg0OwPV0Rhzr8L1tTS4bEBF3OHY1nlnfZyqfXUdDno2V7Z3CyFHH%2BuT0Bc3%2FWOoGEboJLbIegLIDkDOHpUe6S9VSE2l2JuT5q1kkJBpRbqgfhM%2FMHGM%2FchEGJG98%2F8ruDfxGBafH0OjS73G1zlrLZTrwZOxVIdWdEn0Ujtpa1GA1OT%2F1PUkfvb90a2F5U8o3z7zUuBq5lk7PYKK4xO6zuvczzoKGu87C%2FQ6ZKcBgMb2RmU3uW3gc7ze2O02ucL4PZVW7Oe8CAV22HClvGrLWI%2BGv2ZY8IT4Hc3Pwju)
---
| |
---
Peter,

The American Progress Institute released its independent analysis of the Republican tax bill.

They found **_nearly 30,000 RIers could lose their health insurance._

To pay for tax cuts for billionaires. And now, it’s passed in the House, with 215 Republican votes.**

[We must take back the House in 2026 so we can put up a stronger line of defense for the American people. | | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM-OozwQxJ_G3IxM28Zw4BA-Qg6fMhplVjPaE_L4T-IVBsaYsHn7FRHKxYfyr7q6Wvqpd_ZRIVEjgJvTMwJA9IAAfn6vPix__P8nLN_f_-Kf_M3z7Rf-29E7vOBByce1_ijLtaXzV_YWyyl83bMXHh-TecF7aGq8dP2miibRFbWasMRUmWAFFSXkNLlVWkgGhApumSWC8pJwlStutMqlYNYkrgICnHAQQDhQmuZEK8FVwQrLFckIYuSZk0pvglMym-MqQxhHn6rRJ311i3Gan4u1CNrZqCWYVA5Gj3EjELReLhrbMWAvh5uMUQ4IWsszozRlWNmCYqYMwd8AAss8t99aZJJTto2k7RJ9N49LUAbRpm5O-HL8RJBvsjfaLR7R5njeFSX9JN11QLTZi0FXN6fu3J675lBn3eX42X38Olzw9uymaIJ_GjgvujVkSaj0tLq-d3MuECPX5wG2uvcK_gUAAP__OciVnA) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape. If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP. That’s what he ran on... Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors... And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air. New Yorkers deserve better... Americans deserve better. That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM-OozwQxJ_G3IxM28Zw4BA-Qg6fMhplVjPaE_L4T-IVBsaYsHn7FRHKxYfyr7q6Wvqpd_ZRIVEjgJvTMwJA9IAAfn6vPix__P8nLN_f_-Kf_M3z7Rf-29E7vOBByce1_ijLtaXzV_YWyyl83bMXHh-TecF7aGq8dP2miibRFbWasMRUmWAFFSXkNLlVWkgGhApumSWC8pJwlStutMqlYNYkrgICnHAQQDhQmuZEK8FVwQrLFckIYuSZk0pvglMym-MqQxhHn6rRJ311i3Gan4u1CNrZqCWYVA5Gj3EjELReLhrbMWAvh5uMUQ4IWsszozRlWNmCYqYMwd8AAss8t99aZJJTto2k7RJ9N49LUAbRpm5O-HL8RJBvsjfaLR7R5njeFSX9JN11QLTZi0FXN6fu3J675lBn3eX42X38Olzw9uymaIJ_GjgvujVkSaj0tLq-d3MuECPX5wG2uvcK_gUAAP__OciVnA)** I could really use your help. Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side. To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side... A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities... Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again! This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible... That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party. I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me. What were we doing? When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live? When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Hi Peter,

I know things feel grim right now--Trump's spiraling, his policies are uglier than ever, and the stakes have never felt higher. But here's the truth: Democrats have a real shot at taking back the House in 2026, and we've already seen the cracks forming in the MAGA coalition.

From New York to Iowa to Omaha, special elections in deep-red districts are turning against the chaos of Trump 2.0. They're rejecting the cruelty of a Republican Party that's gutting Medicaid, slashing food programs, and deporting lawful migrants to foreign prisons--including countries with active slave trades.

This is our moment to fight back.

[**If you 're ready to join a movement that won't compromise with cruelty or go silent when democracy is on the line--chip in now and help us build a House majority that actually stands for something.

**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUB3ei0l-oPF8f8SNdzvYi7zN3hcaIv-KDjnqzvuZoR-pi2v1oJ18WZDg30HE_cTqxk0TjVWz-1rMxlvg0E58gu0tV-gQvko4IoIRjcpMPLvpcXDcrhtNcP7v2U_JcJe_q8vke602sY-FeUpIvk738U-dZVKtdNg-_99mMcVDN7POwU1MclgLugGiPUxNaj5dwRJ6Iiq4uqTV5C0B97t5VmIk_Sa4wIjbT5kiugRIWgzldGtmMovrbBV_VlhUlx6Yip_hKNg4MUPAkU9XWenhlf0b3RcG0JaGc4oy46KiIO-Z2xyYFr5EK3OnBo6_WULVwd9U7aLKod-KppROWbcCmeKAacev7vmYarTfB7ZpvKhhQ/4gu/ec_1WkqbQjOvo1JCNeJExQ/h1/h001.Q5Kc-X9PE_STqEy0bQlJ0EbXgaPzzm-MAr7En4Sl7qY)But if we win the House--and I believe we will--it will likely be by a narrow margin.

**Which means we can 't afford a single weak link in our own party.

**That's why I'm running to replace Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez.

**Because the truth is: we already have a MAGA sympathizer in our Democratic delegation.

** My opponent backed the SAVE Act, a Republican voter suppression bill based on a lie, putting married women and survivors of domestic violence at risk of losing their voice at the ballot box.

She voted for the Laken Riley Act--now one of the justifications Trump uses for sweeping, inhumane immigration raids.

She supported a defense bill that restricted reproductive care for service members--so extreme, Planned Parenthood dropped their endorsement.

And she even joined MAGA to censure civil rights icon Rep. Al Green--for daring to speak out in defense of our rights.

**So what does it mean to take back the House if we leave people like this in our ranks?

** In 2026, winning the majority won't just be about stopping Trump.

It will be about _reversing_ the damage: repealing the SAVE Act if it becomes law, ending inhumane immigration crackdowns, restoring reproductive care access, and defending civil rights with more than lip service.

**But we won 't get that fight from someone who already votes with MAGA on these exact issues.

****We need Democrats ready to lead the reversal --not support the rot.

**In 2022, I stepped aside to unify this district and keep MAGA out. This time, I'm not stepping aside. I'm stepping up to accomplish the same goal.

Because our families deserve better than betrayal. Our country deserves a Congress that actually fights. And WA-03 deserves a representative who never forgets where they come from--or who they serve.

[**We can take back the House in 2026. But only if we clean our own house first. If you 're with us, chip in today!

But here's the truth: Democrats have a real shot at taking back the House in 2026, and we've already seen the cracks forming in the MAGA coalition. From New York to Iowa to Omaha, special elections in deep-red districts are turning against the chaos of Trump 2.0. They're rejecting the cruelty of a Republican Party that's gutting Medicaid, slashing food programs, and deporting lawful migrants to foreign prisons--including countries with active slave trades. This is our moment to fight back. if we win the House--and I believe we will--it will likely be by a narrow margin. Which means we can 't afford a single weak link in our own party. That's why I'm running to replace Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez. Because the truth is: we already have a MAGA sympathizer in our Democratic delegation. My opponent backed the SAVE Act, a Republican voter suppression bill based on a lie, putting married women and survivors of domestic violence at risk of losing their voice at the ballot box. She voted for the Laken Riley Act--now one of the justifications Trump uses for sweeping, inhumane immigration raids. She supported a defense bill that restricted reproductive care for service members--so extreme, Planned Parenthood dropped their endorsement. And she even joined MAGA to censure civil rights icon Rep. Al Green--for daring to speak out in defense of our rights. So what does it mean to take back the House if we leave people like this in our ranks? In 2026, winning the majority won't just be about stopping Trump. It will be about reversing the damage: repealing the SAVE Act if it becomes law, ending inhumane immigration crackdowns, restoring reproductive care access, and defending civil rights with more than lip service. But we won 't get that fight from someone who already votes with MAGA on these exact issues. We need Democrats ready to lead the reversal --not support the rot. In 2022, I stepped aside to unify this district and keep MAGA out. This time, I'm not stepping aside. I'm stepping up to accomplish the same goal. Because our families deserve better than betrayal. Our country deserves a Congress that actually fights. And WA-03 deserves a representative who never forgets where they come from--or who they serve. Heal Washington! Brent | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Atlanta Voice: Georgia seeks another Supreme Court showdown over Voting Rights Act [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=bTm6WyF6CKRIYuzi3HJLM9KsGJgZdGvpKyHRRpeqsUpiBXyO2Soq/KxZnmyLjNnAnK+YZR23rwv7NLg2bMFWAiwnxbF1l/1ZJXDh/XxF+KA=]
Bad news for everyone, Team: The state of Georgia is seeking another Supreme Court showdown over the Voting Rights Act, asking a federal appeals court to interpret the 1965 law in a way that could make it much harder to prove minority votes have been illegally diluted.
Georgia is trying to persuade the judges to make up a new, harder-to-prove standard that could hobble Voting Rights Act lawsuits, less than two years after the U.S. Supreme Court turned back a separate challenge from Alabama to the VRA.
From the AP: " A lawyer for the state asked a three-judge panel of the 11th Circuit U.S. Court of Appeals in Atlanta to overturn a lower court that required lawmakers to draw more Black-majority electoral districts. Georgia’s Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger argued in court filings that the Voting Rights Act is being misused to bolster Democratic election chances and that white voters prefer Republicans for nonracial reasons. "
Opponents of voting rights are hell-bent on dismantling the Voting Rights Act piece by piece and we can't let them. We have to fight in Georgia, Alabama, and beyond to protect our fundamental rights
Pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to give us the resources we need to defend our right to vote in the states, in the courts, and in Congress >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What can we do for America at this moment of truth?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

I gave the commencement speech at the USC Gould School of Law last week in
which I challenged the graduates, and all of us with them, to squarely
face the challenges before us — the incitement to political violence, the
abnegation of alliances around the world, the rollback of voting rights
and other fundamental freedoms, attacks on law firms and universities, the
undermining of the Constitution and the rejection of the rule of law — and
then to do what Americans have been doing for 249 years: overcome them.

[ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xJ-PuYhy0NQ ][IMG]

Where would we be if not for those at Lexington and Concord who helped win
our independence? The hundreds of thousands who voluntarily enlisted and
were killed in the fight to defeat the Confederacy and end the institution
of slavery? The brave men and women who risked, and too often lost, their
lives in order to achieve Civil Rights and Voting Rights? The courageous
Americans who died on those beaches in Normandy 81 years ago, defeating
fascism abroad and preserving democracy here at home?

This is who we are, what we’re made of, where we come from. It’s never
been the people in power, it’s always been the power of the people. That’s
who fought the battles, who won civil rights, who inspired our fellow
Americans to do what they could, with what they had, wherever they might
be at every critical moment in our history.

So even if every traditional center of power — the presidency, the
congress, the supreme court, the algorithm media machines — is in the
hands of the corrupt and the cowardly, they still don’t have all of the
power. And what they have is not even close to the power that really
matters.

In a government of, by and for the people, the power resides in us, all of
us. We just have to remember it and use it.

We will overcome the challenges before us because we’ve overcome them
before against even greater odds. I believe in America because I believe
in the American people who still make this country “the last best hope of
earth.”

You can watch the full speech here:
[ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xJ-PuYhy0NQ ]https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xJ-PuYhy0NQ?. I'd love to know
what you think of it.

Thank you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=240128%2E444211%2EldmAqB

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
subject: We’re currently behind 😬
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re currently tracking behind last month’s fundraising numbers.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250527-5088-footer&t=1&akid=5088%2E420207%2EbBC6Vv)
Peter, right now everyone on Team Pramila is working hard to hit our fundraising goals as we approach Saturday’s end-of-month deadline.
**But I need to level with you: we’re currently tracking _behind_ last month’s fundraising numbers. 😬**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250527?refcode=em20250527-5088&amount=3&refcode2=5088_420207_bBC6Vv&akid=5088%2E420207%2EbBC6Vv)
_A real screenshot from our ActBlue page. As you can see, we’re behind right now!_
We’ve set a goal of raising $35,000 this month from emails like this one, and we have until midnight on Saturday night to do it. [**Can you pitch in $3 to help us get back on pace and reach this critically important end-of-month goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250527?refcode=em20250527-5088&amount=3&refcode2=5088_420207_bBC6Vv&akid=5088%2E420207%2EbBC6Vv)
Since Pramila’s first campaign for Congress, we’ve relied on grassroots donors like you to fund our work. **No corporate PACs, no seeking out billionaires to use as ATMs.** We’re funded _by_ the people because Pramila is working _for_ the people.
And believe me, we don’t set these goals just for fun. We do it because it takes resources to fund all the work Pramila is doing to mobilize a strong resistance against Trump’s authoritarian, billionaire-first agenda.
**And if we miss our goals, it means making hard choices about what to fund and what to cut.**
With so much at stake right now, I don’t want to be in a position where we’re scaling back our organizing work or our voter outreach. So I’m hoping I can count on this grassroots team to help us catch up.
[**That’s why I’m asking: If you’re in a position to donate right now, will you please pitch in $3 or any amount that works for you before our end-of-month deadline on Saturday?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250527?refcode=em20250527-5088&amount=3&refcode2=5088_420207_bBC6Vv&akid=5088%2E420207%2EbBC6Vv)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250527?amount=3&refcode=em20250527-5088&refcode2=5088_420207_bBC6Vv&akid=5088%2E420207%2EbBC6Vv)**
Thanks for everything you do,
Lauren Lalonde
Campaign Manager, Pramila for Congress
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250527-5088-footer&t=2&refcode2=5088_420207_bBC6Vv&akid=5088%2E420207%2EbBC6Vv)**
---

subject: We need working class champions in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, We are officially making our first Congressional endorsement of the midterms — **Adelita Grijalva, who is running in a special election in Arizona’s 7th District.** She has a proven track record of fighting for working families in Arizona. And we NEED her help in continuing to push back against Trump’s attacks on Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security. As well as fighting to fund public education, expand clean energy programs, and promote affordable housing. [Please split a donation today with WFP and Adelita Grijalva’s campaign, so we can put more working class leaders in office. The primary election is on July 15th, and we want all the early momentum we can get.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9BG-iXmA0xQ3sSznXITC1nYiC4ZikLpEmahUpW7M9hDw4DocUzfi9DWhQZxd3Yhr205KCHkE0fwl9xya516eagWSVzZKsaVu7sSKe6hnOUynTHuywjrmdM0-G8W27let0CkqhVOB5zDwQp5zQx9_6wXOumsmVhvyxIdsRoEYwZs40bbypayW3INr1ilJt-xLV2_Zxt145i9sf_wxbQNQly55IB8vXqBUuZRcfP5KMCxpoOoV8OrH18KwX_NZdrjALq5pEwjoQsj-Vp54QeK8nary-R0g3ibimlsU7l8WJayHzC1EDAwf1xvPT_RtTjKPwr5QTjQPWiBwszVGAFCLo7HuBuusKU-LANwD-CoIrhLnV9PoFRPu9PscBKpHCK6iy/4gu/6zOrciFHSIiEXTyyZWbIKw/h0/h001.73HpHKGLP5bIjgK_wMgJw_IkapS3peJeAwOseDA0rlE) **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9BG-iXmA0xQ3sSznXITC1nYiC4ZikLpEmahUpW7M9hDw4DocUzfi9DWhQZxd3Yhr2HbiQ2cC6h7dTwZK2kYF6hrRsTUu7NENdymZZ7AWfvrFnKl6aBvMoO6iAmsAYFvvMIYA-juGaNUosTIgrfbgBr_gkohNella1IZHuZKMZyJ2fzf_-kB6KLa6ahw95CcFwSGOoDRnn4rsIg1NlXKcUcSssHqs5Z8djq0dwb3bL2LCpX6a1sBPSCyBllzG5CqwXezQRvEE8G67RghVxbYjFLneFt50WtNlIwyv8orKpEtiqRIjodC-EAIcYRI6n7oGdG5HU5596EGxXGbi2yH66SeHT-JW0fJGjgesIplAvTZxJJi7fwV1Av2bU7jYGFv5k/4gu/6zOrciFHSIiEXTyyZWbIKw/h1/h001.27b7PtC-eDEcqX7MZeIm2c-lzZe1fONOgWhwuqB52QY)** Right now, we have a Republican House majority whose sole desire is to give tax breaks to their billionaire donors, and throw millions of people off their health care. clean_body: | | | Peter, We are officially making our first Congressional endorsement of the midterms — Adelita Grijalva, who is running in a special election in Arizona’s 7th District. She has a proven track record of fighting for working families in Arizona. And we NEED her help in continuing to push back against Trump’s attacks on Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security. As well as fighting to fund public education, expand clean energy programs, and promote affordable housing. Right now, we have a Republican House majority whose sole desire is to give tax breaks to their billionaire donors, and throw millions of people off their health care. And we simply cannot afford to let any more Republicans ascend to power in Congress — nor can we afford to elect Democrats who are too eager to “compromise” with Trump. That’s why we’re endorsing Adelita today. She understands the economic anxieties that people in our country are feeling. And like her father before her, she knows that we won’t get anywhere by playing nice with an opposition party that is actively throwing our nation into crisis after crisis. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. #
This Saturday is our big end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re working hard to reach our $50,000 May goal.
**Reaching our monthly goals means that Sarah can stay focused on what really matters: legislating and fighting back against the GOP’s cruel policies, not fundraising.**
[**Any amount you’re able to give right now will make a powerful difference. But if you can spare it, please pitch in $5 to help us reach our goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250527-1?refcode=em20250527-2038&amount=5&refcode2=2038_21716_fC2i8t&akid=2038%2E21716%2EfC2i8t)

Last week, while House Republicans tried to slash Medicaid and SNAP under the cover of night, Sarah stood up on the House floor at 2 AM and called them out. Because working families should not suffer so that billionaires can get richer.
That kind of leadership is exactly why she’s in Congress, and it’s grassroots contributions from regular folks across the country that power her work.
[**Can you chip in $5 or more to show your support for Sarah and help us hit our $50,000 May goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250527-1?refcode=em20250527-2038&amount=5&refcode2=2038_21716_fC2i8t&akid=2038%2E21716%2EfC2i8t)

Team McBride

body:
| | | Friend, My name is John James. I’m a combat veteran, West Point graduate, and businessman. Most importantly, I’m a proud American who’s dedicated my life to serving this country. **Right now, I’m facing the political fight of my life.** The radical Left, the DNC, and their allies in the media know exactly what I represent—an unapologetic America First conservative who’s not afraid to lead, not afraid to serve, and who won’t crumble under their attacks. _**_They know that I’m living proof that the days of SPINELESS conservatives are OVER._**_ That’s why I’m one of the socialist Lefts’ **TOP TARGETS**.
---
[ **DO YOU HAVE MY BACK?** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=1686fdf4d0c942cab4654688020d2719&_e=JKPP2zEkxyPOMFjr7hmYL_opjrFGrXt9XdlLw1NXuIIUZxXX2CMRq3Db5IjtpQXRmKm15uGK2fDW_arGZJcQmkbDyzXZxlNwDa7ln6kQHEVM6XfFoMeJQKsa1YoBnInWxahikSZeuJkY_2FgMeonodtgyd5qCJJwDDZOiJpbIwSSp_hCfX5cdNUnKVdrypXgot3wsIeeklDoA1Sxe-oSgjsndJfFBOR5H8tLLPvoGdxYL3wQA1mkSnvwS55AKrrW4_LE3awOEOZPB2f0OoL0HA%3D%3D)
---
They know that Michigan is the key to the White House, the Senate and the House Majority—and that I’m one of the few people standing in their way. **_As the TOP OF THE TICKET race, I’m on a mission to FLIP the Michigan Governor’s office_**** _RED _****_in 2026 and help Republicans expand their majorities nationwide. _**
---
[ **JOIN THIS MISSION** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=1686fdf4d0c942cab4654688020d2719&_e=JKPP2zEkxyPOMFjr7hmYL_opjrFGrXt9XdlLw1NXuIIUZxXX2CMRq3Db5IjtpQXRmKm15uGK2fDW_arGZJcQmgaa0K3iHIj-YJvyvAh2em6318lNo9Zm6i9tSKCdWrun5RFZjV-vcv1zELCBxLuI5ZZ1xiWu3o6-vzOz0wBCty9-0qDW7B8ZzRQzxVuLoLVAVud5z-H287dMzoHjdymuUy-egOKTd6c3UlzKTq5_5kr6Ni8Iy6qF_r4vtCLjBcwEZnKB5-UyI2Jgi91qdcyLNw%3D%3D)
---
**Now, before I go any further, I must level with you. ** **_If things keep going the way they are now, this campaign might not even make it to next year. _** Democrats are dumping millions into this race to try and silence my voice and shut down our movement while [**_many of the strongest conservative grassroots donors in our movement have been silent. _**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=1686fdf4d0c942cab4654688020d2719&_e=JKPP2zEkxyPOMFjr7hmYL_opjrFGrXt9XdlLw1NXuIIUZxXX2CMRq3Db5IjtpQXRmKm15uGK2fDW_arGZJcQmkUeUTzgZTlr0OAqcx52h0Z0ytKva-4N8FX1LXdFyAxIHIns7UBTDJ6ZtkFko1zPGzbSnTd8PQfx0h7OC8pmAtlWjuoOLN3jxby0ILPFQIUeUoSJ73aAgsQVvnNyYhKP8HPOv2A4je2yL-fXAxx-IiRjkoMP0HNGGms6hBIqLR_ai65h0AbxZ-PwKXlX2890AQ%3D%3D) **_Let me be clear: the fight that started in 2024 isn’t over, it’s just beginning._****_Now is not the time to GIVE UP. _** I’ve worn the uniform. I’ve led in combat. I’ve flown Apaches in enemy territory. I’ve never backed down from a fight—and I’m not starting now. But, this is a dire situation and I need backup. # ["Look what I have. I have everything!"](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=164594920&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTk0OTIwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDgzODA4MDgsImV4cCI6MTc1MDk3MjgwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gh8ogn_zqv1xOtbt0vBYJeH3dLg1DjO74rxe_uGFN50)
### Donald Trump completely misses the point of Memorial Day
| | [Brian J Karem](https://substack.com/@brianjkarem)
---
| May 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianjkarem)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=164594920&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTk0OTIwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0ODM4MDgwOCwiZXhwIjoxNzUwOTcyODA4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jVQfnjLx-EYfdYfLfuxN3waE1RdE136sekHWgIifykk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/71c34fac-6bb7-4140-a055-f56e7bcebb3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump began the morning of Memorial day with a rage tweet, then placed a wreath at the tomb of the unknown soldier before he made an instantly forgettable speech.
Then he went out for a round of golf.
The rage tweet, delivered just before 7 a.m.,was vintage Donald Trump; written in all caps and disparaging those who he despised - at least half of the country:
* * *
"HAPPY [MEMORIAL DAY](https://substack.com/redirect/cb905f98-4843-4b31-a32d-cb5adaa5a436?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) TO ALL, INCLUDING THE SCUM THAT SPENT THE LAST FOUR YEARS TRYING TO DESTROY OUR COUNTRY THROUGH WARPED RADICAL LEFT MINDS, WHO ALLOWED 21,000,000 MILLION PEOPLE TO ILLEGALLY ENTER OUR COUNTRY, MANY OF THEM BEING CRIMINALS AND THE MENTALLY INSANE,THROUGH AN OPEN BORDER THAT ONLY AN INCOMPETENT PRESIDENT WOULD APPROVE, AND THROUGH JUDGES WHO ARE ON A MISSION TO KEEP MURDERERS, DRUG DEALERS, RAPISTS, GANG MEMBERS, AND RELEASED PRISONERS FROM ALL OVER THE WORLD, IN OUR COUNTRY SO THEY CAN ROB, MURDER, AND RAPE AGAIN -- ALL PROTECTED BY THESE USA HATING JUDGES WHO SUFFER FROM AN IDEOLOGY THAT IS SICK, AND VERY DANGEROUS FOR OUR COUNTRY. HOPEFULLY THE UNITED STATES SUPREME COURT, AND OTHER GOOD AND COMPASSIONATE JUDGES THROUGHOUT THE LAND, WILL SAVE US FROM THE DECISIONS OF THE MONSTERS WHO WANT OUR COUNTRY TO GO TO HELL. BUT FEAR NOT, WE HAVE MADE GREAT PROGRESS OVER THE LAST 4 MONTHS, AND AMERICA WILL SOON BE SAFE AND GREAT AGAIN! AGAIN, HAPPY MEMORIAL DAY, AND GOD BLESS AMERICA!"
* * *
Not only were his facts in error about the number of illegal entries, but it should be noted that during Trump's first administration he cheered each week as "Infrastructure Week" at the White House. Yet, he never produced an infrastructure bill.
Joe Biden, the guy Trump always calls "incompetent" signed the _Bipartisan_ Infrastructure bill into law on November 15, 2021, less than a year after walking into 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue. Despite Trump's continued withering insults tossed at the former president, he has shown no ability to get anything done with the label "bipartisan" attached to it.
Most of the Memorial Day tweet has nothing to do with Memorial Day, unless you're memorializing hate. But Trump didn't care. By the time that Truth Social post sunk in, the man who avoided serving his country because of bone spurs, who once denigrated Gold Start families, POWs and famously called those who died in battle "losers" was busy laying a wreath on the tomb of the unknown soldier at Arlington National Cemetery.
A short time after that he made a 20 minute speech in which he applauded the sacrifice of the members of the military who "live for others" before he took another swipe at Biden. "Those young men could never have known what their sacrifice would mean to us, but we certainly know what we owe to them. That valor gave us the freest, greatest and most noble Republic ever to exist on the face of the earth. A republic that I am fixing after a long and hard four years. That was a hard four years we went through," Trump said.
Well, at least he was consistent.
But nothing could top Trump's self-adulation as he mentioned the military parade planned for his 79th birthday. It's supposedly about America's 250th birthday, but Trump obviously thinks it is all about him. He also cheered the 2026 World Cup and the 2028 Olympics coming to the United States before remarking that if he had won the 2020 election which he still claims that he did, he wouldn't be president now to enjoy such festivities.
Yeah, figure out that logic.

"Can you imagine I missed that four years? Now look what I have. I have everything. Amazing the way things work out. God did that, I believe that, too," he said.
Yes, God, in his infinite wisdom is sitting in Heaven making sure that Donald Trump is happy. The almighty has no care for Gold Star families who've lost their loved ones, but Der Leader gets favored nation status with Gawd.
One _person_ who doesn't care if Trump is happy is Vladimir Putin.
The day before Trump managed to turn Memorial Day into another congratulatory slap on his own back, the Russian leader bombed Kyiv.
Trump, in a quick question and answer session with the traveling pool of White House reporters, lost it Sunday talking about Putin. "I'm not happy with what Putin's doing. He's killing a lot of people. And I don't know what the hell happened to Putin. I've known him a long time, always gotten along with him, but he's sending rockets into cities and killing people and I don't like it at all. We're in the middle of talking and he's sending rockets into Kyiv and other cities. I don't like it at all. I'm very surprised. We'll see what we're going to do.... I don't like what Putin is doing... he's killing people. Something happened to this guy and I don't like it," Trump said.
I get the idea that he doesn't like it at all.
But he shouldn't be surprised. Putin has been bombing, killing and fighting in Ukraine for a decade. Now Trump is surprised?
Maybe so, because back in March he was singing a different tune:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3b490c74-b8aa-4d70-b839-c6d80df68c92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The fact is Putin played Trump much like Trump played Bill Maher.
Sometimes the easiest person to con is the con man.
The facts show that Putin has never shown the slightest inclination toward stopping the invasion of Ukraine. Bombing it while he's on the phone with Trump is just the exclamation point to the disrespect and disdain he shows to Ukraine and Trump on a daily basis.
Many presidents would be upset. Some would do something about it.
Then there's Donald Trump. Shortly after he left his speech in Arlington, he made his way to his favorite local golf course and did no more work for the day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/376e6c79-59b6-4598-b9c9-a24c785b2bc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

"Those young men could never have known what their sacrifice would mean to us, but we certainly know what we owe to them. That valor gave us the freest, greatest and most noble Republic ever to exist on the face of the earth. A republic that I am fixing after a long and hard four years. That was a hard four years we went through," Trump said. Well, at least he was consistent. But nothing could top Trump's self-adulation as he mentioned the military parade planned for his 79th birthday. It's supposedly about America's 250th birthday, but Trump obviously thinks it is all about him. He also cheered the 2026 World Cup and the 2028 Olympics coming to the United States before remarking that if he had won the 2020 election which he still claims that he did, he wouldn't be president now to enjoy such festivities. Yeah, figure out that logic. `Independent Media For $1.32/Week!` We 're running a special! Full Access to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week! Please support our work covering stories monopoly media ignores. And amplifying indy media to create a viable, powerful, media ecosystem independent of corporate interests! Amplify Good. Support Indy Media! "Can you imagine I missed that four years? Now look what I have. I have everything. Amazing the way things work out. God did that, I believe that, too," he said. Yes, God, in his infinite wisdom is sitting in Heaven making sure that Donald Trump is happy. The almighty has no care for Gold Star families who've lost their loved ones, but Der Leader gets favored nation status with Gawd. One person who doesn't care if Trump is happy is Vladimir Putin. The day before Trump managed to turn Memorial Day into another congratulatory slap on his own back, the Russian leader bombed Kyiv. Trump, in a quick question and answer session with the traveling pool of White House reporters, lost it Sunday talking about Putin. "I'm not happy with what Putin's doing. He's killing a lot of people. And I don't know what the hell happened to Putin. I've known him a long time, always gotten along with him, but he's sending rockets into cities and killing people and I don't like it at all. We're in the middle of talking and he's sending rockets into Kyiv and other cities. I don't like it at all. I'm very surprised. We'll see what we're going to do.... I don't like what Putin is doing... he's killing people. Something happened to this guy and I don't like it," Trump said. I get the idea that he doesn't like it at all. But he shouldn't be surprised. Putin has been bombing, killing and fighting in Ukraine for a decade. Now Trump is surprised? Maybe so, because back in March he was singing a different tune: | | ---|---|--- The fact is Putin played Trump much like Trump played Bill Maher. Sometimes the easiest person to con is the con man. The facts show that Putin has never shown the slightest inclination toward stopping the invasion of Ukraine. Bombing it while he's on the phone with Trump is just the exclamation point to the disrespect and disdain he shows to Ukraine and Trump on a daily basis. Many presidents would be upset. Some would do something about it. Then there's Donald Trump. Shortly after he left his speech in Arlington, he made his way to his favorite local golf course and did no more work for the day. | | ---|---|--- Brian Karem is an award-winning reporter, columnist, and author of "Free the Press," and seven others books. He has a popular podcast and Substack, "" as well as a related Substack "." You SHOULD subscribe to BOTH Thank you for You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Team Kelly Morrison
subject: May fundraising update from Team Kelly

body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter!
Team Kelly here – we hope you had a great Memorial Day weekend! We wanted to reach out with an update - since our first email letting you know of our May fundraising goal, this grassroots team raised over $9,200 towards our goal! We cannot emphasize enough how helpful your support is towards our “off year” goals - thank you from the bottom of our hearts!
Peter, that means we are now just about $8,800 away from our May goal with just 5 days to go. That is 51% of the way towards our goal!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/graphics/51%25.png]
Before we ask for your support, we wanted to give you a glimpse of how your contributions are put to use:
* The campaign never stops! We still have staff on to keep our operations running, and we plan to hire a robust team as we get closer to 2026. We had an incredible group of interns on this past campaign, and we cannot wait to hire another amazing cohort of paid interns in 2026.
* Minnesota has one of the most expensive media markets in the nation. Our TV ad aired for the last few months of the campaign in 2024, and it undoubtedly made a difference in boosting our campaign’s name recognition and made it possible to share our message to a wider audience across the district. If we continue to meet our fundraising goals, we will be able to share our message this coming campaign cycle.
* Lastly, we are working hard to show strong fundraising numbers this year, so our seat doesn’t garner attention from national Republicans. That way, we can also uplift other Democrats up and down the ballot in MN-03.
What do you say, Peter, could you chip in any amount today to help us reach our May goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=10] Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=50] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
Thank you so much for your continued support, Peter!
With gratitude,
Team Kelly
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]
Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date.
If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=x5WGSo3npbt2H%2BfdVxOE3MXpY8sPmVetMkPJc8WD7nX2%2BZyyeP8L8jvdBhYvIYWL2iRJCv7GMlSqpF41cVijQr83MC%2Flz6jCml7Xold8ynRspzrGOygGUvS2AuWmGDg2OTnciEB40cYxwACcxOONsgYABZGbzM%2BZXaPlgmevw9%2FmI5btwPTCuHmvZH%2BHpuqbhnG4WcJpGDBxj%2FgC9y%2B8f10%2FKiqD23ukx4QVfY7Xt5NGCxkbnRGnO%2Fgoh5kEuopYv%2F4mLwzcgQnyS5i5PW%2BybUDLLRigbSogGX0LDCTyRX%2BKcUyIo3OTmeEE5vlK6Er1RpAe9IzZYgw3Dk3PTPsi3zIL%2FNaG4%2BhyIJZubaofM%2BlkfzfeewmVi3Dm10i6xvQxtt9%2BhtF0eUJl%2FbyL%2Boj9sHUo79NgROijPBXFrXzDj2uooRFVMM4jLq%2FXpkdNE4D7] .

## Good evening PolitiBrawlers,
We hope you enjoyed the holiday weekend! Tonight, we have some animated debates happening in the media for you: Charlie Kirk took the gloves off with an arrogant Cambridge student, RFK Jr. taught Kaitlan Collins a lesson that she never learned in health class about food, and the Trump administration paused all foreign student visas, prompting further legal challenges.
We hope you are at least enjoying the bareknuckle brawl that is American politics.
**Thank you for your readership and support,**
The PolitiBrawl Team
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ilvN066CkuNAuedSvxTCi9V23dRe_RfE3b416XcIF1U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164581579)
* * *
## Charlie Kirk vs woke British brat
Charlie Kirk **[clashed with an anti-Trump British student](https://substack.com/redirect/610f5802-583a-4913-a324-903ac3f02a09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a Cambridge Union debate, telling him off in front of the crowd with a brutal final line.
"The difference is when we get our way, we will still have a country, and your country will be a third world hell hole!"
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/610f5802-583a-4913-a324-903ac3f02a09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/610f5802-583a-4913-a324-903ac3f02a09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You've obviously devoted a lot of your life to electing and keeping in power Donald Trump," the student told Kirk before listing several ways in which, he claims, the Trump administration has destabilized American foreign policy. "You promised to put America first; haven't you and your ilk sold America out?!"
**[Kirk calmly replied with one word,"No."](https://substack.com/redirect/610f5802-583a-4913-a324-903ac3f02a09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"Well I'm glad you have great intellectual substance," the student mocked Kirk.
The two battled over the results of President Trump's foreign policy, finally landing on the Israel/Palestine conflict.
"I cannot see how you have the gall to lecture us on Christian morality and then sit here and justify the murder of thousands of civilians," the student snapped at Kirk.
Kirk fired back, "I'm not going to justify every maneuver of a 100,000 person army. Instead, what I will do is say **[there is a good guy and there is a bad guy!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/610f5802-583a-4913-a324-903ac3f02a09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"Isn't that the morality of a child?!" the student quipped.
"It's interesting that you say that because a child who knows that Israel is the good guy and Hamas is bad has a lot more wisdom than a student like yourself at Cambridge University!" Kirk said.
Watch the explosive debate here:
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/610f5802-583a-4913-a324-903ac3f02a09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# "Whoop this girl's a**!" Secret Service suspends officers caught fist fighting outside Obama residence
Two uniformed Secret Service officers reportedly got into a physical fight outside Barack Obama's Washington, D.C. home last week and have now been suspended.
The brawl was caught on camera, showing the female agents punching and shoving each other, with one reportedly grabbing her radio and threatening to "whoop this girl's a**."
"The U.S. Secret Service is aware of an on-duty altercation that occurred between two Uniformed Division officers at approximately 2:30 a.m. on May 21," a Secret Service spokesman **[told the NY Post.](https://substack.com/redirect/73b36c7b-a513-475f-bcf4-dab9033d6780?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
The video and audio were published **[by RealClearPolitics reporter Susan Crabtree,](https://substack.com/redirect/099e3ed4-ddc5-460c-8830-9fc697f88bdc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** showing the incident happened about 2 miles from the White House.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/29c89358-a6d5-47d8-9d07-d5032e563789?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This adds to a pattern of concerning behavior within the Secret Service - another agent assigned to protect Kamala Harris was previously accused of attacking a supervisor in April 2024 after allegedly throwing sanitary pads and screaming at coworkers when relieved of duties.
The incident raises questions about professionalism and conduct within the Secret Service's uniformed division, especially given the high-profile nature of the location where it occurred.
* * *
# RFK Jr. CLAPS BACK at Kaitlan Collins' ridiculous "privilege" comment
RFK Jr. fired back at CNN's Kaitlan Collins for claiming that not all Americans can afford unprocessed foods after pointing out his "privileged" background.
Kennedy didn't let her get away with it...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/dcc0e325-33b9-4835-b41d-91a17beb2360?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/dcc0e325-33b9-4835-b41d-91a17beb2360?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"**[It's an illusion to think that processed food is cheap](https://substack.com/redirect/dcc0e325-33b9-4835-b41d-91a17beb2360?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** because you end up paying for it with diabetes. You end up paying for it with auto-immune disregulation, with mitochondrial dysfunction, with inflammation." RFK Jr. said. "People don't understand that these processed foods are poison. You're watching companies now that are changing their ingredients because of this movement. That are making good food more available to Americans because they're demanding it."
RFK Jr. refuted Collins presupposition, launching into updates about major corporations like Chobani that have changed their business due to more Americans demanding better ingredients.
Collins tried to counter attack, "There was a lot of push back from farmers," she said, referring to what was believed to be a call-out on widely used pesticides.
"There's nothing in this report that will worry the American farmer," RFK Jr. said. "We need the farmers as partners...What we want to do is create incentive to produce the best food that we can."
RFK then dropped a shocking truth bomb on the conversation, "Today, **[38% of teens are diabetic or pre-diabetic](https://substack.com/redirect/dcc0e325-33b9-4835-b41d-91a17beb2360?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ...It's bankrupting our country. 75% of American kids can't qualify for military service."
Watch the full conversation here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/dcc0e325-33b9-4835-b41d-91a17beb2360?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| | POLL
---
Is healthier food really more expensive?
| [Yes](https://substack..aRHui1ucdRRdlY4jLCY7ITYUfdnDw9tmAJQu_Chesfk?)
---
[No, that's a myth](https://substack..HZD1uyOzhQWnnYXzeScBKjjV0z1DKNFZY8RH_kRmCpI?)
[Not sure](https://substack.._U3zW34kdsC4-9ucIduYpbq_ix5fBMEr23bzDDfsGxM?)
* * *
# Trump admin pauses all student visas, faces legal fight
Secretary of State Marco Rubio has ordered all U.S. embassies and consulates to stop scheduling new student visa interviews while they prepare to expand social media screening and vetting requirements.
"Effective immediately, in preparation for an expansion of required social media screening and vetting, consular sections should not add any additional student or exchange visitor ... visa appointment capacity until further guidance is issued [separate telegram], which we anticipate in the coming days," an internal cable **[obtained by Politico read.](https://substack.com/redirect/8465d32c-9647-41b9-964c-79d8e2152b32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**Mass Visa Revocations:** The administration has already revoked at least 4,000 visas from international students with criminal records, including charges like arson, trafficking, domestic abuse, and robbery. They also tried to kick out nearly 7,000 Harvard foreign students but were blocked by a federal judge.
**Social Media Monitoring:** The State Department has set up an AI-powered program to scan students' social media accounts for statements supporting Hamas or other terror groups. Students expressing sympathy for designated terrorist organizations are having their visas revoked, with officials citing national security concerns.
