You're country will be a third world hell hole!" | | | May 27 | | | | | | | | | | | | Good evening PolitiBrawlers, We hope you enjoyed the holiday weekend! Tonight, we have some animated debates happening in the media for you: Charlie Kirk took the gloves off with an arrogant Cambridge student, RFK Jr. taught Kaitlan Collins a lesson that she never learned in health class about food, and the Trump administration paused all foreign student visas, prompting further legal challenges. We hope you are at least enjoying the bareknuckle brawl that is American politics. Thank you for your readership and support, The PolitiBrawl Team Charlie Kirk vs woke British brat Charlie Kirk during a Cambridge Union debate, telling him off in front of the crowd with a brutal final line. "The difference is when we get our way, we will still have a country, and your country will be a third world hell hole!" "You've obviously devoted a lot of your life to electing and keeping in power Donald Trump," the student told Kirk before listing several ways in which, he claims, the Trump administration has destabilized American foreign policy. "You promised to put America first; haven't you and your ilk sold America out?!" "Well I'm glad you have great intellectual substance," the student mocked Kirk. The two battled over the results of President Trump's foreign policy, finally landing on the Israel/Palestine conflict. "I cannot see how you have the gall to lecture us on Christian morality and then sit here and justify the murder of thousands of civilians," the student snapped at Kirk. Kirk fired back, "I'm not going to justify every maneuver of a 100,000 person army. Instead, what I will do is say "Isn't that the morality of a child?!" the student quipped. "It's interesting that you say that because a child who knows that Israel is the good guy and Hamas is bad has a lot more wisdom than a student like yourself at Cambridge University!" Kirk said. Watch the explosive debate here: WARNING: A Digital Dollar Is Still In The Works | | ---|---|--- Your Lifeline To Help Protect Your Money From An Anti-American Digital Dollar Americans over 60 years old MUST DO THIS now! Unfortunately, inflation will continue for at least the next 2 years unless something unheard of happens... "Whoop this girl's a!" Secret Service suspends officers caught fist fighting outside Obama residence Two uniformed Secret Service officers reportedly got into a physical fight outside Barack Obama's Washington, D.C. home last week and have now been suspended. The brawl was caught on camera, showing the female agents punching and shoving each other, with one reportedly grabbing her radio and threatening to "whoop this girl's a." "The U.S. Secret Service is aware of an on-duty altercation that occurred between two Uniformed Division officers at approximately 2:30 a.m. on May 21," a Secret Service spokesman The video and audio were published showing the incident happened about 2 miles from the White House. This adds to a pattern of concerning behavior within the Secret Service - another agent assigned to protect Kamala Harris was previously accused of attacking a supervisor in April 2024 after allegedly throwing sanitary pads and screaming at coworkers when relieved of duties. The incident raises questions about professionalism and conduct within the Secret Service's uniformed division, especially given the high-profile nature of the location where it occurred. RFK Jr. CLAPS BACK at Kaitlan Collins' ridiculous "privilege" comment RFK Jr. fired back at CNN's Kaitlan Collins for claiming that not all Americans can afford unprocessed foods after pointing out his "privileged" background. Kennedy didn't let her get away with it... " because you end up paying for it with diabetes. You end up paying for it with auto-immune disregulation, with mitochondrial dysfunction, with inflammation." RFK Jr. said. "People don't understand that these processed foods are poison. You're watching companies now that are changing their ingredients because of this movement. That are making good food more available to Americans because they're demanding it." RFK Jr. refuted Collins presupposition, launching into updates about major corporations like Chobani that have changed their business due to more Americans demanding better ingredients. Collins tried to counter attack, "There was a lot of push back from farmers," she said, referring to what was believed to be a call-out on widely used pesticides. "There's nothing in this report that will worry the American farmer," RFK Jr. said. "We need the farmers as partners...What we want to do is create incentive to produce the best food that we can." RFK then dropped a shocking truth bomb on the conversation, "Today, ...It's bankrupting our country. 75% of American kids can't qualify for military service." Watch the full conversation here: | | POLL Is healthier food really more expensive? | ? ? ? Trump admin pauses all student visas, faces legal fight Secretary of State Marco Rubio has ordered all U.S. embassies and consulates to stop scheduling new student visa interviews while they prepare to expand social media screening and vetting requirements. "Effective immediately, in preparation for an expansion of required social media screening and vetting, consular sections should not add any additional student or exchange visitor ... visa appointment capacity until further guidance is issued [separate telegram], which we anticipate in the coming days," an internal cable Mass Visa Revocations: The administration has already revoked at least 4,000 visas from international students with criminal records, including charges like arson, trafficking, domestic abuse, and robbery. They also tried to kick out nearly 7,000 Harvard foreign students but were blocked by a federal judge. Social Media Monitoring: The State Department has set up an AI-powered program to scan students' social media accounts for statements supporting Hamas or other terror groups. Students expressing sympathy for designated terrorist organizations are having their visas revoked, with officials citing national security concerns. PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Why I took the No Corporate PAC pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39758%2E3422442%2EWLDudW)
Dear Derek,
Since my first-ever campaign in 2018, I haven’t taken any money from corporate PACs—a fact that remains true even now in my campaign for California governor.
I’ll explain more below about why I took this pledge, but first, **[will you consider making a $5 donation to my No Corporate PAC campaign ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250527_1_ak?refcode=em20250527-39758&amount=5&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39758_3422442_WLDudW&akid=39758%2E3422442%2EWLDudW)**
**To me, politics has always been about using whatever power you have to make a difference.**
That’s why, during the first Trump administration, I pressed his CDC Director so hard to make COVID testing free for all Americans, regardless of insurance. It didn’t matter that I was nearly last in line to question. People were scared, their lives were at risk, and I had the platform to confront the nation’s top officials about this problem.
That same thinking is why I’ve always refused corporate money. Voters don’t trust most politicians to do the right thing. I’m trying to earn back their trust, so I decided to campaign differently from the way other candidates do it. Voters deserve to have confidence that I’m working for them and them only.
As governor, I will bring all stakeholders together to solve California’s biggest challenges, and that includes businesses, workers, and consumers. But, I want people’s best ideas, no matter where they come from, not just their campaign donations.
**[My team and I have set a May fundraising goal of $100,000 over email—and not a single dollar from corporations. We can’t do this without you. Will you please chip in $5 today to help us hit our target?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250527_1_ak?refcode=em20250527-39758&amount=5&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39758_3422442_WLDudW&akid=39758%2E3422442%2EWLDudW)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250527_1_ak?refcode=em20250527-39758&refcode2=39758_3422442_WLDudW&akid=39758%2E3422442%2EWLDudW)
Thanks for reading,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250527-39758&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39758_3422442_WLDudW&akid=39758%2E3422442%2EWLDudW)**

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23091%2E4449941%2ETX0Rcr) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23091%2E4449941%2ETX0Rcr) **[_CSPAN_ : “Democratic Leaders Introduce ‘Stop the Steal’ Bill to Block Elon Musk’s ‘Unlawful’ DOGE Actions”](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61601?t=3&akid=23091%2E4449941%2ETX0Rcr)**
* * *
**SIGN THE PETITION:

[URGE CONGRESS TO PASS THE _STOP THE STEAL BILL_ TO STOP ELON MUSK →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61601?t=4&akid=23091%2E4449941%2ETX0Rcr)**
| [CLICK HERE TO SIGN >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61601?t=5&akid=23091%2E4449941%2ETX0Rcr)
---
[SEEKING SIGNATURES FROM 2,341 MORE LOCAL DEMOCRATS]
This situation couldn’t be more dire:
* Elon Musk has the keys to our government – he’s already gained access to Social Security and Medicare information!!

* And now, he’s installing loyalists to key positions that will only do his bidding.

* _Even worse, Donald Trump has refused to hold him accountable – even saying that Musk can decide for himself when he has a conflict of interest._

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61601?t=6&akid=23091%2E4449941%2ETX0Rcr)
**THANKFULLY** , Sen. Schumer and Rep. Jeffries are teaming up to stop this injustice and pass this crucial bill. Just listen to Hakeem Jeffries on how important this is:
But without our support, this bill is doomed... Elon Musk will continue to destroy everything he touches!

[**So please, sign the petition urging Congress to pass the _Stop the Steal Bill_ before it’s too late:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61601?t=7&akid=23091%2E4449941%2ETX0Rcr)
[CLICK HERE TO SIGN >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61601?t=8&akid=23091%2E4449941%2ETX0Rcr)
---
Thanks for stepping up!

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Will you take a look at my resume?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I'm running for the Senate against a politician who, while our streets burned, pushed lawsuits against law enforcement officials

| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hIF0hVI01m7PTa-JNQ4sVw~~/AARclBA~/u1GZdKBFDTPW9h7jbbvYuJxmjGzwUN2UX1HvkKHdbdOdnAz2SnATCVE_mGX4WT_1ANdm_WxBgv3buTOV0O4pO4S8BtGbQVNKZhIoiQl0xfLEbUkCk6M8c2Xmvu2vZLadmKYX8Z-GgFDNXG_KA8rE3a0ODmGn2aYYrnjuygkyWh4KApLHrbGkXfGomJGkB5YzoDsA6Nw2T1h2CZQDo5y7MOKGEPjGF7wtrrDxxvWiuv9lXwTW-7tbcoJ5XHpyzraQ0LezaXjbpqnsBm7hkDPt727JCnQ2kBIVv_Z2R3Xx1JoLot_3MV4pCnEAw_q5bGbWZedG2HO6Dw32IXbJou3sL1bsywcH5r-c0wUeJAL_D6k~)
---

Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I'm a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz 's handpicked lieutenant governor--a politician even more radical than her boss.** I'm requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master's from Harvard, a Master's Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hIF0hVI01m7PTa-JNQ4sVw~~/AARclBA~/u1GZdKBFDTPW9h7jbbvYuJxmjGzwUN2UX1HvkKHdbdOdnAz2SnATCVE_mGX4WT_1ANdm_WxBgv3buTOV0O4pO4S8BtGbQVNKZhIoiQl0xfLEbUkCk6M8c2Xmvu2vZLadmKYX8Z-GgFDNXG_KA8rE3a0ODmGn2aYYrnjuygkyWh4KApLHrbGkXfGomJGkB5YzoDsA6Nw2T1h2CZQDo5y7MOKGEPjGF7wtrrDxxvWiuv9lXwTW-7tbcoJ5XHpyzraQ0LezaXjbpqnsBm7hkDPt727JCnQ2kBIVv_Z2R3Xx1JoLot_3MV4pCnEAw_q5bGbWZedG2HO6Dw32IXbJou3sL1bsywcH5r-c0wUeJAL_D6k~)
**I 'm starting this race with absolutely nothing**, but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hIF0hVI01m7PTa-JNQ4sVw~~/AARclBA~/u1GZdKBFDTPW9h7jbbvYuJxmjGzwUN2UX1HvkKHdbdOdnAz2SnATCVE_mGX4WT_1ANdm_WxBgv3buTOV0O4pO4S8BtGbQVNKZhIoiQl0xfLEbUkCk6M8c2Xmvu2vZLadmKYX8Z-GgFDNXG_KA8rE3a0ODmGn2aYYrnjuygkyWh4KApLHrbGkXfGomJGkB5YzoDsA6Nw2T1h2CZQDo5y7MOKGEPjGF7wtrrDxxvWiuv9lXwTW-7tbcoJ5XHpyzraQ0LezaXjbpqnsBm7hkDPt727JCnQ2kBIVv_Z2R3Xx1JoLot_3MV4pCnEAw_q5bGbWZedG2HO6Dw32IXbJou3sL1bsywcH5r-c0wUeJAL_D6k~)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hIF0hVI01m7PTa-JNQ4sVw~~/AARclBA~/u1GZdKBFDTPW9h7jbbvYuJxmjGzwUN2UX1HvkKHdbdOdnAz2SnATCVE_mGX4WT_1ANdm_WxBgv3buTOV0O4pO4S8BtGbQVNKZhIoiQl0xfLEbUkCk6M8c2Xmvu2vZLadmKYX8Z-GgFDNXG_KA8rE3a0ODmGn2aYYrnjuygkyWh4KApLHrbGkXfGomJGkB5YzoDsA6Nw2T1h2CZQDo5y7MOKGEPjGF7wtrrDxxvWiuv9lXwTW-7tbcoJ5XHpyzraQ0LezaXjbpqnsBm7hkDPt727JCnQ2kBIVv_Z2R3Xx1JoLot_3MV4pCnEAw_q5bGbWZedG2HO6Dw32IXbJou3sL1bsywcH5r-c0wUeJAL_D6k~)
**I 'm not a career politician. I'm a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation's call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn't the Minnesota I grew up in--or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hIF0hVI01m7PTa-JNQ4sVw~~/AARclBA~/u1GZdKBFDTPW9h7jbbvYuJxmjGzwUN2UX1HvkKHdbdOdnAz2SnATCVE_mGX4WT_1ANdm_WxBgv3buTOV0O4pO4S8BtGbQVNKZhIoiQl0xfLEbUkCk6M8c2Xmvu2vZLadmKYX8Z-GgFDNXG_KA8rE3a0ODmGn2aYYrnjuygkyWh4KApLHrbGkXfGomJGkB5YzoDsA6Nw2T1h2CZQDo5y7MOKGEPjGF7wtrrDxxvWiuv9lXwTW-7tbcoJ5XHpyzraQ0LezaXjbpqnsBm7hkDPt727JCnQ2kBIVv_Z2R3Xx1JoLot_3MV4pCnEAw_q5bGbWZedG2HO6Dw32IXbJou3sL1bsywcH5r-c0wUeJAL_D6k~)
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hIF0hVI01m7PTa-JNQ4sVw~~/AARclBA~/u1GZdKBFDTPW9h7jbbvYuJxmjGzwUN2UX1HvkKHdbdOdnAz2SnATCVE_mGX4WT_1ANdm_WxBgv3buTOV0O4pO4S8BtGbQVNKZhIoiQl0xfLEbUkCk6M8c2Xmvu2vZLadmKYX8Z-GgFDNXG_KA8rE3a0ODmGn2aYYrnjuygkyWh4KApLHrbGkXfGomJGkB5YzoDsA6Nw2T1h2CZQDo5y7MOKGEPjGF7wtrrDxxvWiuv9lXwTW-7tbcoJ5XHpyzraQ0LezaXjbpqnsBm7hkDPt727JCnQ2kBIVv_Z2R3Xx1JoLot_3MV4pCnEAw_q5bGbWZedG2HO6Dw32IXbJou3sL1bsywcH5r-c0wUeJAL_D6k~)
**If you are reading this email right now and you don 't live in Minnesota, then I'm sure you'll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today--individuals of integrity. **

_**That 's not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven't done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn't voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I 've faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hIF0hVI01m7PTa-JNQ4sVw~~/AARclBA~/u1GZdKBFDTPW9h7jbbvYuJxmjGzwUN2UX1HvkKHdbdOdnAz2SnATCVE_mGX4WT_1ANdm_WxBgv3buTOV0O4pO4S8BtGbQVNKZhIoiQl0xfLEbUkCk6M8c2Xmvu2vZLadmKYX8Z-GgFDNXG_KA8rE3a0ODmGn2aYYrnjuygkyWh4KApLHrbGkXfGomJGkB5YzoDsA6Nw2T1h2CZQDo5y7MOKGEPjGF7wtrrDxxvWiuv9lXwTW-7tbcoJ5XHpyzraQ0LezaXjbpqnsBm7hkDPt727JCnQ2kBIVv_Z2R3Xx1JoLot_3MV4pCnEAw_q5bGbWZedG2HO6Dw32IXbJou3sL1bsywcH5r-c0wUeJAL_D6k~)
[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hIF0hVI01m7PTa-JNQ4sVw~~/AARclBA~/u1GZdKBFDTPW9h7jbbvYuJxmjGzwUN2UX1HvkKHdbdOdnAz2SnATCVE_mGX4WT_1ANdm_WxBgv3buTOV0O4pO4S8BtGbQVNKZhIoiQl0xfLEbUkCk6M8c2Xmvu2vZLadmKYX8Z-GgFDNXG_KA8rE3a0ODmGn2aYYrnjuygkyWh4KApLHrbGkXfGomJGkB5YzoDsA6Nw2T1h2CZQDo5y7MOKGEPjGF7wtrrDxxvWiuv9lXwTW-7tbcoJ5XHpyzraQ0LezaXjbpqnsBm7hkDPt727JCnQ2kBIVv_Z2R3Xx1JoLot_3MV4pCnEAw_q5bGbWZedG2HO6Dw32IXbJou3sL1bsywcH5r-c0wUeJAL_D6k~)
Here's what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left's agenda that's eroding the America we love.

You don't know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, **[I'm asking you to take a chance on me and support my campaign today, in its infancy, to help me get it off the ground and give us a shot at reclaiming a Senate seat we haven't held in a generation](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hIF0hVI01m7PTa-JNQ4sVw~~/AARclBA~/u1GZdKBFDTPW9h7jbbvYuJxmjGzwUN2UX1HvkKHdbdOdnAz2SnATCVE_mGX4WT_1ANdm_WxBgv3buTOV0O4pO4S8BtGbQVNKZhIoiQl0xfLEbUkCk6M8c2Xmvu2vZLadmKYX8Z-GgFDNXG_KA8rE3a0ODmGn2aYYrnjuygkyWh4KApLHrbGkXfGomJGkB5YzoDsA6Nw2T1h2CZQDo5y7MOKGEPjGF7wtrrDxxvWiuv9lXwTW-7tbcoJ5XHpyzraQ0LezaXjbpqnsBm7hkDPt727JCnQ2kBIVv_Z2R3Xx1JoLot_3MV4pCnEAw_q5bGbWZedG2HO6Dw32IXbJou3sL1bsywcH5r-c0wUeJAL_D6k~)**.

This race won't be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. **I 'm running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive.**

**[Your gift today will give our nascent campaign a fighting shot.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hIF0hVI01m7PTa-JNQ4sVw~~/AARclBA~/u1GZdKBFDTPW9h7jbbvYuJxmjGzwUN2UX1HvkKHdbdOdnAz2SnATCVE_mGX4WT_1ANdm_WxBgv3buTOV0O4pO4S8BtGbQVNKZhIoiQl0xfLEbUkCk6M8c2Xmvu2vZLadmKYX8Z-GgFDNXG_KA8rE3a0ODmGn2aYYrnjuygkyWh4KApLHrbGkXfGomJGkB5YzoDsA6Nw2T1h2CZQDo5y7MOKGEPjGF7wtrrDxxvWiuv9lXwTW-7tbcoJ5XHpyzraQ0LezaXjbpqnsBm7hkDPt727JCnQ2kBIVv_Z2R3Xx1JoLot_3MV4pCnEAw_q5bGbWZedG2HO6Dw32IXbJou3sL1bsywcH5r-c0wUeJAL_D6k~)**

I hope you'll invest in me right now - any amount will help.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: THIS IS AN EMERGENCY: Trump weaponizes Department of Justice to try and SILENCE Dem grasssroots donors 🚨🚨🚨
body:
This is not a drill. It’s a direct attempt to STRANGLE Democratic campaigns, silence opposition, and rig the next election before it even begins.
We need an immediate, overwhelming surge of grassroots donations to show Trump that the Democratic movement isn’t going anywhere — no matter how hard he tries to crush it.
Please read below and rush your donation NOW. Every second matters!!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=052725_3]

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Will you take a look at my resume?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m running for the Senate against a politician who, while our streets burned, pushed lawsuits against law enforcement officials | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAXD3Nemn6o47D4H0I1SaYogrtEReqfFiLaMqnpQWlJ9YUkrxygbqfAs-54vaCv9oMQeDKKUMxr95Y119TuN5PSudc-_4JL069iL_7VevXZuCKAAW2ZqXr8GoEgwNn8DcOgadLLWyvHbXjuDA1k3Mz8u)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAVI2Cp6ajKy9OafN1DSHm-5OMVylj5ZceaJ_CC3nTiGJkY_ZIfYnxP1ifshA_qZfZiezJYnPgNZu6m52POiwC0y-FQmeyUrXQ6a2q1EL78j1LUicPI_5GNTTbeD-Wcz5dL-YWyVXOrn4nDAfl7Nr5G9)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAXpbfm-p0D7olfWkNrU6lh_8lraiSGSDMewnDCLX3dQ94nJvXl0aYAdLP70wbKfsYSrC9NV9CmgNktzDwhcL28xZFQBUQ2WeOauO3qmdvm0AYIWVsEd3yeNF4gPiVQ54-Ptmq4e6CEQRuS3dMhwvj_R)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAUKBbc8X0IQuyxaI_nbrToJTPvyI3ROoO3_E3R-hV-sD5K3gocEwiCD_4i05Z3oDSIgN5Sns9eYI5T2G6rM13vMzwGL_9jA-8mr4lQEr492mmhdPtO-HgD4HuRVwWctxQEZ-5nBTQ1_0VsHNWCJ-7ES)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAXqv_siJakF66JzFqoJ2ogV4H4aCIquBKwOJOI4euE4k5iP4CXWlLsdWQWWYXl1GewadVnAn5uXkfWZBQdSMPROtpn5CFEh3dYqjwzrCPRHDi5hJnx58EIsE04U3kegyJOSP3Lv8OvqgaBm162tTcYL)
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAX3Gs77_fYLgsq9iJIET_356nsdMZGzR0nJu6oZH0sNLL-Vebu-NAWJrl_ifk1A_CHxStcAZp1DGF3KPKjxeARi0dQ_vNLb8MDYNlrYaMr2u91vL-ZPtdFYPHjeRbA3314gU8tjckXj7TmXFtaGXWyg)

**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAWi0-AQXHV0YdidJKhWVML71A_DgDvRg2sxVLqQlzEdbNPZemRr53S3OObwUO5Cm3QIolbLhn1SV_yaW9WNWfA1YX7O8X7KNwQLGI4pFPRORt_zkOWOcNUBejl1Xz3Hz4w_-u-O4A8VO8JpKmqF-lCX)

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAUZWuOyjuYskJzocObRpZZ9E8iXAscYpmwWM7Qw2huoyDrOFFIDbqLQbL87tCaGXghVa775RNflkm2H8w4iggma-2l_F-c0TopSPIQ5vAGWNnpfBmPhHS7PAEd0IDdIfjvQrTZ9yPG6G_AmA_xmKNu7)
Here’s what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love.

You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, **[I’m asking you to take a chance on me and support my campaign today, in its infancy, to help me get it off the ground and give us a shot at reclaiming a Senate seat we haven’t held in a generation](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAUeq-_iEIDSddgqZI6M8XcsZjKylIvvcIfSHgKhBV-PeudnJHB1mL2HTBbpoUE32THqBHYLYkcCFTWhs4jb4Q-7bG12W_Y6ljQV4UT6_myeDvTVFxeg0msfLoAL1HcChTbK3hp5dsov_gZOVhplQTYK)**.

This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. **I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive.**

**[Your gift today will give our nascent campaign a fighting shot.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAVqc16_VlUlmGrQfxpHi-0oV3CWaM6RVhxVwTd-a6NHqCI1dYJ-5LaTAHScdOfsczNRU3zVwdn_CUw6d3Sb3Vx60o-6hI7eRPIu-_2yCe1yuDyCrP3OxJJ9irgZbDhsLXmwI_AtfkhEParIGB-o7CiM)**

I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bdaf06236dc9486597e448498b9a32a6&_e=Tt4jmWx_2jtD1fRQLqak3Sp5C3GTFGLxZMyNIks-pfO2ZzrBS465eYRu5dcIpPKyMKXPQxp3YI_encKofZ94meailYDsHkHUQFkOZEHTxP7XyMUdO-rZIt1qcWJa9PbhvJsLQ_BoR9Jdy0fPPmuQqFl2gbdRlLV5-LusvC1yTZp77eSzzeu2hy_DT-6i7ZBMyqu58KPbDHtiiTclNvi0B9aOZZdAZjT7FOy92HSpCQP0ByaGh5QOL84zte4-6w4LiO-s6jSo2a1-1kYzUaDxgObDN_5r9YuY8PQjHbUNHAU-uxU9ELTIPwbDgtY9fYCjKLHuHySYYgAcCtaJ--zX2l-FUMt91TdlaZOZ4MCUEx6vkFw4ba0xES9qjWXla8jt_5tZIf0pTZ0BGhHkMcLrxtRbzpPc45mklXcR7PQUDGcs3ZCzSN9prKED7_uTIQ4m)

clean_body: I’m running for the Senate against a politician who, while our streets burned, pushed lawsuits against law enforcement officials | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: GOP Rep. suggests Gaza should be “nuked”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
There are some genuinely dangerous people with big platforms in the Republican party right now.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1652%2E791427%2EJ-R-_W)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250527-1-f&t=2&akid=1652%2E791427%2EJ-R-_W)
Friend — There are some genuinely dangerous people with big platforms in the Republican party right now.
New far-right GOP member of Congress Randy Fine went on Fox last week to spread the slanderous lie that I “endorse and support Muslim terror.” In the wake of so much recent political violence, it’s a reckless thing to say to millions of viewers that only helps incite more hate and violence.
But it doesn’t end there.
While reacting to the killing of two Israeli embassy staff in DC last week, Randy proudly suggested that **_Gaza needs to be attacked with nuclear weapons.**_ Really. Watch the video below if you don’t believe me.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4432?t=3&akid=1652%2E791427%2EJ-R-_W)
**_That is a disgusting, genocidal statement that has no place in our politics.**_ I can’t imagine the cruelty that must be in one’s heart to say something like this.
And the truth is, if this remark was made about any other conflict or directed at any other people, Randy Fine would be censored by the House and face calls to resign from all sides. But when it’s directed at Palestinians, it barely makes the news.
Randy Fine has put a target on my back and the back of all Muslim people because he is a hateful racist, plain and simple. The fact that he holds national elected office is proof of the complete takeover of the Republican party by extremists and authoritarians. **I’m reaching out today to ask for your help in fighting back.**
My campaign has always stood strong throughout these relentless attacks because we believe in the power of solidarity. We stand together to take on the challenges of our day rather than dividing people up and spreading lies.
We have a lot of work ahead, but we have a responsibility to turn back this tide of hatred and lies and instead promote understanding, fairness, democracy, and justice for all.
**[Show that you have my back today by chipping in whatever you can to our campaign. Randy Fine and the entire far-right movement must be defeated before they tear down our democracy for good.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250527-1-f&t=4&akid=1652%2E791427%2EJ-R-_W)

clean_body: | 👋 Jon Ossoff is asking all Democrats to read this short 1-minute message before you click away. 🇺🇸 It's May 27th, and time will soon run out before our end-of-month fundraising drive comes to an end. We're asking you to reflect on the work Jon Ossoff does in the Senate, and the importance of holding this seat if Democrats are going to have any chance at a majority. It wasn't long ago Democrats had control of the Senate, and it was Jon Ossoff who put the party over the top. We can get it back, but Jon can't do it alone. If everyone reading this email donated even just $10 to Jon Ossoff for Senate, he'd reach his fundraising goals and not have to ask again for some time. Unfortunately, not everyone gives. So Jon Ossoff is counting on people like you who understand the stakes of this moment to step up and give. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Ossoff and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = 🙏🙏🙏 Show Jon Ossoff you believe keeping him in the Senate matters. Thank you. Team Ossoff * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Stasha Rhodes
subject: We’re watching the Court so youdon’t have to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
We’re gearing up for five-alarm fires every Tuesday and Thursday (and some Fridays) in June. | |
---
Peter, It’s Court-watching season, folks. **Every Tuesday and Thursday in June, the Supreme Court will start issuing opinions on the cases they’ve heard over the last few months.** That means every Tuesday and Thursday (and some surprise Fridays) for the next month are going to be huge rapid response moments on issues from trans rights to the separation of church and state. **United for Democracy is gearing up to quarterback the messaging in these critical moments.** We’ll be scanning the field, analyzing the plays, and making calls on how exactly to respond. **We’ve built a coalition of hundreds of organizations and thousands of activists across America to organize opposition, amplify messaging, and create a wave of public sentiment.** If your politics are anywhere left of Brett Kavanaugh, you’ll be hearing from us in the immediate aftermath of every opinion ruling. [**We can’t allow destructive, anti-democracy rulings by this MAGA Supreme Court to be met with silence. We’re building the public pushback, but we can’t do it without your help. Pitch in to help us get loud and make it impossible for the MAGA justices to ignore us!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6XxhD9qUuyC_xkAnkMhBCL8IMeIn-l5iK-rsaFFiyb2sj9KHV_xnltZoccUCKbu7EEyvsWZiTXVioj3LSsXLKO4oIG-4p3J_W8A6xCDcGiVJFB6urbPEF2nNCPgiRaOxcTtEivSUZgfAko8WOPiNLRF_L9Os_7cVP19IcQYZJ865EA7_3oiZEiaix-DrkQu2H0dxNsTZqroB-1dBwjH57L3IcvaaSiX583o6DiO6DdVtU70EFHNLL3SL3MEJ9igcDNULV4B7siFtWbfZKDwKKPj5pVZwr0NNWwGtDzJXfC5Cv1u0ayjAsqEUx-Weqx2_bz-8b-ZV9kBA7CX__8YEk8FR04POhOmvyq_dm-4p2xmI/4gu/3d8ohvA_SquS9znPjnXkSA/h0/h001.UaE-r2yL_8N1dWzgGq0ciIVrR0TlorxPkGoYrLzkc2g) [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6XxhD9qUuyC_xkAnkMhBCL3H87q0ky3c7YFGRHLCa8iqNA1Gz0W-GLFejJFCAM4YvKl8hxBZcv5QD8PXopPd1Ic1mpaXE2U-ODG3qr7la87QXFKAOgDN7F8PxNN0wLY4OVqIsK3muFWCDM2mkmuc58dzaTqRp7uXHzcl-mAKrYQrC1CcGIYsDw2pXS_30yxU795xpivFB2G3GwtO7BQwzJJHNwLwdII_pUI7a0cHKaIe0-gpXkS9mFZdXqzkDRF7PGAnRVMTz9PuXhabGRZY5KaYt2dlZ6rV_eZIUcJu9hrMQ29zjjtMegZsZ2MYB12wvyhuj84_knDiQdBdSw2WwZlA4DJEp6XDkR8YJVAXy0fo/4gu/3d8ohvA_SquS9znPjnXkSA/h1/h001.44J3t1D0CXaxY-0mry_zyI5ja9YzWENQSgkHhkOQOrU) Never been “Court-watching” before? Our experts will be watching the Court so you don’t have to, and bringing the analysis and rapid-response messaging directly to the people.** The MAGA Supreme Court justices were put there by decades of work by right-wing actors and billions of dollars by wealthy extremists. America honored our fallen heroes this Memorial Day under President Trump's leadership. The president visited Arlington National Cemetery accompanied by Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth. The White House released a video reminding us of the meaning of Memorial Day, in stark contrast to last year when Kamala Harris said "have a nice long weekend." John Solomon is a veteran journalist, once the Assistant Bureau in Chief at the Associated Press, he now delivers the news through his substack "Just The News." The faux reveal of Biden's decline is just the latest failure of legacy media outlets, squandering the good capital they raised in the 70's, 80's and 90's. The big, beautiful bill passed the House and is now onto the Senate where Ron Johnson will hold-the-line for a pre-pandemic spending level. President Trump cut deeper into Harvard, threatening another $3 Billion in federal grants to be taken away and sent to trade schools. Kash Patel and Dan Bongino confirm he died by suicide in jail, causing an uproar on social media, John puts on his investigative journalist hat to give us his take on the matter.
Featuring:
**John Solomon**
Just The News | Substack
https://justthenews.com/

name: Katie Porter with Beyond the Whiteboard
subject: How to talk to your kids about politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026 FFPC #1479597**
body:
My advice for parents: don't shy away from these sometimes uncomfortable conversations or hard questions around politics.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9rYXRpZXBvcnRlcm9jLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.JzKq6HO_vH4qIsRQ0aTzQJsOYb-hWkt1usYLqaGEK-M?) for more

# [How to talk to your kids about politics](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=164595167&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTk1MTY3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgzODM3NDAsImV4cCI6MTc1MDk3NTc0MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0JNHKx5Mg9OvdPWs3OFpARqZBgXw16MKE5d5X9NU214)
### My advice for parents: don't shy away from these sometimes uncomfortable conversations or hard questions around politics.
| | [Katie Porter](https://substack.com/@katieporter)
---
| May 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@katieporter)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=164595167&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTk1MTY3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0ODM4Mzc0MCwiZXhwIjoxNzUwOTc1NzQwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjA1MjU2OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Nz-ArvB8kXtqJQho_CQIqzszgNoQ3FS6OVox_phG0hc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=164595167&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTk1MTY3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgzODM3NDAsImV4cCI6MTc1MDk3NTc0MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0JNHKx5Mg9OvdPWs3OFpARqZBgXw16MKE5d5X9NU214&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=164595167&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NTk1MTY3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgzODM3NDAsImV4cCI6MTc1MDk3NTc0MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0JNHKx5Mg9OvdPWs3OFpARqZBgXw16MKE5d5X9NU214)
---
| | [](https://substack..pZdxYexAtWaailKxTZtzhvqo9ePHzFk77Dmkdty4UKA?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/katieporteroc/p/how-to-talk-to-your-kids-about-politics?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Part of being a mom is worrying about your kids. And these days, Donald Trump fuels so much of our concern.
For my kids, politics have been a big part of their lives since they were little--my youngest, Betsy, was just 6 when I was first elected!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c0f39bee-ce34-4fa3-a419-4a2469cb4fb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Because my kids were young and because I 'm a single mom, I had to involve my kids heavily in that first campaign. **There simply wasn't enough childcare or a way to be the engaged parent that I wanted to be without bringing them into some parts of campaign life. That started with talking with them about why I was running, including giving them a chance to share their early political opinions with me ("Donald Trump should have to go to his room," being my personal favorite). My kids became expert door knockers, enjoyed hanging out at the campaign office, and one even stole an opponents' yard signs, which resulted in a lesson about making things right. In my memoir _Politics is Messier than my Minivan_ , I share this hilarious story and more campaign kid moments.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a051e589-2dde-4294-9934-5affb49b74ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Every time I 've run for a new office, their voices have been an important part of my decision. **And when all three kids decided it was a good idea for me to run for governor, even as they were so happy that my weekly commute to Washington, D.C., was over, I took that as sure of a sign as any that I should do this. Their enthusiasm wasn't personal; they would rather have me be on time to pick them up! But they are worried about the future--for our planet, for America, for California, and for their own lives.
It's not just my kids who think about and hear about and live with politics. I've had many parents recently ask me how to navigate these conversations. I hear stories of kids who are sad because they know that Donald Trump will not protect endangered species or fight climate change. They're worried their classmates or family members could be sent to a country they've never been to. Kids can see the anxiety of their parents about cuts to programs that help them like free lunches and Medicaid.
**For teens like mine, I hear a lot of concern about what Trump means for abortion rights and LGBTQ+ rights.** On Election Night 2024, my daughter cried, in fear and frustration, saying, "what if someday I need an abortion." As a mom, I tried to comfort her and tell her that her healthcare was protected because we live in California, but as a policy maker, I know that's not necessarily true.
It goes without saying that kids shouldn't have to worry about these things! But because they do, **I give young people the same advice I give adults --turn that agony into action!**
If your kid is worried that their friend might lose access to food at school, consider donating food to your local food pantry and even bringing them along for a volunteer shift. As all of us worry about rising costs, those of us who have extra coats, books, or toys lying around the house can consider donating to a local shelter or charity.
As political campaign season picks up next year, consider taking your kids to knock doors for a candidate of your choice. Bringing a baby or kids is actually a pro-canvassing tip--people are much more likely to answer the door!**Or bring your kids to a rally! Kids love making signs and being at their loudest volume.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ee25c9df-bfae-4d80-97fa-a93e20dca03c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As a parent, I think showing our kids that _we_ are civically engaged people who care about our country is part of how we raise the next generation of citizens. As parents we can actively give them tools to participate and use their voices. And honestly, this is more important than ever. **Gen Z voters, and young men in particular, are becoming more conservative than their older peers.**
**My advice for parents is to not shy away from these sometimes uncomfortable conversations or hard questions around politics.** It's not "just politics" or a taboo topic that we should never bring up at the dinner table. Politics affects the life your kids will have: whether they will be able to afford to buy a home, their educational opportunities, their rights to healthcare, and even the cleanliness of the air and water they'll have. **Raising kids who care about these things is important, and helping them turn their passion into action makes for a stronger family --and country.**
Katie Porter
P.S. -- it's okay if your kids disagree with you sometimes. On more than one occasion, I came home from voting in Washington, DC to vocal criticism at the dinner table. I've often said that my three toughest constituents were my kids.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f94388bb-573a-47c2-9237-4ccacc71e405?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0ca5edbb-f010-4ab6-8a42-a031a2b052f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I am 35 years sober
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
You must face hard truths if you want to make change. | | | |
---
Hi friend, it’s Deb Haaland.
NV Dems said I could reach out, and I’m so grateful for the chance to connect with you.
I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: **I have reached 35 years of sobriety.**
Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different.
I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction.
My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress, which aired 7 years ago this week. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for saying that in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me.
**My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.**
Crime, poverty, homelessness, and addiction are weighing heavy on New Mexico, and I intend to tackle those challenges head-on as governor. I promise to be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal.
Thank you for hearing my story, friend. And I want to thank NV Dems for their support. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. [**_If you can, I’d be grateful if you’d split a $10 donation between my campaign for governor and NV Dems today. Every donation helps reach voters and win._**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT89sLfWQBYYL2Em2E3SP6HFO420agcNIOdmfzJ_5rPj66oibFX4jobTlfu5zZW9Md-T28-Q-iNApHfXLUwIHcxYmxuhenFCriqKTaPDwNcnaXUTwzgXCMFjFhOsjj8lKgTCj6lC_nvTIFEztSHv0cosTyWML5176RfWX6pFQtK4j_OjfdCFV6OOzOCeqcM5ZYUb1icDXOT099DaQWCkHGy5L12sKn7Yeg8aPoH7X9sEmIT9oruRS7n7aZUmrdY4ihnFdaKgtMP4vwDetCCvUFRSRKd7nrx8d-rqn4ACMJeuu5rTsncm_XBS7mQHfK_o31TMidBdl0bdS6KrYKTcizUQXOfdl6yA6kEzSFy-2_GRQUeGcr87KmiPJXDYKEsO6aiIhTPYRkz3TFSqQGKUWAlQ/4gu/CnzrmWp0SXitlxP07ru37A/h0/h001.RTTiEO2_JBBwEATCQ_UTTKA-gChJlWPjD8-FufcYa0o)

clean_body: You must face hard truths if you want to make change. | | | | Hi friend, it’s Deb Haaland. NV Dems said I could reach out, and I’m so grateful for the chance to connect with you. I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: I have reached 35 years of sobriety. Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different. I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction. My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress, which aired 7 years ago this week. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for saying that in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me. My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico. Crime, poverty, homelessness, and addiction are weighing heavy on New Mexico, and I intend to tackle those challenges head-on as governor. I promise to be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal. Thank you for hearing my story, friend. And I want to thank NV Dems for their support. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | Thank you so much for your support, Deb The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Local Democracy leads to thriving communities.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
To maintain their power, Republicans have heavily invested in local elections across the country by creating division and undermining democratic systems, especially in Red states.
Their investment has largely paid off as they have enacted policies that restrict voting rights, spread misinformation, and reinforce systemic inequalities making it difficult for progressive change to take root.
As a result, our voices are drowned out and we continue to struggle in crucial areas like healthcare, education, economic equality, and happiness.
**Our work at the Local Democracy Project is to expand local powerbuilding organizations so we can take back local governments, improve the lives of our residents and strengthen our democracy.**
******[We have the power to improve our lives and communities. name: Shontel Brown
subject: The GOP Tax Scam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
They are using the “savings” to fund massive tax breaks for the top 1%.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108467823/548018909/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250523tax_N_SB_90DO_4_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWZiM2QwNy00NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvQY1hxQcIyamkyT-El0tobOdJDIYVkRnF1LSToQLNc=) Peter,

Last week, House Republicans passed Trump’s Big Ugly Bill, voting to strip away healthcare and food access from millions of Americans, and using the “savings” to fund massive tax breaks for the top 1%.

body:
|
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468024/548019742/-791995096?refcode=250527_Stevenson_Mitch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTMwM2RkYi00NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QWLgs3_3McDbn8NaGQblSfPLkDVTKw8jJDs7N4mSYg=)**[**Friend, I have some huge news to share with you: I am running for Senate here in Kentucky to replace Mitch McConnell. In a moment, I’m going to tell you about my vision for this election — and I would love it if you took the time to read my full message. But if you’re short on time, will you split an $10 contribution to my campaign and Ohio House Dems to help me become the next Democratic U.S. Senator? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468025/548019743/-701326135?refcode=250527_Stevenson_Mitch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTMwM2RkYi00NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QWLgs3_3McDbn8NaGQblSfPLkDVTKw8jJDs7N4mSYg=) Friend, I was born and raised right here in Kentucky. I’ve spent my life in service to our communities, state, and country. I served as a JAG attorney in the U.S. Air Force for 27 years with the rank of Colonel. In the Air Force, I successfully negotiated several hostage crises and prosecuted violent criminals and child sex offenders. I'm a nonprofit founder for legal services veterans and seniors in need, ordained minister, and the Floor Leader of the Kentucky House Democrats. I know firsthand the challenges Kentucky and our country are up against. [**So now, after 27 years of serving our state and our country, I am running for Senate, but I can't start this fight alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally: Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Ohio House Dems before my deadline at midnight TONIGHT to show the world I have what it takes to win this race? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468026/548019744/-701326135?refcode=250527_Stevenson_Mitch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTMwM2RkYi00NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QWLgs3_3McDbn8NaGQblSfPLkDVTKw8jJDs7N4mSYg=) I’m ready to run for Senate to defend our freedoms and build an economy that works for everyone – no matter your background. Every American deserves access to food, clean water, healthcare, education, and shelter. **But Mitch McConnell and the GOP do not see things the same way.** During his 40 years in the Senate, he’s put his personal quest for power and his special-interest allies ahead of our state, nation, and Constitution every time. I’m ready to turn the page. But I need you with me. [**I promise you I will put everything I have into winning this race and being a voice for every single American. But I can’t do it alone — and I’ll need the help of grassroots supporters like you every step of the way. So I’m humbly asking: Will you split a $10 between my campaign and Ohio House Dems before my deadline at midnight tonight and help fuel my campaign with an unbeatable show of support? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468027/548019745/-701326135?refcode=250527_Stevenson_Mitch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTMwM2RkYi00NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QWLgs3_3McDbn8NaGQblSfPLkDVTKw8jJDs7N4mSYg=) | | [**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468028/548019746/-791995096?amount=10&refcode=250527_Stevenson_Mitch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTMwM2RkYi00NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QWLgs3_3McDbn8NaGQblSfPLkDVTKw8jJDs7N4mSYg= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

Thank you,
Colonel Pam
Floor Leader, House Democrats
Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Gov. Ron DeSantis
subject: Florida was the nation’s wake-up call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC)
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/2ac7db7eab8e47a6a8cdef442d6c49ed-8e11f9a4317a4da3867974af1ae48465/63)
---
Friend, Florida is the tip of the spear in the battle to secure our borders and enforce our laws. Under my leadership, we've taken **bold, decisive action** to protect our communities and uphold the rule of law. It started with Operation Tidal Wave, a historic crackdown that led to the arrest of over 1,100 illegal aliens in just five days. **This wasn 't just a win for Florida--it was a wake-up call for the nation.**
---
[ **FIGHT TO SECURE OUR BORDERS** ](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/2ac7db7eab8e47a6a8cdef442d6c49ed-8e11f9a4317a4da3867974af1ae48465/63)
---
How did we do it? Florida banned sanctuary cities, ensuring no corner of our state harbors lawbreakers. We deputized more state and local law enforcement officers to work hand-in-hand with ICE, multiplying our strength. And we passed the strongest immigration enforcement legislation in the country, sending a clear message: __Florida will not tolerate illegal immigration.__ **Operation Tidal Wave was so successful that the federal government is now racing to replicate our model nationwide, with plans to roll out a similar program in the next 60 days.**** **
---
[ **EXPAND OPERATION TIDAL WAVE NATIONWIDE** ](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/2ac7db7eab8e47a6a8cdef442d6c49ed-8e11f9a4317a4da3867974af1ae48465/63)
---
Florida is leading the way, showing the country what it means to prioritize the safety and security of our citizens, but this fight is far from over. **👋🏻 **Hey Peter, it’s Rob Sand. I’m Iowa’s State Auditor, a father, husband, skateboarder, bowhunter, and a proud Hawkeye.

AND NOW, **I’m running to be the next Governor of the great state of Iowa!**

This is going to be one of the most competitive elections in the country. And with the Reynolds agenda unpopular and every Republican in lockstep with it, we’ve got an opportunity to do something truly special.

**Before I dive into the nitty-gritty details of why I believe I’m the best candidate to lead Iowa forward, I’d like to ask you:[_Will you split a donation between my grassroots campaign and Abigail Spanberger to become a Founding Donor today? I’d love to have you on board from the start, Peter._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468173/548020359/-380039615?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-27_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWYwYmRlNGEtNDczYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Et16Br2os_l-h6_0Wax0YV6YQ4qSYULZW3ZEII8m_zI=)**
| [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468174/548020368/-380039615?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-27_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWYwYmRlNGEtNDczYi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Et16Br2os_l-h6_0Wax0YV6YQ4qSYULZW3ZEII8m_zI=)
---
Folks who know me know that I’m an open book, and that every chapter starts and ends with Iowa.

I was born and raised in the small town of Decorah, and I’m proud to be raising my family in the greatest state in the country.

Before I was elected State Auditor (_twice_), I worked as an Assistant Attorney General, where I uncovered and prosecuted the largest lottery scandal in American history.

I’m currently the only statewide elected Democrat in Iowa, and I’m proud to also have the highest approval rating among all statewide officials.

_Now, I’m running for Governor because for too long, partisan insiders have pushed Iowa in the wrong direction: Our schools are underfunded, jobs and opportunities are leaving the state, and we’re not growing and innovating the way we should be._

**I believe that together, we can take Iowa back and make our state a place where families thrive.**

I won re-election in 2022 by just a shade under 3,000 votes, so I’m not afraid of a tough race. But even with the winds changing in Iowa, this is going to be an incredibly competitive election.

Recent special election results are proof that Iowans are eager for change and ready to listen. _Iowa has had 3 specials this year, and they are the top 3 over-performances by a Democrat in the nation._

As a team, we are playing to WIN. But I need your help, Peter, plain and simple.

Grassroots fundraising is the name of the game, so we need support early to kickstart this campaign and build out our network of supporters throughout Iowa and beyond!

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: The one race MAGA is banking on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
This U.S. Senate race in Georgia isn’t just another election.
| | |
---
Friend —
This U.S. Senate race in Georgia isn’t just another election.

It’s the one race MAGA is banking on.
See, as the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won, I am, quite literally, their #1 target.
You know the stakes. And you know your support is crucial. If you are ready to make a donation, please use this link to split a donation between my campaign and Jacky Rosen today: **[https://secure.actblue.com/rosenfornevada_ossoff_dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468360/548020830/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5532-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWMzNGU2ZC00NzNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVkdEdzyadgad1bn1K1Vod3KU1Aw27SJ7Z1hpCRBq3I=)**
Otherwise, I hope you’ll give me a minute or two to explain why your support is so important.

They’re going to come after me with every dirty trick in the book and will spare no expense to defeat me.
That means we need to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen.

That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state.
All of that takes resources. And it’s why donations from supporters like you are so important to our campaign.

The road ahead won’t be easy. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before.
I can’t do it alone, which is why I’m asking:
**[Please, consider splitting a contribution between my re-election and Jacky Rosen. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: The reason I’m doing this.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5d75820686a348ea8c0597d0f0c271ec&_e=hAfT3lyIy8F-DbM0ZBHydFdIKqXzSRtVUssjf9_5fvm6dkDTmbPiyhsta8caMtadaBE0Q0-iCgvXMtonC-BF-fQEevb-dQRMaI4gqi5VtAp6mmP5XuOQRc93lefMDcY2hKSIb_QmVxwR_c49QPtN1-s1JPd7qg9kMIuTgmq4C8XtMMQ80wddDNjPNMHeOdBd5noO7xuobyMOGGLlg4NkM9vZgzqWWihZTs8MsAD-TtncTMoyc5DJZ3qSwt_4eW8Bs3RvIRDxYigyUsE9objSuA4lCGStN4H19UNIshT2W9H9ZKW9rYhPB_QfgIAuri8FjlXFIy2rqFFbLEjxSF0K-BywfIzqweVnaCfYroQgGMhpzg0TY7tA0BNMCqwQ1hny7juu2Io3ncVNeGoNykd3RA%3D%3D)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5d75820686a348ea8c0597d0f0c271ec&_e=hAfT3lyIy8F-DbM0ZBHydFdIKqXzSRtVUssjf9_5fvm6dkDTmbPiyhsta8caMtadaBE0Q0-iCgvXMtonC-BF-fQEevb-dQRMaI4gqi5VtAp6mmP5XuOQRc93lefMDcY2hKSIb_QmVxwR_c49QPtN1-s1JPd7qg9kMIuTgmq4C8XtMMQ80wddDNjPNMHeOdBd5noO7xuobyMOGGLlg4NkM9vZgzqWWihZTs8MsAD-TtkR_1oM9pITnHKZKAWK4puPAXIeTkNJO3gkHStJwVWYTP_9-oHcmW6wpc9jnrPBqdU6WBZPqpxYdiAZS7oHgCydhrsSG6F9tva1CGTSPNDLhwScED5pbiWtq1lpoMxqGd2ucey_VDCfj-qojDcQH0iyeV3Xtel0TDk2iov753VtJg%3D%3D)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5d75820686a348ea8c0597d0f0c271ec&_e=hAfT3lyIy8F-DbM0ZBHydFdIKqXzSRtVUssjf9_5fvm6dkDTmbPiyhsta8caMtadaBE0Q0-iCgvXMtonC-BF-fQEevb-dQRMaI4gqi5VtAp6mmP5XuOQRc93lefMDcY2hKSIb_QmVxwR_c49QPtN1-s1JPd7qg9kMIuTgmq4C8XtMMQ80wddDNjPNMHeOdBd5noO7xuobyMOGGLlg4NkM9vZgzqWWihZTs8MsAD-TtkKnErKTUPfwtEVqLUfKh_J7yOlbH-gIXzXwoRl1oeBnh5lcuXesQZpK96rMQZWGcCYWLXBkUwAoHRyaIUg3j-8rAu8-V7wZf6wECNoqpGKI7bCBe0EItDykzfDUw80TQzpbJ_zBK8QKs7ZJKyulc5VG8Te2VbmdrLLkIkj0qhiYw%3D%3D)**

| [** CONTRIBUTE HERE **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5d75820686a348ea8c0597d0f0c271ec&_e=hAfT3lyIy8F-DbM0ZBHydFdIKqXzSRtVUssjf9_5fvm6dkDTmbPiyhsta8caMtadaBE0Q0-iCgvXMtonC-BF-fQEevb-dQRMaI4gqi5VtAp6mmP5XuOQRc93lefMDcY2hKSIb_QmVxwR_c49QPtN1-s1JPd7qg9kMIuTgmq4C8XtMMQ80wddDNjPNMHeOdBd5noO7xuobyMOGGLlg4NkM9vZgzqWWihZTs8MsAD-TtkvvV8AtgW2RdfhpJVNZ0XkD6hVT-nLWJvd7oOOSrqAcYFTEdYdBM1bjml6QCj7L3nfQPfJX6fEXQK5ny4bw15M9H2Nzc-Khb4WXr5dlFPYCJofTLPMhN90IcWjl66nVPisqcTxellvH7LpjGO8swjEus_8Z7P-MHGNbt-69v9kig%3D%3D)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5d75820686a348ea8c0597d0f0c271ec&_e=hAfT3lyIy8F-DbM0ZBHydIIM9djbsmaCDR03S7aHstbfvlG6gg9V5k_1dQBStebApWbg0_hJ3tpDxVMXMX1uHYdf27dNyTQ2QE2lUvY06lW3PMjxD1eI9Zefucp5Zd6zvWLgUmTPOXhmE3tN7130ScqNf-pAWFAfpyrQFzZe6dsAFJaGofZ_UHAxRLVoFhhmJB7h-rkeeNFIVr1ETcv2tC3HjOOYt_lxoIBr9utsqqM%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5d75820686a348ea8c0597d0f0c271ec&_e=hAfT3lyIy8F-DbM0ZBHydFdIKqXzSRtVUssjf9_5fvm6dkDTmbPiyhsta8caMtadaBE0Q0-iCgvXMtonC-BF-fQEevb-dQRMaI4gqi5VtAp6mmP5XuOQRc93lefMDcY2hKSIb_QmVxwR_c49QPtN1-s1JPd7qg9kMIuTgmq4C8XtMMQ80wddDNjPNMHeOdBd5noO7xuobyMOGGLlg4NkM9vZgzqWWihZTs8MsAD-TtlCZpFMgFvjnro6WlW1fLpR9AUAY9s7vv0lwBnOfPKAQB68ILY4YAwRauML2HMMFgzfX3iwe9xRv4kWabk9qKdSUfi0N5F1ESE9kKsfdr7n4AmZcqCNR5WG44yVwYFHuAGelpLYntwjfpAVZK3MD4QX7rKI18QUrOcw2AczfXiajQ%3D%3D)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** SUPPORT SENATOR GRAHAM **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5d75820686a348ea8c0597d0f0c271ec&_e=hAfT3lyIy8F-DbM0ZBHydFdIKqXzSRtVUssjf9_5fvm6dkDTmbPiyhsta8caMtadaBE0Q0-iCgvXMtonC-BF-fQEevb-dQRMaI4gqi5VtAp6mmP5XuOQRc93lefMDcY2hKSIb_QmVxwR_c49QPtN1-s1JPd7qg9kMIuTgmq4C8XtMMQ80wddDNjPNMHeOdBd5noO7xuobyMOGGLlg4NkM9vZgzqWWihZTs8MsAD-TtnmlferXYWOkQLsQaXOOvPl24XupjTyJJlw7RkqnnMY_ULoSIzxCRP3mawsuaemPn_Hhsz1mV1lJCaNek9tn_LoLh-xU-n9F4HIKwfIOuksNpYkZYw38mz7VGLsUKq8kjiirv1SZ_MX40MhYpFzTz_-l-AYsMl84gueOSsQG8gXOg%3D%3D)

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: This is a fight between people and big money
body:
#
Hey Peter,
By now, you’ve probably heard the news that Justice Democrats made our first official endorsement of the 2026 midterm elections: Donavan McKinney in Michigan’s 13th district!
Just like in most of our previous primary campaigns, we expect to be going up against a powerful opponent with a massive war chest and multiple dark money super PACs at their disposal, including the American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC).
**AIPAC’s far-right network spent $126.9 million in the 2024 cycle, and we know they could spend whatever it takes to keep this seat in 2026.[This is a fight between people and big money — will you chip in to Justice Democrats and Donavan’s campaign to prepare for the battle ahead?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250527-dm?refcode=em20250527-36713&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36713_1203867_TlqwGj&akid=36713%2E1203867%2ETlqwGj)**
In MI-13, the anti-Palestinian lobby group funded by right-wing megadonors has bought incumbent Rep. Shri Thanedar’s loyalty. He went from being a so-called “progressive” candidate that AIPAC spent against when he first ran for Congress to being endorsed by them, accepting campaign checks, millions in support from affiliated PACs, and going on AIPAC-sponsored trips to Israel.
AIPAC’s spending last cycle to unseat working-class champions Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman from Congress made those elections **the most expensive in U.S. history.** We know they’re going to come at us again with everything they’ve got to stop our movement’s momentum with Democratic voters who are desperate to see a new generation of unbought leaders in Congress.
**This race is not only an opportunity to replace an out-of-touch multimillionaire with a working-class champion, but it’s also an opportunity to take out another AIPAC-backed political opportunist with a grassroots-supported fighter for his community.**
**[If we’re going to beat AIPAC and unseat Shri in 2026, we need to start building resources NOW. Split $5 or more to Justice Democrats and Donavan’s campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250527-dm?refcode=em20250527-36713&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36713_1203867_TlqwGj&akid=36713%2E1203867%2ETlqwGj)**
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250527-dm?refcode=em20250527-36713&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36713_1203867_TlqwGj&akid=36713%2E1203867%2ETlqwGj)**
AIPAC may be powerful, but they’ve grown weaker and more threatened by our people-powered movement over time. It’s up to us to put in the work now to stop them from buying our elections again next year.
In solidarity,
Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250527-36713-footer&t=2&refcode2=36713_1203867_TlqwGj&akid=36713%2E1203867%2ETlqwGj)**
