[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468565/548021733/1933629171?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250527_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzkzOTY5MC00ODNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_Rz7fAXomOf4up7GvrsOEB5NBn4rkFyQccf0y7fTBg=) Hey there, Peter — it’s Mark. I wanted to take a minute to talk about Trump’s tariffs. Everyone knows that this is a bad idea. Economists are telling us to prepare for a recession. Ports are slowing down, and businesses and consumers are bracing for impact. Donald Trump and his Administration are steering us on a direct course toward disaster, and Republicans in the House and Senate seem indifferent to putting an end to the chaos. **That’s why I’m glad to have Rep. Yassamin Ansari in the House, who is fighting for everyday Arizonans. ** Yassamin is meeting Arizonans where they’re at and listening to their concerns — in a small business panel she hosted last week, she heard from many local and minority-owned business owners who are concerned they’ll be out of business in a matter of months as a result of Trump’s tariffs. **Yassamin and I both know it will take all of us to fight back against Trump’s reckless tariffs and defend hard-working Americans.** **_**[So, Peter, will you split a contribution between my campaign and Yassamin’s to help us continue holding this Administration accountable?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468566/548021734/21732615?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250527_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzkzOTY5MC00ODNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_Rz7fAXomOf4up7GvrsOEB5NBn4rkFyQccf0y7fTBg=)**_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Yassamin Ansari will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468567/548021735/21732615?express=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250527_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzkzOTY5MC00ODNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_Rz7fAXomOf4up7GvrsOEB5NBn4rkFyQccf0y7fTBg=)

clean_body: | = Hey there, Peter — it’s Mark. I wanted to take a minute to talk about Trump’s tariffs. Everyone knows that this is a bad idea. Economists are telling us to prepare for a recession. Ports are slowing down, and businesses and consumers are bracing for impact. Donald Trump and his Administration are steering us on a direct course toward disaster, and Republicans in the House and Senate seem indifferent to putting an end to the chaos. That’s why I’m glad to have Rep. Yassamin Ansari in the House, who is fighting for everyday Arizonans. Yassamin is meeting Arizonans where they’re at and listening to their concerns — in a small business panel she hosted last week, she heard from many local and minority-owned business owners who are concerned they’ll be out of business in a matter of months as a result of Trump’s tariffs. Yassamin and I both know it will take all of us to fight back against Trump’s reckless tariffs and defend hard-working Americans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Yassamin Ansari will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In order to deliver wins for every Arizonan and every American, we’ll need to mobilize voters in every corner of the state, from Bisbee to Bullhead City, and frankly, Peter, that takes a lot of resources. I’m glad to have your support today, Mark Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468633/548021973/-209663064?refcode=em-5.27.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmQ1OTJjZi00ODNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nZ3mHyE2lUyeWvyINcqml9qKxmmQbyWOglZJPytGNk=) Listen, I know your inbox is basically a firehose of political emails right now, so I’ll cut to it: **If we lose control of our elections, we lose everything. And I don’t mean that in a vague, “democracy is at risk” kind of way. I mean, literally, we could end up with a democracy run by people who don’t believe in democracy.** And the folks who stand between functioning elections and total chaos? Secretaries of State. These are the people who run our elections, count ballots, certify results, and step in when our democracy is on the line. In 2026, **26** Secretary of State races will be on the ballot, including in key swing states like Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. So it’s no surprise that Republicans are already preparing to run election deniers and MAGA conspiracy theorists for these offices. Next stop: letting arsonists apply for firefighter jobs – except the fire is democracy and we’re all in the house. Who we elect in 2026 will be the ones in charge when voters head to the polls in 2028’s presidential election – and that could make all the difference in whether that election is free and fair. That’s why I’m supporting the folks at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State – they’re working to elect candidates who believe all votes should be counted. [**Can I count on you to make a donation to support DASS and elect Democratic Secretaries of State who will protect our democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468634/548021974/-209663064?refcode=em-5.27.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmQ1OTJjZi00ODNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nZ3mHyE2lUyeWvyINcqml9qKxmmQbyWOglZJPytGNk=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108468635/548021975/-209663064?refcode=em-5.27.25-all&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmQ1OTJjZi00ODNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nZ3mHyE2lUyeWvyINcqml9qKxmmQbyWOglZJPytGNk=)**

That’s why I’m supporting the folks at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State – they’re working to elect candidates who believe all votes should be counted. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Al Franken | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Last Call (via VPP)
subject: (FWD) Justice Sotomayor’s stark warning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Sending tomorrow at 9AM >>
| **Friend, maybe you missed our previous messages?**

Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor is __leading the fight__ against Trump’s authoritarianism, and we need to make sure Democrats (especially Democrats in your state!) have her support.

**Remember:** Our Democracy would be DECIMATED without heroes like Sonia Sotomayor fighting in the highest court in the country.

We’re sending our letter tomorrow at 9 AM, and reaching out **ONE FINAL TIME** and asking you to [**add your signature to our letter to thank Justice Sotomayor for holding Donald Trump accountable and leading our nation’s fight for Democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90425?t=6&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90425?t=7&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp)
---
Thank you for taking action,
— Voter Protection Project

**\- - - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - - -**
From: SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER! (VPP)
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: Justice Sotomayor just issued a stark warning
**Justice Sotomayor just issued a dire warning about where our country is headed:**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90425?t=8&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp)
Sonia Sotomayor has been on the frontlines of the fight against Trump — from SLAMMING the immunity decision to standing up for reproductive rights!

[**As one of the few defenders of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. ONLY 30 SPOTS LEFT: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90425?t=9&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp)
[**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90425?t=10&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s increasingly extremist agenda and unconstitutional power grab.**

Your scathing dissent against the MAGA Justices’ immunity decision was historic, and you haven’t backed down even a little bit since then.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90425?t=11&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90425?t=12&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19965%2E878179%2EIEgYAp)

name: General John King
subject: 24 hours to maintain our momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
A NEW POLL, taken days after I launched my campaign to defeat Jon Ossoff, shows we’re inside the margin of error with 13% of voters still undecided. |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6800bb4316ee470084609b32b9c850ae&_e=J7f_y2bFV6xCFdpVmxkIFENorTECawXW55EHNcp8HRgrMdTW6P6XsQ-pOTDlaJu5sZTC_SzCSyt8XMp_nU6zq1kwQkrhC9c5CGSAeug5zmc2aITiX7X5NJXX6m7w6UOWLLD34xjl541zelWDi_vF_CxO00eS-5hZikzoXH_p2dq0jZciU9icK245NeXWTajn-ijMxneLbl8TQWqQrExgi17YjUQWMfYESxVbJ0MfYt4ZDQkk5BawwhSPS6vVS9q_kVqnE2zFgadFSIA5J8zE4IKselixsRgF-KuDvbFtzRXmz-pkjGPHWziyQx9tqsbhxKuafsaXkspyXAsGXMAE-aUJJrU5ZOaApiJV7CM4Y_bn4K-3uG7L42ZhL0ccCEchE24HX5kG3SpABsEY-7JJwQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

_**A NEW POLL**_ , taken days after I launched my campaign to defeat Jon Ossoff, shows we’re inside the margin of error with 13% of voters still undecided.

That means this race is virtually tied.

**But there’s a catch and it’s a big one:** Jon Ossoff already has _**$11 million**_ in the bank and he’s raising millions more to pull ahead and stop our momentum.

We’re setting a goal of raising $75,000 from grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours to maintain our momentum and overtake Jon Ossoff in the polls.

[**I’m asking you to rush $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can give. clean_body: A NEW POLL, taken days after I launched my campaign to defeat Jon Ossoff, shows we’re inside the margin of error with 13% of voters still undecided. | Fellow Conservative, A NEW POLL , taken days after I launched my campaign to defeat Jon Ossoff, shows we’re inside the margin of error with 13% of voters still undecided. That means this race is virtually tied. But there’s a catch and it’s a big one: Jon Ossoff already has $11 million in the bank and he’s raising millions more to pull ahead and stop our momentum. We’re setting a goal of raising $75,000 from grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours to maintain our momentum and overtake Jon Ossoff in the polls. Georgia is the #1 Senate race in the country and we have an opportunity to take the lead early. Missing this chance would hand Jon Ossoff and the Democrats momentum. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. Join the mission by pitching in $10 to help John defeat Jon Ossoff and win the #1 Senate race in the country. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. Peter,
San Antonio, the 7th largest city in America, just had $406 million in federal funding ripped out from under it thanks to DOGE, all in the name of "efficiency."
Peter, this is not about cutting waste. It's about cutting opportunities off in major cities that aren't in lock-step with the MAGA agenda.
That's why GOTV PAC is mobilizing right now to help elect Gina Ortiz Jones, a veteran, public servant, and fighter for Texas families. She's the one person in this race who has the backbone to stand up to billionaire chaos agents like Musk and push back against Trump's anti-science, anti-community agenda.
But we need your help, Peter. Early voting starts TODAY for the June 7th primary, and we need your help to keep our independent phone bank operation fueled through Election Day.
Chip in $10 or more now to help GOTV PAC turn out voters for Gina Ortiz Jones.

name: Erin Conway (via Democrats.org)
subject: A quick introduction
body:
It’s Erin Conway, the Grassroots Fundraising Director at the DNC.
---
Hi Derek, I’m Erin, the DNC’s Grassroots Fundraising Director. My job is to make sure the Democratic Party has _as many resources as possible_ to relentlessly pursue our goals of fighting Trump and electing Democrats. **Most of the DNC’s work is funded by grassroots contributions, and we’ve been busy putting them to work.** We’ve sued Trump _twice_ , announced unprecedented investments in every single Democratic state party, held over 120 town halls nationwide, and launched our War Room to innovate how we hold Trump accountable. And it’s working: Americans are rejecting Republicans’ dangerous agenda, with Democrats winning or massively overperforming in nearly every major election this year. **But we can’t fund any of this work without your grassroots support.****[That’s why I'm writing to ask you to make a $3 donation to the DNC.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250527_3553_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3553_22930333_cJ1s9S&akid=3553%2E22930333%2EcJ1s9S)**
$3, that's the ask. $3 to fight Trump, unelected billionaires, and MAGA Republicans in every congressional district, in court, and online. $3 to build the programs we’ll need to win the House and the Senate in 2026, the White House in 2028, and each election in between. **[Derek, can you please contribute $3 to the Democratic National Committee today? I’ve been here for seven years now, so I know firsthand the importance of these contributions over time. We can only keep our momentum going with help from grassroots supporters like you.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250527_3553_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3553_22930333_cJ1s9S&akid=3553%2E22930333%2EcJ1s9S)**

Erin

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: A budget for billionaires, paid for by working families
body:
You are what your budget says you are

| |
---
Team, it's Marcy. Last week, House Republicans squeaked through their reconciliation bill by one vote in the wee hours of the night. It was practically a covert operation: limited public details, and executed while most of the world was asleep. **That was intentional, friend.** This budget is a billionaire bonanza. It cuts healthcare, food for working families and seniors, and directly worsens health coverage for 40,000 people across Northwest Ohio and nearly 14 million families nationwide. All to give billionaires another handout. **You are what your budget says you are, friend.** Federal budgets are our clearest way to tell the American people who we value, and who we leave behind. Mike Johnson and House Republicans have made their positions very clear. This is just the beginning. Johnson and the NRCC are looking to expand their House majority in 2026 to enact more of their Billionaire First agenda, and OH-09 is a top target for them. They spent $25 million in dark money against me last cycle and have already launched multiple attack campaigns against me for 2026. I need your help to fight back, team. The billionaires who fund our opponents miss out on one thing - we have people like you, because that's who we fight for every day in Washington. **[Can you have my back by making a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108469474/548024847/1039792322?refcode=250527_mk_budget_l1&ms=250527_mk_budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzJmZjU5MS00ZDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Azz46A_HrFiCy7lNADUhbogaglTK0k2APRggXn3QKg=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108469485/548024862/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250527_mk_budget&ms=250527_mk_budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzJmZjU5MS00ZDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Azz46A_HrFiCy7lNADUhbogaglTK0k2APRggXn3QKg=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108469486/548024863/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250527_mk_budget&ms=250527_mk_budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzJmZjU5MS00ZDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Azz46A_HrFiCy7lNADUhbogaglTK0k2APRggXn3QKg=)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=028c164dd7d244c183739f7d9f9c738b&_e=vdFkxpwP2ddu5O4JQtXnIgCQbmo3iwYrTuIUwFPmxjFGbtmYtYDfk7XArQhUOgFgKxsjDgpjAc6qOIL90lRweyw7fZ8Rx7am1CeVlLDj6aZxUBmL9KrQ848l1x1XgCgBxLUitIhYWEDh_45virtADOu_cdKyCIl8XtPDDz-H_o779jfGfCnP_6IxABTOIO4AT1HQG6iH8WfJsYpipNMcM26j7EXsO5BkCSjxTa7knGnq6QdzYcIbd2IKbvGYUjK4WOLdm2pN1Bw_5dLXHEGKbAT5O9OjuT0iDnEVUtTtNI-8MBiW2DWlrWMTMvSjjmWCDMR8bZPZzLv6PaNTukMreSKjUFv5Nvzm3QwnAaUDgLU%3D)

When we say Republicans are looking to cover more ground in 2026 – we mean it.

The DeVos family is gearing up to pour mountains of money into Michigan, starting right here in our backyard, with one goal in mind: turning our state red.

Let’s be clear about what that means. **It means attacks on working families, on public education, on reproductive freedom.**

But we’ve jumped mountains of Republican funding to make history and flip MI-03 blue in 2022 and defend it in 2024, to elect the first pro-choice woman to represent this district.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: A personal note from me to you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Thank you for everything you’re doing to support my campaign.
Since we launched this campaign in February, I’ve been overwhelmed by the support I’ve received from folks across New Mexico. Not only have **more than 60 New Mexico leaders** endorsed my campaign, I’m proud to have received donations from **all 33 counties** across our great state.
I’m so inspired by the movement that we’re building together. We’re working for a bright future for our state because we know that the solutions to New Mexico’s challenges are within reach. **We just have to be fierce enough to choose them.**
I know that many folks across New Mexico are struggling right now. I understand struggle from my own firsthand experience. I raised my child as a single mom, and I vividly remember the times when I chose between groceries or paying rent. I’m ready to change the system.
My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crimes so you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future that New Mexicans want and deserve.
I am a 35th-generation New Mexican and I believe we live in the best place in the world. That’s why it’s so critical to me that we fight for our home and our people.
I’m ready to lead these fights for New Mexico’s future with all of you by my side. There is no obstacle that we can’t overcome if we continue standing together.
If you’re with me, my campaign could use your help as we work to meet our upcoming end-of-month goal.
**Will you make a donation of $5 before our Saturday deadline? You can use the link below to make sure your donation goes through instantly:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250527_2_eom?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250527_2_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250527-2227&refcode2=2227_400544_4AVxlJ&akid=2227%2E400544%2E4AVxlJ)**
Thank you again for everything you’re doing to support this campaign.
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250527-2&t=1&refcode2=2227_400544_4AVxlJ&akid=2227%2E400544%2E4AVxlJ)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=2&akid=2227%2E400544%2E4AVxlJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=3&akid=2227%2E400544%2E4AVxlJ)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Divide and distract
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Fox News and the right-wing would have you believe that Alexandria’s American values are something out of the communist manifesto.
Fox News is _obsessed_ with fear-mongering about her policies.
Does this seem extreme to you?
Alexandria doesn't believe in healthcare, labor, and human dignity because she’s an extremist.
**Alexandria believes these things because she was a waitress.**
Because she’s worked double shifts to keep the lights on. She knows the urgent and daily stresses of working class people because she has lived them.
The MAGA movement and their messengers at Fox News want to divide and distract us so they can loot public coffers while everyone argues over scraps.
We need to show widespread support for Alexandria so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
[ Will you donate $5 to power our fight for progress? Alexandria doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs or curry favor with billionaires so every donation makes a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250527.xTbgHS&refcode=em20250527-8950-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8950%2E2526796%2EvpheP2)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250527.xTbgHS&refcode=em20250527-8950-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8950%2E2526796%2EvpheP2)**
Whether you can donate today or not, please know that we’re so grateful you’re here.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250527?refcode=em20250527-8950-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8950_2526796_vpheP2&akid=8950%2E2526796%2EvpheP2)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250527-8950-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=8950%2E2526796%2EvpheP2)**

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Regarding the Democrat Senator Adam Schiff.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
He's trying to take away our Second Amendment

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=a0fb6112eb684c41b406ad3dc90e8158&_e=PMrfTyMJcU1JYOC3yllRVQ995CAlk3bUYsDYpW615_su7JRtM9Cx5KaVh9eLnmfoqjyaqqCsZeobuiMZyBV95g9QofHJllwkeSLE5xhcIzNAIeY6bVr2IV_MVGIxw7g_bO_36JdCX4bTohppgUBxGbCMSpORYKIZqsiMoOff8asMgS6xp1tcJ1dNP3k4WGGwb3kcbIcN_WIIs4vY1Ho0NUNbJ_iqwO8RqTH0_k17YF2tAYEG90w3o3z8BhpKNUA49hsJnGRF6a3WfP1DD7Zdbaf1DL_wjyH224v-UT7hAjf1Vjly_VbtufKwIRSTCPkyTdQfeMLtrBlgAOQyjslA0OZBRLqaA4BLjJkCxAATdLg%3D)
---
Patriot,

As a veteran and a red-blooded American, it should be no surprise that I like things with a little extra... _firepower._

As a gun-owner, patriot, and staunch advocate for the Second Amendment, I understand what the Founding Fathers gave us when they afforded us the right to bear arms.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=a0fb6112eb684c41b406ad3dc90e8158&_e=PMrfTyMJcU1JYOC3yllRVQ995CAlk3bUYsDYpW615_su7JRtM9Cx5KaVh9eLnmfoqjyaqqCsZeobuiMZyBV95g9QofHJllwkeSLE5xhcIzNAIeY6bVr2IV_MVGIxw7g_bO_36JdCX4bTohppgUBxGbCMSpORYKIZqsiMoOff8asMgS6xp1tcJ1dNP3k4WGGwqE8pJkpQMv4fJkAc0zDj_Q_t8bwMqSomwrQILWYPPfJWS5qh4Jffey3XpHH2m_8nBF_nIQFEmZ7EnusbtVIJYBndZotgIYlFqByAhlWmzIpj27HuuYQt670aprfrhTvYYplOR0QlGxd8k0ggM5uues50jV8i-d5tSSndb0UZxYs%3D)
And despite what the Democrats may say, our rights are as uncompromisable as the word of God.

That's why, when I see people like Adam Schiff get up to a podium and say they're going to take away our guns because that's what his dark-money donors want to hear, **I can 't stand it.**

**I will never surrender when it comes to protecting our 2A rights; I didn 't serve this country just to go home and give up fighting for what I believe in. **

**When I was in Afghanistan, I commanded men and had to make some hard asks of people. I 'm about to do the same for you right now. **

[**I 'm asking you to make a $10 sacrifice for the fight to protect our Second Amendment.**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=a0fb6112eb684c41b406ad3dc90e8158&_e=PMrfTyMJcU1JYOC3yllRVQ995CAlk3bUYsDYpW615_su7JRtM9Cx5KaVh9eLnmfoqjyaqqCsZeobuiMZyBV95g9QofHJllwkeSLE5xhcIzNAIeY6bVr2IV_MVGIxw7g_bO_36JdCX4bTohppgUBxGbCMSpORYKIZqsiMoOff8asMgS6xp1tcJ1dNP3k4WGGwGyAdYYtVYOhnVB8tCRxkqkuyhMS5lwhcITChsMUzS9zgmNPJ6CuAo_JWovJ8TT64GXq-IWtkBhqI_tVRUBhtWMx1tpChn_TtlXBu4a8XHRnkgJuCS502F-Oo-AyLuR6tOaNVAmCR4o48_cXLyKQi_-44U0wBGxQkLI7OnyklB9Y%3D)

| [**MAKE A $10 SACRIFICE FOR THE 2A**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=a0fb6112eb684c41b406ad3dc90e8158&_e=PMrfTyMJcU1JYOC3yllRVQ995CAlk3bUYsDYpW615_su7JRtM9Cx5KaVh9eLnmfoqjyaqqCsZeobuiMZyBV95g9QofHJllwkeSLE5xhcIzNAIeY6bVr2IV_MVGIxw7g_bO_36JdCX4bTohppgUBxGfcvY5gxYoOhs6pKJjqVR8eSV_GNS8GkirE0pv9bbEW182WLwd-r4aaD-LQS6kguPsNLARH5EVBIpdMW51Y0JTlmAUlx5zzFA7jISC_FiIZIYeoIDDpqGjFPodkuGmHZGNHyPU42B_8xCGfImQEpH2IWAJf9lZxKPzNZjHTumvu0NHlkZaFJamb259E-FxEzJlsEf3SBKCM8GXioE4bLNpU%3D)
---

Our rights are like a house of cards; **if we let the Democrats take one away, the entire house could fall.** We can NOT compromise on what hundreds of thousands of Americans died for.

If you can spare the $10 I'm asking, or even just a few dollars, I would be eternally grateful. I will never stop fighting for our Second Amendment, I just need some reinforcements to stand with me.

[**If there 's anything you can sacrifice, click HERE or the button below. **](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=a0fb6112eb684c41b406ad3dc90e8158&_e=PMrfTyMJcU1JYOC3yllRVQ995CAlk3bUYsDYpW615_su7JRtM9Cx5KaVh9eLnmfoqjyaqqCsZeobuiMZyBV95g9QofHJllwkeSLE5xhcIzNAIeY6bVr2IV_MVGIxw7g_bO_36JdCX4bTohppgUBxGbCMSpORYKIZqsiMoOff8asMgS6xp1tcJ1dNP3k4WGGw85JoCJwGDVU-M61t-BMqt2QT-rAe1B1IRvG8qZ63ubfFSEcSO4eAebFYX2hGAx9JcT-2dlcLLM1R9etveQS1PxnSuhsqlOtv87xGau1qYQFVdYyQcN3MvnbL3zLgi2ZmEpLc2O_g_Bf_yQpxoVszpf4mJRb1gqVnXvh0sF_Xg4w%3D)

[**MAKE A SMALL-DOLLAR SACRIFICE FOR THE 2A**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=a0fb6112eb684c41b406ad3dc90e8158&_e=PMrfTyMJcU1JYOC3yllRVQ995CAlk3bUYsDYpW615_su7JRtM9Cx5KaVh9eLnmfoqjyaqqCsZeobuiMZyBV95g9QofHJllwkeSLE5xhcIzNAIeY6bVr2IV_MVGIxw7g_bO_36JdCX4bTohppgUBxGfcvY5gxYoOhs6pKJjqVR8eSV_GNS8GkirE0pv9bbEW1qQ5DoqxRyjhi-BydUcyGKtFG_2iS3mILz2bQ-xQe5-7GZ5mu6rGyub12nBTSEE_hz2J7RQjKpVmVJyQHjodw85NaDEzF5ugGCyRXsyFLxBeb4VjMP0_Dp2SFJc7SQfMaWQwQxfJv-nCj7yijl1rItBQ48weA4skIAECyVefSf9k%3D)

clean_body: He's trying to take away our Second Amendment | Patriot, As a veteran and a red-blooded American, it should be no surprise that I like things with a little extra... firepower. As a gun-owner, patriot, and staunch advocate for the Second Amendment, I understand what the Founding Fathers gave us when they afforded us the right to bear arms. And despite what the Democrats may say, our rights are as uncompromisable as the word of God. That's why, when I see people like Adam Schiff get up to a podium and say they're going to take away our guns because that's what his dark-money donors want to hear, I can 't stand it. I will never surrender when it comes to protecting our 2A rights; I didn 't serve this country just to go home and give up fighting for what I believe in. When I was in Afghanistan, I commanded men and had to make some hard asks of people. I 'm about to do the same for you right now. | Our rights are like a house of cards; if we let the Democrats take one away, the entire house could fall. We can NOT compromise on what hundreds of thousands of Americans died for. If you can spare the $10 I'm asking, or even just a few dollars, I would be eternally grateful. I will never stop fighting for our Second Amendment, I just need some reinforcements to stand with me. Thank you, Congressman Pat Harrigan, NC-10 Christian, Husband, Father, Green Beret, West Point Grad, Business Owner Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=%2F%2FPK41y0BpFM0H1sCBc7yG9hkZ8lCkLLvGqGmPvTUOJmKXN6vwF5FDEviZ4htG%2F6ut6JOF0LHm%2FvRsEVPel%2FXtXaV%2BmWTq%2FGz1UFxFEP7TgoCoCgxpTFLqK%2BH6c5N6OiDNtWATGrw7kBF0wUf9wK8%2Fo8089%2FY0GGw2MX%2F2NHeAndn%2BCobvQbYbGUN%2BXol6LrugDiBFktb85%2B3jmU%2FtCVxuzHD2if%2BP3CoYH92P4USzZNmL6YsWF0ms2DeHaOXtql43iwUEjR33prtMUmPpTEfp%2Br%2BHwwbPgTYNaxR8uTHEzf%2FQkMsKlrUjKktPEccDCSryv%2FPwnWW8pTYVk2xmOnAUEnTtupPPZLuQnLQZMjdBwD4BafD33YnZCeKibjhpHC4rVckcT2zZcG1FX0vlUP%2BhIBTXeyldCBBMztp1yh5FyOFzdjb%2BAi5WhcODyIAuk2)
---

Right now, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are pushing an agenda that would make deep cuts to Medicaid, Social Security, and other essential programs that millions of Americans count on — including families right here in CA-25. They want to slash Medicaid, Social Security, and other critical services — putting the needs of everyday families behind the wealth of Donald Trump and his billionaire friends. And as a physician, **I take that personally**. These programs are lifelines — helping people afford medications, see a doctor, care for aging parents, and put food on the table. Gutting them would have real, devastating consequences for our communities. Trump promised to protect these programs. But now, he and his allies are putting the wealth of billionaires and corporate donors ahead of the basic needs of everyday Americans. And we can’t let them get away with it. I **_won’t_** let them get away with it. We have a critical opportunity to stop this agenda by flipping the House in 2026. And that work starts now — in critical districts like CA-25. [My team is working to raise $5,000 before Saturday at midnight to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal, stay on track, and build the campaign we’ll need to win. clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Right now, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are pushing an agenda that would make deep cuts to Medicaid, Social Security, and other essential programs that millions of Americans count on — including families right here in CA-25. They want to slash Medicaid, Social Security, and other critical services — putting the needs of everyday families behind the wealth of Donald Trump and his billionaire friends. And as a physician, I take that personally. These programs are lifelines — helping people afford medications, see a doctor, care for aging parents, and put food on the table. Gutting them would have real, devastating consequences for our communities. Trump promised to protect these programs. But now, he and his allies are putting the wealth of billionaires and corporate donors ahead of the basic needs of everyday Americans. And we can’t let them get away with it. I won’t let them get away with it. We have a critical opportunity to stop this agenda by flipping the House in 2026. And that work starts now — in critical districts like CA-25. = | | = Every dollar helps us push back against Trump’s extremist priorities and fight for the people who count on these programs to live with dignity and security. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. name: Marina Jenkins, NDRC
subject: 5 things to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We got so close to having an election stolen.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108471004/548029619/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjNmQ0NDgzLTUwM2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jswPPaSCceU_2FocTiKpHxWPM61Jjob1XOQAI1btF3Q=&emci=26f6555b-3a3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6c6d4483-503b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Hey Peter — The long struggle to defend Justice Allison Riggs’ victory in the North Carolina Supreme Court election is finally over — and democracy won. Now that the dust has settled, **here are my five quick takeaways from this saga:**
1. **We came so close to having an election stolen.** This was a deliberate test run for a nationwide Republican strategy, and we have to be ready for them to try to steal future elections by retroactively throwing out legally cast ballots in Democratic areas.

2. **One of the lessons of January 6th is that even though an effort to overthrow democracy failed once, you have to prepare for the people behind that effort to keep trying.** Not only are many people who supported the Big Lie and the chaos of that day still in power, they're also still actively trying to undermine democracy. What just happened in North Carolina is egregious and dangerous, and we need to be vigilant about making sure no one gets away with trying it again.

3. **If you've ever doubted the importance of state supreme courts, just look at how far MAGA will go to control them,** from Elon Musk spending nearly $25 million trying to elect the Trump-endorsed candidate for the Wisconsin Supreme Court, to a losing judicial candidate in North Carolina trying to throw out people’s legally cast ballots to overturn an election in order to obtain a seat on that state’s highest court. We know that having fair-minded justices is critical to having fair maps — and they know that too.

4. **With Justice Riggs' re-election now official, Democrats have a fighting chance to take back the North Carolina Supreme Court** before the 2030 redistricting cycle. Republicans currently have a 5-2 majority on the court, but this win shows us the path to flipping that majority in 2028, just before the court is expected to play a significant role in defining the next decade’s maps. Now it’s on us to put in the work, just like we did to win back the high court in Wisconsin.

5. [**The work to fend off election thefts and elect more state-level fair maps champions doesn’t happen without support from donors like you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108471006/548029620/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FiveTakeawaysNC_email_20250527-NDRC-Tier1-FiveTakeawaysNC_ctrl&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250527-NDRC-Tier1-FiveTakeawaysNC_ctrl&utm_campaign=FiveTakeawaysNC&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjNmQ0NDgzLTUwM2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jswPPaSCceU_2FocTiKpHxWPM61Jjob1XOQAI1btF3Q=) Thank you for all you’ve already done this year. But the work continues. We have a playbook that works: Fight back wherever anti-democracy forces are operating, and end gerrymandering by winning state-level elections for positions that play powerful roles in the redistricting process.

So what now? We build on this victory and double down on our commitment to the work. **We are in a perpetual fight for a more representative democracy — and we must not let up.** **[If you’re feeling energized by the win for democracy in North Carolina, contribute $30 or more right now to help ensure we keep winning in states across the country.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108471008/548029623/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FiveTakeawaysNC_email_20250527-NDRC-Tier1-FiveTakeawaysNC_ctrl&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250527-NDRC-Tier1-FiveTakeawaysNC_ctrl&utm_campaign=FiveTakeawaysNC&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjNmQ0NDgzLTUwM2ItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jswPPaSCceU_2FocTiKpHxWPM61Jjob1XOQAI1btF3Q=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We got so close to having an election stolen. | Hey Peter — The long struggle to defend Justice Allison Riggs’ victory in the North Carolina Supreme Court election is finally over — and democracy won. Now that the dust has settled, here are my five quick takeaways from this saga: 1. We came so close to having an election stolen. This was a deliberate test run for a nationwide Republican strategy, and we have to be ready for them to try to steal future elections by retroactively throwing out legally cast ballots in Democratic areas. 2. One of the lessons of January 6th is that even though an effort to overthrow democracy failed once, you have to prepare for the people behind that effort to keep trying. Not only are many people who supported the Big Lie and the chaos of that day still in power, they're also still actively trying to undermine democracy. What just happened in North Carolina is egregious and dangerous, and we need to be vigilant about making sure no one gets away with trying it again. 3. If you've ever doubted the importance of state supreme courts, just look at how far MAGA will go to control them, from Elon Musk spending nearly $25 million trying to elect the Trump-endorsed candidate for the Wisconsin Supreme Court, to a losing judicial candidate in North Carolina trying to throw out people’s legally cast ballots to overturn an election in order to obtain a seat on that state’s highest court. We know that having fair-minded justices is critical to having fair maps — and they know that too. 4. With Justice Riggs' re-election now official, Democrats have a fighting chance to take back the North Carolina Supreme Court before the 2030 redistricting cycle. Republicans currently have a 5-2 majority on the court, but this win shows us the path to flipping that majority in 2028, just before the court is expected to play a significant role in defining the next decade’s maps. Now it’s on us to put in the work, just like we did to win back the high court in Wisconsin. 5. = Thank you for all you’ve already done this year. But the work continues. We have a playbook that works: Fight back wherever anti-democracy forces are operating, and end gerrymandering by winning state-level elections for positions that play powerful roles in the redistricting process. So what now? We build on this victory and double down on our commitment to the work. We are in a perpetual fight for a more representative democracy — and we must not let up. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, Marina Jenkins Executive Director National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Laura Gillen
subject: Finding common ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
I’m proud to be leading the Access to Family Building Act – a bipartisan effort to codify the right to in vitro fertilization (IVF) and other assisted reproductive technologies.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108471049/548029724/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-05-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDY2MmRmNS01MDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCvMqLdzBHUfARpD-7hs1gF6WdeMdBphoUBDget0sO0=)
---
| Peter,

When I was elected to Congress, I made a commitment to find common ground and fight for legislation that would make a meaningful impact on the lives of working families.

I’m proud to be leading the **Access to Family Building Act** – _a bipartisan effort to codify the right to in vitro fertilization (IVF) and other assisted reproductive technologies._

**Protecting access to IVF should not be a partisan issue.** My bill will give families across the country more certainty and security, ensuring that individuals and couples are not forced to delay growing their families because of political interference.

This issue is deeply personal for families across the country, and I will continue to stand up and ensure that they have the support they need to thrive, _but I need your help._

[_**Will you join me in the fight to ensure that IVF will remain a protected and accessible option for any family who needs it by adding your name to our petition so we can show strong grassroots support?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108471050/548029725/-961272124?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDY2MmRmNS01MDNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCvMqLdzBHUfARpD-7hs1gF6WdeMdBphoUBDget0sO0=&emci=165906ee-503b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ed662df5-503b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7377580)

subject: Nancy Mace wants to kick me out of Congress. Bless her heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Today, two days after Trump’s Justice Department charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight at an ICE facility, MAGA extremist Nancy Mace filed a resolution to expel me from Congress. Bless her heart.
| Peter,

Today, two days after Trump’s Justice Department charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight at an ICE facility, MAGA extremist **Nancy Mace filed a resolution to expel me from Congress**. Bless her heart.
---
[](https://fight4progress.org/mciver?t=0HNuJqFdEYO0&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-05-27_1&amount=25)
Let's be clear about what's happening: Donald Trump and his loyalists in Congress are doing everything they can to silence their political opposition—even if it means weaponizing the Justice Department and the Constitution to punish dissent.

name: Team Bonta
subject: No one should have to live in fear of gun violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Check out the latest actions our Attorney General has taken to defend commonsense gun laws.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250527&t=1&akid=1804%2E1088799%2Ep8LBiM)
Gun violence is America’s disease, uniquely so.
While California has some of the strongest gun violence prevention measures in the nation, even one gun death is too many. No one, in any part of our country, should have to live in fear of gun violence. That’s why this issue is a top priority for our Attorney General.
Just this month, **Rob filed briefs to defend commonsense gun safety laws that are under attack by Republicans and the gun lobby** in other states, including:
* Illinois’ restrictions on the possession, sale, or transfer of certain assault weapons and large-capacity magazines capable of holding more than 10 rounds of ammunition for long guns and 15 rounds for handguns.
* New York’s ban on carrying firearms in public parks.

Assault weapons and large-capacity magazines have been used in many horrific mass shootings around the country, including right here in California. **Weapons of war don’t belong on our streets — and no guns belong where our children and families are playing.**
Rob is staying vigilant and fighting back _whenever and wherever_ life-saving gun restrictions come under threat, but he needs your support to keep it up.
**[Chip in $5 or more to help re-elect Rob so he can continue to tackle gun violence as the People’s Attorney of California →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250527?refcode=em20250527-1804&amount=5&refcode2=1804_1088799_p8LBiM&akid=1804%2E1088799%2Ep8LBiM)**

New York’s ban on carrying firearms in public parks. Assault weapons and large-capacity magazines have been used in many horrific mass shootings around the country, including right here in California. Weapons of war don’t belong on our streets — and no guns belong where our children and families are playing. Rob is staying vigilant and fighting back whenever and wherever life-saving gun restrictions come under threat, but he needs your support to keep it up. — Team Bonta

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Taking some time off
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
In the middle of my campaign for Senate, my wife Sydney gave birth to our daughter, Isla. I took some time off the campaign trail then, because you never get these early moments back.
#

Hey, Peter. It’s Ruben.
I am writing to let you know that I am going to be taking some time off from the Senate soon.
To be clear, it's not a bad thing.
In the middle of my campaign for Senate, my wife Sydney gave birth to our daughter, Isla. I took some time off the campaign trail then, because you never get these early moments back. Now, Sydney and I are expecting our second child together. Just like last time, I am committed to being a father and a husband first in these first few weeks. I want to make the most of it.
Now, the timing is not ideal. We’ve got a monthly deadline coming up on May 31st, and then we go straight into an FEC month in June — right when I’ll be going on parental leave. But I am going to be there for my wife and our growing family.
I made that decision hoping you'd help me close the gap. That you'd replace the fundraising calls I can't make with donations made in response to emails like this one.
This is a magical time for my family, but it's also an important week for our campaign. And I am hoping you'll help.
[**Can I count on you to contribute $5 to my campaign before our fundraising deadline ends in just a few days, and before we head into an official FEC deadline month? I need your help, especially now, to help reach our goals while I'm with my family.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may25.XT1Xme&refcode=em250527-1-160&t=1&akid=3876%2E734936%2EyjEuHw)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: I refuse to let healthcare for seniors be on the chopping block
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
|
---
| | I wanted to add one more thing to my message from last week: **If the GOP's budget dream becomes reality, Medicare will be slashed.** A new CBO analysis reveals that the reconciliation bill spikes the deficit _so_ heavily that automatic cuts are triggered — _including half a trillion dollars from Medicare._ _[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108471580/548031409/147818231?ms=2025-05-27-budget&refcode=2025-05-27-budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTNjMjUxOS01NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tXceSSGTvq_cbh65WE24MkDaZJOSaqEHRngzxw16qO8=&emci=38e29755-4f3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e93c2519-563b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364)_ This is yet another reason why **we must stand strong in the Senate** and stop this monstrosity from passing. I refuse to let health care for our seniors be on the chopping block. I reject the false choice Republicans want to give us. And I will _never_ trade the well-being of American families for billionaire tax cuts. [**If you agree, please join me and sign our petition against the GOP's budget bill >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108471581/548031410/147818231?ms=2025-05-27-budget&refcode=2025-05-27-budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTNjMjUxOS01NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tXceSSGTvq_cbh65WE24MkDaZJOSaqEHRngzxw16qO8=&emci=38e29755-4f3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e93c2519-563b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364) Onward, _Ron_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108471582/548031411/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTNjMjUxOS01NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tXceSSGTvq_cbh65WE24MkDaZJOSaqEHRngzxw16qO8=&emci=38e29755-4f3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e93c2519-563b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364)
---

Early Thursday morning, **Republicans in the House rammed through their budget reconciliation bill full of cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, clean energy investments, and so much more.**
I want to make something clear: their extreme, cruel, and economically devastating bill is nothing short of a war on working families.
Everything in this bill is designed to make you and your family poorer and sicker than ever before just so Donald Trump can give another round of tax cuts to himself, his rich friends, and their corporate donors.
Right now, we need to lay the groundwork to push back on the Republicans' backward priorities. We need to show that their agenda is unpopular and pressure wavering representatives and senators to put _people first._
The outrage fatigue is real, but as this bill goes to the Senate, NOW is the time to get loud. Now is the time to make your elected officials know they will be held accountable for supporting this extremist right-wing wishlist.
[**Join me in sending the powerful message to Republicans that Medicaid cuts are off the table to pay for their billionaire bailout.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108471583/548031412/147818231?ms=2025-05-27-budget&refcode=2025-05-27-budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTNjMjUxOS01NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tXceSSGTvq_cbh65WE24MkDaZJOSaqEHRngzxw16qO8=&emci=38e29755-4f3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e93c2519-563b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364)
[Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108471584/548031413/147818231?ms=2025-05-27-budget&refcode=2025-05-27-budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTNjMjUxOS01NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tXceSSGTvq_cbh65WE24MkDaZJOSaqEHRngzxw16qO8=&emci=38e29755-4f3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e93c2519-563b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364)
At a time when our economy is slowing and families are feeling the crunch of rising costs, the _last_ thing working families can afford is cuts to their health care or food assistance. **I won't stand for it.**
I won't stand for the GOP's eagerness to hurt hospitals, small businesses, and the environment – all to pay for another tax cut to billionaires.
Our voices matter right now. And Republicans in Congress need to hear them.
[**So join me. Stand with me in opposition to the GOP's un-American, unacceptable, unworkable billionaire bailout.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108471585/548031414/147818231?ms=2025-05-27-budget&refcode=2025-05-27-budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTNjMjUxOS01NjNiLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tXceSSGTvq_cbh65WE24MkDaZJOSaqEHRngzxw16qO8=&emci=38e29755-4f3b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e93c2519-563b-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364)
More soon,
_Ron_

name: Board President David Canepa
subject: May 2025 e-newsletter
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a225bdda6a4d/may-2025-e-newsletter?e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### e-newsletter

## MAY '25
---
|
* County applauds emergency medical workers
* Mental Health Month highlights county’s commitment to wellness
* Progress Seminar shines light on county’s collaborative spirit
* Midway Village, the largest affordable housing project in San Mateo County’s history, completes Phase 1
* Ribbon cut at 500 County Center, hundreds celebrate 169th anniversary of San Mateo County

---
| | |
---
|
# “This is a transformative project that took a very old and outdated affordable housing complex with 150 units to what will be a modern complex that will have more than 500 units for individuals often on the brink of being homeless.”
# **\- President David Canepa**
---
| | | | **2025 May e-newsletter** **Ribbon cut at 500 County Center, hundreds celebrate 169 th anniversary of San Mateo County** Dear friends, Thank you to everyone who came out to celebrate the 169th birthday of San Mateo County and the ribbon cutting of 500 County Center, the greenest civic building in the United States. The evening started under the stained-glass rotunda at the Old County Courthouse in downtown Redwood City with a reenactment marking the county’s founding and was followed by a brief procession of hundreds of attendees to the new civic building accompanied by the Woodside High School Band. Barely a year old, 500 County Center is already the winner of numerous Best of the Best Sustainability awards, including from engineering News Record and the American Institute of Architects. It was a beautiful evening to celebrate the county’s storied past, the possibilities of the future and to toast the renaissance of San Mateo County. The event has hosted by the Board of Supervisors, County Executive’s Office and Historical Association to welcome the public to the new workplace for San Mateo County employees which is becoming a destination for large community gatherings with its immense lobby and vast courtyards that can accommodate hundreds of people. To me, 500 County Center represents the cultural, artistic, political and economic revival of what has become the healthiest and near wealthiest county in California. There are too many individuals to thank in this space but I want to take the time to recognize Vice President Noelia Corzo, Supervisor Lisa Gauthier, architect Javier Arizmendi, History Museum Director Mitch Postel, Chief of the Silicon Valley Office of Protocol Deanna Tryon and County Executive Mike Callagy your welcoming remarks and your warm reception to the nearly 700 attendees who joined the celebration. ** ** **Midway Village, the largest affordable housing project in San Mateo County’s history, completes Phase 1** Midway Village in Daly City’s Bayshore neighborhood marked the completion of 147 new affordable homes and broke ground on 113 more as part of the largest affordable housing redevelopment in San Mateo County’s history. The celebration at Midway Village included a ribbon-cutting for Midway Village I and the ceremonial launch of construction on 113 homes as part of Midway Village 2. This is a neighborhood near the Cow Palace that has really struggled for decades but is starting to show new signs of life as the first phase of Midway Village is complete. This is a transformative project that took a very old and outdated affordable housing complex with 150 units to what will be a modern complex that will have more than 500 units for individuals often on the brink of being homeless. Developed by the nonprofit MidPen Housing, the project also includes 27 units for local educators and 12 units for young adults transitioning out of foster care. One of the project’s first residents is a 22-year-old who aged out of the foster care system named Nathan Smith. Nathan (pictured above) said at the event that it was a surreal feeling to sign the lease and get the key to his new apartment. He is now enrolled in a pre-nursing program at the College of San Mateo. The project is part of a four-phase redevelopment effort that will transform 150 aging units into 555 modern apartments on the same site, owned by the San Mateo County Housing Authority. In addition to resident amenities similar to those in Midway Village I, this second phase will also feature a 15,000-square-foot child care center where Peninsula Family Service will serve 109 children, including children from low-income families in the broader community.

**Progress Seminar shines light on county’s collaborative spirit **

I was honored to share the stage with Nicole Taylor, President and CEO of the Silicon Valley Community Foundation, Julie Lind, Executive Officer of the San Mateo County Central Labor Council and Co-Chair Rosanne Foust on the opening keynote panel at the San Mateo County Progress Seminar 2025 in Santa Rosa May 3.

Together, we set the tone for an incredible weekend of collaboration.

Much of the discussion was centered around the uncertainty our county faces with the new White House Administration and how our cities, multiple agencies such as Caltrain, business community and nonprofits can work together to continue to serve the public with the safety net services we are mandated to provide.

For instance, the massive cuts to proposed for Medicaid could cut off access to health insurance to 43,000 San Mateo County residents that could have a dramatic ripple effect on the health and safety of the entire county. In total, the county is at risk of losing $672 million in federal funds, mostly in the Health System, Housing Department and the Human Services Agency depending on actions the federal government takes in the coming months. The highest risk categories include losing funding for programs including Medicaid, SNAP food assistance, Temporary Assistance for Needy Families and Emergency Housing Vouchers. There are also some executive orders proposed that would set this county back including to mandate proof of citizenship in voter registration and to roll back how we accept mail-in ballots. This county was the first in California to conduct an all-mail election and we have proved here that it increases voter turnout, costs less money and is transparent. 19 states have filed a lawsuit against Trump and San Mateo County is poised to file an amicus brief in support of California’s clear authority to run its own elections. The new White House Administration has prompted the County to tailor our advocacy efforts to align with current federal priorities and highlight aspects of our projects that will appeal to decision makers in Washington, D.C. while adhering to the County’s values and commitment to serve our clients and community members, especially our most vulnerable neighbors. Again, there are uncertainties out there and cuts coming, but our Board, Chief Financial Officer and Legislative team are all firmly locked in to anticipate what cuts may be most impactful and to pivot our spending if necessary to address any shortfalls. We are a county of resilience and I remain optimistic that if we continue to foster collaboration like we did at the Progress Seminar, we will be prepared for any uncertainties that come our way.

**Mental Health Month highlights county’s commitment to wellness** Every year in May, the county highlights our commitment to wellness during Mental Health Month. Each day in the United States, millions of people struggle — often silently — with mental health and substance use challenges. They may feel alone, misunderstood, or afraid to reach out for help. And too often, stigma delays treatment, leaving people isolated and at risk. This is something we cannot ignore. It’s not just about statistics — it’s about our neighbors, our friends and families. Here in San Mateo County, we’re facing this reality head-on. Between 2021 and 2023, more than 12% of our adult residents likely experienced serious psychological distress. And our youth — many of whom are still learning how to navigate life—are showing signs of deep emotional strain. These numbers remind us that we must do more — and we can do more. Our Behavioral Health and Recovery Services team, along with a committed network of partners, is providing essential treatment, prevention, and support to thousands of residents. But care doesn’t look the same for everyone, and it shouldn’t. That’s why we are investing in programs that are culturally responsive, rooted in equity and centered in compassion. We are especially proud of efforts like the Office of Diversity and Equity’s Health Equity Initiatives, and the Lived Experience Academy, which empowers people to share their stories of recovery, hope and healing. These community voices help break down stigma and open doors to understanding. This year’s theme — Mental Health as a Continuum — reminds us that wellness is not a destination, but a journey. And everyone deserves support along the way. It was an honor to present this year’s proclamation to Dr. Jei Africa, Director, Behavioral Health & Recovery Services, Sylvia Tang, Community Health Planner, Terrell Fortune, Case Management /Assessment Specialist, Renee Harris, Peer Support Specialist, Charo Martinez, Community Program Specialist, and Cynthia Castro, Health Ambassador who also gave a presentation on the services the county provides for those dealing with behavioral and mental health issues. **County applauds emergency medical workers** On Tuesday May 20, the San Mateo County Board of supervisors unanimously approved a proclamation I sponsored recognizing May 18 to 24 as Emergency Medical Services Week. This year’s theme, “EMS: WE CARE. FOR EVERYONE,” captures the heart of what these professionals do. Every single day, paramedics, EMTs, dispatchers, firefighters, nurses, doctors, and volunteers show up during some of the hardest moments people will ever face. They bring skill, compassion, and calm when it matters most. Their work is demanding in every way. Long hours, high stress, and intense responsibility. And yet they keep showing up, not because it’s easy, but because they care about the people they serve. This week, we say thank you. Thank you for the lives you save, the comfort you offer and the strength you bring to our community. I was proud to present the proclamation to American Medical Response professionals, numerous other first responders from various city fire departments and San Mateo County’s Director of Emergency Services Travis Kusman, who is a paramedic himself.

**Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=82ecfb8df9&e=c0babbc643 "https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9?fbclid=IwAR3YFH0mH828rtAUru5EFOO9GsMCasQYe1N7AUrmwAwBf30JTtXOSeCzKjs"). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org"). In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors
---
| | | |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=778fcf657f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=778fcf657f).
